Fellow American,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. I'm a team player - always have been - and I need you on my team. _**[So, I'm asking you to join my team today by offering your personal endorsement of my campaign.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=45efa265d89c4b5d93e6c6511f1364b6&_e=GweeBAMca72LK9U6KsMg2WIoOVS0n-Yq6dDZQLZGXWmeRH7koPVs9FDA-4q_RpRmpdw-pbd1pvHIDBUQa6vtOGkQHv3SvpFWweuSc4EOvs5lY96zpQEzxiPWDaMtYehpBPhOlbCHUc7reTppyYoPtcebQyy3n0VaEWHbTVWQshihNKYi9g109U8-Zkx09Ms_GcSdYucHYuwmpiSxjU-3sjGdSB7RJjRykMp_MUUd-AbE8g1XvywyuQcCMh3rX7Lwh7x1nxWgNIBcDPx_uUNH6I3QtyTXwclw8Hz6Cu1ChlMj8IUWBuxhRzbPG67rI5jQxNtnomw70CDcT_JDf40WAcYC4htJkw9d6z10aHdbqkIgWFs1UvkekV3O5GvCVB0paN-prEXX18kWN9QxnI68spiu3K78tysgJOuK4YYg-KM6c0dvCVlnzuOnH5GZ7GvcLAWrT7MEJoNa1iGFt92J_47DH2hE-Ok-0EaUvrtmDn9_ZZmFTde2Cy7inYhO6TzxHQx5-pdToH9CCs-gwOhp_YULun8nvHNis1ZNXvcjg6lw9xfKmOIcpEhF2CPR5AsqlFLJu7IM8bGOsgsxs9kVzA%3D%3D)**_

body:
And we’re tired of it. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLo25V4Xl0VnK-lyHqeL_Ipi5Efh35vGzhhBU06Nb0FYLCPkf8BWPfNYStP-zF1djq76hqMikuZ7zHIfgoe-9knaOyJHhXNUgcbub3U-eJ2FPbGAxPKq_RKiWxDVnljMs5wUaFySc9T5k8yXbTEIEXRNvpvivXDZjcIhxMa17v5ujvw9Z4VfVMPsKZ5O96BIMLsffNUTfUmFAABD4CFfiirTP9gGfn48cTNE90k2bWAls20WXJoZON8bloPR0nKosZejjF1iDxyN6-BSPn54P8e868ryigCaVQnaEPp3wh7iqBLxN6mM1suGUnc5ZgYkQpaxbidq6Z5xYe0JuXERR2EtiDaUYGIP75wTQCoJYN-1BCDJq1aZjFsajA8v5Vw671JOYlYiWKe66DA8L9cYpOsLw/3g3/sOsRGn8oSGCpiZzDk7fDoA/h0/gjueYhDjNTQxl75zKspxm7BLXreAudTNDkTuJL_GPHI)

Folks,

CA-23 is in need of a real leader. During these tough times, people are in desperate need of more job opportunities, easier access to healthcare, and a leader who will advocate for them.

Instead of being that leader, Kevin McCarthy is busy sucking up to Trump and his far-right base. He’s spent the past year lying and hiding from the truth about the violent insurrection on January 6th.

**We’ve had enough.[Help us unseat McCarthy by chipping in with any amount today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLo2cT52vdV0aWJKfhpoWrCS9wCPfnHTRSzkvrt5KBzIjSyKST_zy7ALgH546nz6q_41xEeYtPIx1HS1XaBDurNfM-TmoJxCqtCojQyGIXy1BioXGpErjEOIBbCZPNCanQJ46A9258-kxHoiQ2pvK4TMG2u89j3xdS2oYWpi4ZLUnkOUd7hweyh3d10TAw2UFNw3w9GC-S6d7ICqCHWQJzcTLgns1p5wbSkcVlVG62MtiJ1K9AV-96UOT3IWDmYK6o25IIy3rbn5E9OVAHeX-K8v3qOaEaAfB-BLakqXD3KX4cl6jEoaNUITU4DZGSuIh3Y3XUTFnKwPjMug1JDI998xAgllYPvObthk6lHcVOmeVQ/3g3/sOsRGn8oSGCpiZzDk7fDoA/h1/Skg4A8T4bcP8IvFJLI15TgDN2Opy4Cxghd_iqy1Vneo)**

That’s why we need your support. We need to elect someone who will actually fight for our needs, someone like Bruno Amato.

Bruno will be accountable to you, not massive corporations who only care about their bottom line. He will finally make sure veterans get the treatment they deserve after serving our country, and he is going to bring a voice to the people of California’s Central Valley who have been struggling so much for as long as Kevin McCarthy has been in Washington.

**[We’re not going to back down, friend, and I hope you won’t either. Can you chip in any amount today to help us make sure this Congress is Kevin McCarthy’s last?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLo2cT52vdV0aWJKfhpoWrCS9wCPfnHTRSzkvrt5KBzIjSyKST_zy7ALgH546nz6q_4-RDDoS50HtfXhetAjcCOZHRHu_e2L4XvtOa6WFuQf4sKDORzdPxh6wryUPxCsYHDIM34qwiFwujkbkoUdxeFJn1gsxHraKtGIN4bxz21mTc3tpk9zg8wnz9T3uWucG-fqDMsOxJDvj8okS4iZf5YZADvbneEY71Ci-BzGkB0g4a850O5DToN52dJqKLwYiZimttvVJQFGZMCL9JxcsB_DvdHiETD6W96beCz4a6a2gz6cp0Hs3_53cp0zBaA08jtxmsd6gR_AcbnjtPUZfUqT79ZMJgt_SPmxQpbD21ut2w/3g3/sOsRGn8oSGCpiZzDk7fDoA/h2/y_qlpBWqweG2HFFgeL5w_xzCQ4cbnpKyzxX6KtE46QY)**

Thank you,

Bruno Amato for Congress [Contribute »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLo2cT52vdV0aWJKfhpoWrCS9wCPfnHTRSzkvrt5KBzIjSyKST_zy7ALgH546nz6q_4_44Umi7K7cvcMmYzaaoebUkAMYOWZcgKaLfc47hkda_VKdoQNkFvGHBFSiBjWyRTnmIX7YqIHD0CmpPlaTOUOcEpup-gjH8VTjr95dfnTCM2SjGH_zw94I4Pj3DaWAtVco3eAFu-MuhvZGETGdfU6hT2LpEcbw2LYNRkOlpW59JTPbBpxquG1igAPCIRuKnI8WhVz_V4Zt7LRGtfkNcI0TSBVSZiw0H_0_kvcVUS4ZC7SwZSD8qTcDaRbhOn4_7bx7LJRjUH9vKGX9hyzOkjaTuMBdVV0RrCPw6T5b5Sfd0/3g3/sOsRGn8oSGCpiZzDk7fDoA/h3/CJ4s-Cd7zd5GMRoIw6UseMR39nzqqFYJfaY4OX-Eruo)

body:
Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIZd66XrbsR47WYkw5cIJZ-_sywAJPa0FoHjWRFLkG8ePHYY_L4mP6lU7RgjPa7rM_Ll7PlTYbqiEUG6rZjqGtDKLf6JBvmFdylFCiwpliKig3H_mVfunZ9BFQksON_TEQ5V8YZCKSQUf2IiWFH4dIKRxAlfvL6gy8sWMkZY-YqYRhQFPghjnJ5R8o-vtT-r3WTOX7h1WO97O-YpopoyZnpOw5VCzZk-aVS7PF0k5atenOzoKVs_EwIvKY08Cb1UiKB1ACyeZ70KPQFcf0pVLsF2IQZkGKvid_eK6w-Fkjb4x/3g3/GIYa6VGOTfilsQ5FN_YnOg/h0/K0fLXXTWa-Bh3tqMSVp40mXsONXpb_-jnxg1VonSM7c)
Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because **Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate.** [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIZd66XrbsR47WYkw5cIJZ-92UjrK3IG2YKAUSeXmk0Ub6763jBjz47umNJ3KKUGzmoipVdIaQbyndDoEAwuKz8E8lNidYevbpskGyaVS_AwKLQjPqOzp7u-AaTZdAjRTUaIc9UoMjTf8i5NdLu8eUENlLxL_1Dg1OdirSI-qyxLb4w9sckevBYIt8iq1gQ8OgACMIXN8ZGYGzn4ho1uUGeIOIlNZlhtGrOhRaMXqhvGzU4UA43O8Scf7RF2EerYy5iRIViUS0h9KmYVbaUNMOA3ibOR0nrzFfFqUOTUIMdeJ/3g3/GIYa6VGOTfilsQ5FN_YnOg/h1/pYlaXiqzSpQB4fyBTpa-6KB9czxT3U4g5i8m5gCXLfg) I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought.

I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP _permanently_. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight.

**[So I have to ask you humbly and directly because outlets like CNN say my race could decide Senate control: will you split a donation of $25 or more between Common Good VA and my campaign to help me win in Florida and defeat Marco Rubio? I’m still short of my $50,000 midnight goal, so contributing whatever amount you can will really help my campaign right now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIZd66XrbsR47WYkw5cIJZ-9vSI3RhGswSGdAtP6ZpR5F2u0iYBtsHjMKivBMjPYws90zNGLk2ZUsORHPdjEbDgS4dl0eqW42nEvESLSFwb_Blet2Y0u_R7j2UjcOVa68AfB81WymHJtNMsncam22QiuQWtSzzKXaPt3CqznOUguySKCM3M4TB2vC9meBqRWfb7n3ds4YooxJOriNlbuWWCQzPJQihbCLuclyMlYEvmPEHgxK84ai32MkrnkpcGPu8NibqHAsJG0TBmQUbO441Rfa1pgFlN7C0LuTNO0MoUmHvhEfFnkOvHmKTahtCyEE1A/3g3/GIYa6VGOTfilsQ5FN_YnOg/h2/x3EvOm2CH6BF-yvOEzMJ3TUF15tBcC-NVFmgYQkhsfo)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIZd66XrbsR47WYkw5cIJZ-9vSI3RhGswSGdAtP6ZpR5Fcz1tJ7giozQqscwTUtLRDJYYaCpzCE1OGhhXiENlPTUTvjg3PgNNE08PY626LRkxIvS5lHqmkJVP0b1PyAX73qcxiiFBJy3u_eoo0yavRHhS-XQqOtEiHfTZuvKINjC8wsa5_YfDESuZYXv33IyRsJlfHo0QsFhK7bgAgCOoMbS63jpr-JpuxWYc8p7J5bD6ir88V3xAG98vbbDglx2GpMFlfGR4xgLB9sl1YW663vp41W6l2P4iHU7nWpOwpfd-Aavttzvp0sdooedjVvfG6w/3g3/GIYa6VGOTfilsQ5FN_YnOg/h3/In2tKwkKKiP30E28ZvYOmOWw9G5JAP9eaEvcHuBAniQ)

clean_body: Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. | | | Hi, Derek. I'm sorry for popping into your inbox like this – but I'm leaning on my strongest supporters because Republicans are trying to PERMANENTLY keep Florida red and flip the Senate. I'm fighting to defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic majority in the Senate – but I just found out that the Republican National Committee is investing at least $10 MILLION in on-the-ground organizers to keep Florida RED for decades. I can’t bear the thought. I'll give it to you straight, Derek: GOP leaders are saying that registering 60,000 more Republican voters could hand Florida to the GOP permanently. I'm not giving up on Florida – but with Republicans pouring money into this race, I need to make critical investments right now. And I cannot afford to make those investments if I miss my critical $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal tonight. I can't thank you enough for your support. Congresswoman Val Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

Peter,

By now, you may have heard the news that President Trump has formally endorsed my campaign for the United States Senate! I've known the President for a long time, and I'm proud to call him my friend.

In case you missed my email announcing the President's support, let me quickly recap for you what he had to say in his endorsement release:

| _"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."_ - President Donald J. Trump
---

Now, while I'm very grateful for President Trump's support of my campaign, the truth of the matter is that I won't get anywhere on my own. name: Texas Right to Life
subject: They’re trying to stop us.
body:
| | Friend,

**The abortion industry may be celebrating this morning after a federal judge halted the enforcement of the boldest abortion law in the nation** – but we are not giving up this fight.

The Texas Heartbeat Act is the **STRONGEST** law in America that defends life and defends the unborn. A federal judge has stepped in to STOP Texans’ ability to enforce this law. _We won’t give up that easily._**Texas Right to Life will CONTINUE to fight to protect the unborn.**

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign, Recall, Replace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Will you join Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. In supporting our campaign to take back our schools from the radical socialist Left? [**_We need your help as we launch a nationwide effort to replace socialist, anti-American school board members with Patriots. Will you please support us?_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r) For too long, the Left has worked to infiltrate schools and indoctrinate our kids with hateful "critical race theory" lessons. **As you may know, Critical Race Theory or "CRT" teaches our children to ****hate****our country,****hate****our history, and****hate****our American values. ** It's being taught in every state across the nation, and it MUST be stopped. If we're not careful, we will soon wake up in a country run by the generation that was trained by their teachers to hate America. And they'll work to destroy everything our country stands for. And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. **_But in the process, we 've neglected smaller local races - like school board - that are often not publicized._** One of the reasons these races get overlooked is that they're discussed as "non-partisan." What that means is radical leftists get to quietly slip into a position of power and waste your tax dollars on "equity" equity consultants and train your children and grandchildren to HATE America. That's the bad news: our nation is under assault by the left, and our children are their number one target. But here's the good news. We can and will stop the radical left from corrupting the minds of an entire generation. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards and ensure that our children are taught to love and respect America. **Here 's my ****_3R 's Campaign Battle Plan:_****_ _** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from officed **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. [_**But we can 't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC ahead of the 40+ November elections we're targeting?**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r) Now, you may not be familiar with me... But you're almost certainly familiar with Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and/or Donald Trump Jr. They know how effective the 1776 Project PAC will be, and you can take their word for it! **> >>> Tucker Carlson:**** "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** _ _ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people." **> >>> Laura Ingraham:****** "For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists - help is on the way - a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.:****** "The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of is kinds - specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we "lit a fire" that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the **1776 Project PAC.** **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [_**Help us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, and $100.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r) In closing, my friend Tucker Carlson said "If you're thinking of writing a check to [another group] maybe you should pause and send it to Ryan Girdusky instead." With your help, we will rid our schools of hateful Critical Race Theory by ridding our school boards of radical left-wing activists who despise our Country, our Constitution, and our Conservative American values. Sincerely, Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. [_**Will you invest in the future of our country by making a generous contribution to the 1776 Project PAC as we fight to Resign, Recall, or Replace far-left indoctrinators? **_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r) [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58509561:J0M_o-2zN:m:1:3253819041:7DF5B89F85A775B8F7382A341EE4463C:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

| | Derek,

I’m going to level with you: Trump-backed candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, poses the biggest threat to Virginia’s progress in a generation.

If he wins, that’s the ball game. Everything from Virginia’s health care to our freedom to vote will be in danger.

Derek, we have to make sure Terry McAuliffe has everything he needs to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin.

**[It's already October, Derek. We're running out of time to stop Trump and Youngkin -- can you chip in right now and do your part?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37446445/311122089/1097049879?refcode=20211012.1_JC_10CI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM3MzY3My00OTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wS5UwQIwoaN1Ue-VxZcEZ-c_NxHarAZTl5jHuhBeMSc=)**

Here’s another sad fact. Youngkin winning ain’t just bad for Virginia, it’s a nightmare for America.

Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin and Glenn is shouting that endorsement from the rooftops. In fact, Youngkin is so much like Trump that folks are starting to call him “Glenn Trumpkin.”

Look, I don’t care what you call him. All I care about is what election experts are calling Virginia: a toss-up and 2021’s most important race.

Derek, we worked too damn hard to fire Donald Trump for us to let him resurrect his political career by helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s next Governor.

**[I’m counting on you to do your part to stop them. Youngkin is planning on spending $75 million of his own money to win and any contribution, no matter the amount, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37446446/311122091/1097049879?refcode=20211012.1_JC_10CI&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM3MzY3My00OTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wS5UwQIwoaN1Ue-VxZcEZ-c_NxHarAZTl5jHuhBeMSc=)**

clean_body: Trump’s endorsement is a wake up call for all of us. | | | = | | Derek, I’m going to level with you: Trump-backed candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, poses the biggest threat to Virginia’s progress in a generation. If he wins, that’s the ball game. Everything from Virginia’s health care to our freedom to vote will be in danger. Derek, we have to make sure Terry McAuliffe has everything he needs to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin. = Here’s another sad fact. Youngkin winning ain’t just bad for Virginia, it’s a nightmare for America. Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin and Glenn is shouting that endorsement from the rooftops. In fact, Youngkin is so much like Trump that folks are starting to call him “Glenn Trumpkin.” Look, I don’t care what you call him. All I care about is what election experts are calling Virginia: a toss-up and 2021’s most important race. Derek, we worked too damn hard to fire Donald Trump for us to let him resurrect his political career by helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s next Governor. = Thanks, James Carville | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Kevin Hern
subject: “Zero dollars”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Stop America from becoming a socialist nation! Read more >>>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/7f8662be035fe037c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, On September 24th, President Biden told reporters, “We talk about price tags. It is zero price tag on the debt. We’re paying —we’re going to pay for everything we spend. _”The next day, the official POTUS Twitter account tweeted this:_ [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/d9e8a3653b169505c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Only someone completely out-of-touch with how money works could claim that a $3.5 TRILLION boondoggle of a spending bill will cost “zero dollars.” If it costs zero dollars, why are the Democrats pressuring Congress to raise the debt ceiling? **I cannot stress this enough — WE MUST STOP THIS PLAN FROM GOING THROUGH.** If Biden’s liberal wish list passes, it will be the largest tax increase in America in 50 years. It will be the largest expansion of the federal government since the New Deal. It will bring about a cradle-to-grave welfare state that will be impossible to reverse. I’m working with my Republican colleagues in Washington to block the Build Back Better bill and we need your help, Peter. Please rush a donation to help us fight this, and save America from total socialism! [**DONATE $5 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/b63e99d6f49bd680c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**DONATE $10 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/fdd376426b4e39c3c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**DONATE $25 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/9d048a3443936972c3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**DONATE $50 NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/bb5564ae740c9a4fc3d6b838967d376c/34143) [**DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/22e1848bd66cc3f8c3d6b838967d376c/34143) We cannot afford this “zero dollars” bill. Think of it this way: If they’re willing to lie to you about how much it costs, are they also willing to lie about what’s in it? This is not infrastructure. It’s a huge grab by the federal government to take over more of your liberties and freedoms. They must be stopped. Please join me in the fight. For our future,
Kevin Hern | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/36cd69f76c71a1dfc3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f98fa0c6d8b810c9/53ca2de4940367e9c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

name: Team Durbin
subject: Sign on now to protect reproductive rights across the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
With the constitutional right to safe, legal abortion at risk, Dick Durbin and Senate Democrats are working to codify these protections into federal law. Every person in this country should have the right to choose, and we need to step up and keep defending it.
#
Peter,
**Texas’ S.B. 8 abortion ban is wrong.** And while a federal judge last week temporarily put the ban on pause, this fight is almost certain to reach the Supreme Court, which has already allowed the ban to go into effect once before.
With the constitutional right to safe, legal abortion at risk, Dick Durbin and Senate Democrats are working to codify these protections into federal law. Every person in this country should have the right to choose, and we need to step up and keep defending it
**[We need to speak out and protect the right to choose. Sign on now to show the extreme Republicans across the country that we won’t stop fighting for our reproductive rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37458389/311161181/331209380?ms=dd_em_211012_1&refcode=dd_em_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBlMTJlMy02NzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOQtVgJ3WbXNYRfWA6Am8tsd-NfyGfJzhrIjrP_SSOg=&emci=5a5ac48f-ae2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b70e12e3-672b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=2727974).**
The GOP cannot claim to stand for personal freedom while pushing archaic anti-abortion laws.
With the Supreme Court set to hear another case out of Mississippi, the future of Roe v. Wade and abortion rights could be hanging in the balance. Now is the time for us to use our voices.
**[Add your name now: let’s protect reproductive rights for everyone across our nation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37458390/311161182/331209380?ms=dd_em_211012_1&refcode=dd_em_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzBlMTJlMy02NzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SOQtVgJ3WbXNYRfWA6Am8tsd-NfyGfJzhrIjrP_SSOg=&emci=5a5ac48f-ae2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=b70e12e3-672b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=2727974)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: I need your help on Thursday

name: Team Franchot
subject: Peter’s Plan for Healthcare
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Hi Peter,
We want to make sure that you’ve had a chance to sign our petition that the next Governor of Maryland needs to take bold action to reduce the cost of prescription drugs and expand access to affordable, quality coverage for all Marylanders. Below, we’re going to tell you more about Peter Franchot’s plan to do just that -- but if you’re short on time, click here to add your name to our petition to help us send the message that our healthcare system needs an urgent revamp. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2]
Despite our state being home to nation-leading healthcare providers, hundreds of thousands of Marylanders continue to live without health insurance. There are many more who are under-insured, or who are unable to afford the cost of services even with insurance.
Peter Franchot believes that no Marylander should have to choose between life-saving medications and putting food on the table -- especially during this once-in-a-generation crisis. That’s why as our next Governor, he’s going to lower the costs of healthcare and expand affordable primary and preventive care.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2]Peter’s healthcare policy will be centered on the principle that social determinants of health are the most significant inputs to the health outcomes for Marylanders. That’s why he’ll prioritize funding for primary and preventive care that proactively reduces chronic health conditions that lead to hospitalization, and will take a holistic approach to improve outcomes in other areas of life that impact our health -- including housing insecurity, lack of adequate transportation, and access to healthy foods.
For those who require more advanced care, Peter Franchot will also explore an expansion of the Prescription Drug Affordability Board to full coverage of the existing market to drive down the costs of live-saving prescription medications.
Other key aspects of Peter’s detailed plan for healthcare include:
*
Piloting
an
expansion
of
Medicaid
coverage
to
more
Maryland
residents,
and
incentives
for
more
providers
to
serve
this
population;
*
Piloting
an
expansion
of
Maryland’s
total
cost
of
care
model
for
the
commercial
insurance
market
to
control
the
ever
rising
cost
of
premiums,
make
insurance
cheaper,
and
get
better
outcomes;
and
*
An
aggressive
communications
campaign
that
informs
Medicare
and
Medicaid
eligible
Marylanders
of
their
eligibility,
as
far
too
many
Marylanders
qualify
for
coverage,
but
do
not
utilize
it.
We are asking you to stand with Peter in the fight to expand access to affordable, quality healthcare for all Marylanders. If you agree that we need to reduce the cost of prescription drugs and expand affordable, quality care, will you add your name to our petition? We’re looking to get 600 signatures from grassroots supporters to help us send the strong message that we need to improve our healthcare system. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xcOagktg4EWPVWyeLClVjQ2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em100221]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/164aec36-b71b-ec11-981f-501ac57ba3ed/d64c0013-6d2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjRjMDAxMy02ZDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Lw4bFNWK-vornAQinJLe4s68ythiErUpuGSJ7HEC9E=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

body:
Here’s our theory of the case on how we replace Kyrsten Sinema with a progressive.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37459832/311166459/-992818974?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhNGMwMDEzLTZkMmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bu780yQHK0EoJjAGOFdDAE2SS9Kna18a8JlqPBe9udg=)

Friends -
Here’s our theory of the case on how we replace Kyrsten Sinema with a progressive.
1. People contribute to the Ruben Gallego Draft Fund.
2. Because the money goes to Ruben the day he announces, the more money in the fund, the more likely Ruben is to run.
3. The more money in the fund, the better the chance he has of starting strong and beating Kyrsten Sinema.

So that’s it — give to the Draft Ruben Fund, he’ll be more likely to run and win. That’s why we’re asking:
[**Can you please make a contribution — of any amount you can afford — to Draft Ruben Gallego for Senate? All donations will go to Ruben the day he announces.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37459838/311166473/-992818974?refcode=em121012-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVhNGMwMDEzLTZkMmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bu780yQHK0EoJjAGOFdDAE2SS9Kna18a8JlqPBe9udg=)

Charles’ Republican opponent Dan Bishop was one of the 147 Republicans in the House of Representatives that voted _against_ certifying the results of the 2020 presidential election -- spreading Trump’s “Big Lie,” which ultimately led to the violent insurrection at our nation’s Capitol.
North Carolina -- and America -- deserves better than Dan Bishop, whose cowardly acts proves his loyalties lie with the twice-impeached former President Donald Trump rather than his own constituents.
Nothing will intimidate Dan Bishop and the GOP more than a long list of supporters stepping up early on. We can show our opponents our strength in numbers, and the more everyday people we have to endorse Charles, the stronger our movement will be.

name: Citizens for Turner
subject: Mike Turner 4th Quarter Kickoff
body:
I need your support now more than ever
| | | | | [[Click here to unsubscribe]](https://app.icontact.com/icp/mmail-mprofile.php?r=126057447&l=64880&s=NE1B&m=1008383&c=493811)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Friends, I need your support now more than ever. Last November, you made your voices and votes heard, sending me back to DC **with over 58% of the vote**. This week marks the start of the 4th Quarter for fundraising and it is a critical time to prepare for next November. I have no doubt Nancy Pelosi and the Left will **try again to buy this seat with loads of money from outside the community** , and _we cannot allow that to happen_.
---
| | | | | [Protect our voice in Congress!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008383&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2F4th-quarter-kickoff%3Fexitintent%3Dtrue&cf=64880&v=88da63910a67059ac42855c156a82608dfc8bfb9b97f0dbee2f60547a7d0e2e7)
---
| | | | In this Congress, I was able to secure a **pay increase for our men and women in uniform** , as well as significant funding for Wright-Patterson Air Force Base. With your continued financial support, **I will continue to produce results for our community.** I am honored to represent you in the US House of Representatives. You trusted me to be your voice in Congress and it is a responsibility I do not take lightly. I am grateful for the opportunity to fight for you. Can I count on your support as we prepare for the 2022 election cycle?
---
| | | | | [Support Mike here!!](https://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=126057447&msgid=1008383&act=NE1B&c=493811&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fturner%2F4th-quarter-kickoff%3Fexitintent%3Dtrue&cf=64880&v=88da63910a67059ac42855c156a82608dfc8bfb9b97f0dbee2f60547a7d0e2e7)
---
| | | | Thank you, Congressman Michael R. Turner
---

| | | |

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE TUESDAY, OCTOBER 12, 2021 MEAGAN HANSON, ONE OF GOP'S MOST PROMISING CANDIDATES, TAPPED TO JOIN NRCC "YOUNG GUNS" PROGRAM ATLANTA - Today, Meagan Hanson, conservative candidate running to unseat liberal Democrat Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th Congressional District, was [announced](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pdKiEF21v9M0JVybaRkudtM0M0zC8WGOC4-37YA7tmRM8uYRlDekq_eaiSBIvb72cEPFTaBDbiL2aap2iHko0g37ql6S3bUyiaBLNzz3ZffViVpUdujB9g845FgfEU7HS25zbiwgDWguJqQ2Qt1jYDJynX4h3HX2sc-ax6TTDAXa1BHjATChzXHEECaCop7lTVG8zNha8mYxLJeCfpJtoHd3Ilhh_1nqLbDp4g2dCyogL559DatCiP2CZjaQAiU0&c=PzijDd7UBp4eqv5eGvtP-FnQY0ILHwB_kKot3LuO1vKCJNZh1zJCoQ==&ch=1hwnfKuQuWxqU3oJigCp-kSFa0GOojeCowHNHGRmR5NZ_vYNDMA8iA==) as one of the National Republican Congressional Committee's "Young Guns" for the 2022 cycle. The "Young Guns" program, led by GOP Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy, is an exclusive program that helps equip promising Republican candidates across the country with the tools they need to run winning campaigns. Hanson is one of just 32 candidates nationwide who was selected to join the "Young Guns" program ahead of next year's midterm elections. "It's a tremendous honor to be recognized by Leader McCarthy and the NRCC for our efforts to take back Georgia's 6th Congressional District," said Hanson. "My team and I are working around the clock to oust Liberal Lucy McBath, take back the House Majority, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. Clearly, Republican leaders have recognized my campaign as one of the top organizations in the nation - and with their full support, we'll be even better positioned to deliver a big victory next November and restore conservative leadership to Washington, D.C." "Our movement is more united, energized, and passionate than I've ever seen it," said Republican Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy. "I'm proud to welcome these candidates to the Young Guns program and I look forward to working together to not only take the House -- but to build a lasting Republican majority." ### Press Contact: media@meaganhanson.com

**“Republicans pull nearly even with Democrats in number of registered voters in Florida” - _Miami Herald_**

On top of that, inflation continues to rise faster and faster. We are seeing prices go up at gas pumps and grocery stores because of failed leadership that we have in Joe Biden and Michael Bennet.

clean_body: Tonight’s deadline is a big one | | | = | | Derek, I know you understand how serious this race is for Virginia and America’s future. That’s why I’m so stunned that we haven’t gotten enough support to reach tonight’s fundraising goal! Let me remind you why tonight is so important, Derek. We are exactly 3 weeks from Election Day, and polling shows a tied race. The final filing deadline of the campaign is just 10 days away and we have to reach our goal of raising $3 million online to have the resources we need for the campaign homestretch. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = I really can’t overstate the importance of your support, Derek. Every dollar we raise helps us reach one more voter with our positive message for Virginia's future — and in a race this close, every single vote makes a huge difference. Polls show a lot of Virginia voters are still undecided, so we need your help to keep our ads on the air and our organizing team on the doors. = Thank you for everything, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zukfoqffovkklrctebr3qh8qttkl1020pmjr3090_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1im4o75c5h2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z72633jnjgve43rdm6vd2s6hi50r1pt0a1q2t1uo_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1im4o75c5h2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkbs9lvlpkcab2vvsqc6613j819l5gmdohg0mr00_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1im4o75c5h2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze9nuh5bknng2t0k306ptl394jethsveopvisqqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1im4o75c5h2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5mr280ldfc773n4p9j9vcme9sms8ijfgnt59ed8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1im4o75c5h2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjrlesegpnj3mm98tugbt01tos9j5dj62jouvr6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1im4o75c5h2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: the odds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37464629/311176756/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20211012_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjUzYjRiMy03MzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-8Z1HQ5TyWvbf1IwG8y8JcZEyQEj2J7QloulI7Hdig=&emci=713ff9ec-662b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=5f53b4b3-732b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, to be frank, the odds are stacked against Democrats in the upcoming midterm elections. That’s why defending the seats we already hold is so important — especially in New Mexico’s nearly all-blue congressional delegation. Every day I fight to make life better for the people of New Mexico alongside my fellow Democratic colleagues, Senator Ben Ray Luján and Representatives Melanie Stansbury and Teresa Leger Fernandez. Our work is rooted in New Mexico. Together, we’ve helped secure over $5 million in mental health resources for New Mexico’s youth and over $7 million to help the Albuquerque International Sunport build zero and low-emission infrastructure. And that’s just the start. We all also treasure New Mexico’s public lands and want to preserve our state’s natural resources for future generations. It’s why we’re doing everything we can to reduce air pollution, protect water resources, and act on climate. **When Ben Ray Luján, Melanie Stansbury, Teresa Leger Fernandez, and I come together, we punch above our weight and deliver tangible results for New Mexicans and the whole country.** But the midterms are on the horizon. That’s why it’s so important we keep New Mexico blue so we can keep up our work to make life better for folks in our state. **[Friend, can you pitch in to fuel the work of New Mexico’s federal Democratic leadership? clean_body: Folks, to be frank, the odds are stacked against Democrats in the upcoming midterm elections. That’s why defending the seats we already hold is so important — especially in New Mexico’s nearly all-blue congressional delegation. Every day I fight to make life better for the people of New Mexico alongside my fellow Democratic colleagues, Senator Ben Ray Luján and Representatives Melanie Stansbury and Teresa Leger Fernandez. Our work is rooted in New Mexico. Together, we’ve helped secure over $5 million in mental health resources for New Mexico’s youth and over $7 million to help the Albuquerque International Sunport build zero and low-emission infrastructure. And that’s just the start. We all also treasure New Mexico’s public lands and want to preserve our state’s natural resources for future generations. It’s why we’re doing everything we can to reduce air pollution, protect water resources, and act on climate. When Ben Ray Luján, Melanie Stansbury, Teresa Leger Fernandez, and I come together, we punch above our weight and deliver tangible results for New Mexicans and the whole country. But the midterms are on the horizon. That’s why it’s so important we keep New Mexico blue so we can keep up our work to make life better for folks in our state. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will immediately be split between Ben Ray Luján, Melanie Stansbury, Teresa Leger Fernandez, and Martin Heinrich: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Whether it’s simply reading this email or chipping in any amount you can afford, it means a great deal to me and my fellow New Mexico Democrats. name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Don’t let teachers' unions bully you
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1skfemghjcvt0qdd1cro8oc2bsr123cmotl0cc0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbobct5gc1h68pb0ssrredpgm5j34pb3eeoeedtlcpge1d1metge0slhelgeacbgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imhj38p5lmorr4c366hgb4ohme8gq48bi4bh28or6c5g6apj1c1g649fg)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7l9g1t0gv715gdl4bmji8g9oi964mredd9e4bo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbbjgohjv3r99q12h2biv2jnm3n4crrld7lh8b20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z55fiorhap1bl3p2nv6tmvktluvrph3rb8h0hv70_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq1ru646v5kba9btskifkld5ui61s46tlue9o1h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z22h0srhsqk88c4m22m8m4r2d39jn6tg23ffubcg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zat6kg1s8jhqkfslui57vi4iiaqil8htuv3spe7g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9orbi28tfrl41rcc34en3cdis1tnkcphvd4rq5g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z37h7s5mj303te1j28n2mp3m42kguhj0u93mq6og_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z44ok3ovf06tn7u9m227v6flird3uhuoc8jifn20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg1cbkbkkgou0ff1bh7sgtpsbi21hjsjfaeq34do_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h2bs)
---|---|---|---|---

4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z19bititmabv2733tdlj5tm29a4vo3f66gkvr8ko_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1imcob0c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Chuck Grassley just announced he will seek an EIGHTH term, but Iowans are ready for new leadership – and Democrat Abby Finkenauer is ready to defeat him. This is our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue, and if Abby wins, it will all but guarantee Democratic control of the Senate. = But with Sen. Grassley so vulnerable and our Senate majority on the line, Mitch McConnell and the GOP establishment are ready to shell out millions to keep him in power. The Senate campaign arm of the GOP already has more than $25 million in the bank dedicated to taking back the Senate and stopping challengers like Abby. That's why Abby's team has set a rapid response fundraising goal of $10,000 before midnight TONIGHT – but with just a few hours left, she's still dangerously short of her goal. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Roger Marshall
subject: The media is censoring me for fighting vax mandates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
96
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back-
email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf
Friend — Liberal hacks, like the Associated Press and others,
are running hit pieces to censor and silence me.

Radicals in the media
are after me for one reason and one reason only: I’m a Doctor, and they
see me as a threat to their one-size-fits-all approach to dealing with
this virus — one handed down from bureaucrats, “experts,” and
politicians trying to control our lives.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf We're
not sitting idly by. We’re fighting back, and we won’t be silenced —
can I count on you to stand with us? Rush a donation now.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf RUSH MY
DONATION » I’ve been inoculated, my family has been inoculated, and
I’ve encouraged Kansans and Americans to get the vaccine.

But
natural immunity needs to be recognized. So does the fact that the
vaccine is a choice between you and your doctor.

And under NO
circumstances should the federal government be in the business of
imposing mandates to control our lives, cripple small businesses, and
dishonorably discharge veterans who choose not to get the vaccine.
It TERRIFIES the media and the Swamp that there’s a Doctor in the U.S.
Senate who’s not afraid to challenge them.

They’re going to do
everything they can to silence me — but with your help, we won’t be
silenced. We’ll continue standing strong for the Constitution. And
we’ll end the ridiculous overreach and mandates.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf Can I
count on you? Donate now.

Thank you for standing with us.
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf Senator
Roger Marshall
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf RUSH MY
DONATION »
https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/will-you-help-fight-back
-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021oct12hf Doc is
defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our
faith.

He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he
can't get it done without your help.

We know we send a lot of
emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the
key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a
difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or
unsubscribe, http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=ccd583995d706c4d click here.

This message was sent
to dpwillis67@gmail.com by:

Kansans for Marshall

PO Box 1588

Great Bend, KS
67530

PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL

name: Joan Greene
subject: Bold Vision, Common Sense Solutions and Compassion
body:
I want to share with you my thoughts about running for Phoenix City Council in 2022.

| | | | |
---
| | [](https://joangreeneaz.lt.acemlnc.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZqb2FuZ3JlZW5lYXouY29tJTJG&sig=52rw3FFYGwKvAUNjaJEQvrzPeiacMWQcLSWp1ddbwCVM&iat=1634062891&a=66715302&account=joangreeneaz%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=f4c37e1e8c793c25028af187405f72b3&i=221A232A1A2423)
---
| | Hi,

Recently I was interviewed by David Gordon from Blog for Arizona about running for Phoenix City Council District Six. I shared my visions on building a better tomorrow for our families and businesses.

Over the next three days, I’d like to share pieces of that interview with you.

Today, we begin with a brief introduction including what I’m running on and who I am:

**What I Am Running On:** It's time to stop the division, stop the political bickering and move our city forward with a bold vision, common-sense solutions, and compassion.
**Who I Am:** Phoenix native, successful business person, community volunteer and animal rescue activist. If I am elected to succeed the retiring Sal DiCiccio I will stand for safety, security, and our Arizona values.
I am committed to:

* Helping the homeless and reducing their numbers.
* Promoting expanded attainable and healthy housing.
* Fostering workplace development and small business assistance.
* Fighting corruption.
* Supporting public safety and law enforcement accountability.
* Championing clean energy sustainable infrastructure and fighting rises in pollution.
* Expanding community infrastructure such as increased bike lanes, expanded shading for bus stops and parks, and well-maintained sidewalks and community parks.

David started off asking me the reasons I am running and what are my qualifications:

1) **What are at least two reasons you want to run for a term on the Phoenix City Council?**

_"I am running for Phoenix City Council because the current health, economic and political crisis has made it clear to all of us local elections matter. I am passionate and focused on the needs of the community and I am a problem solver. I know I can make a positive difference in our District and have a city that is inclusive for all."___

2) **What are at least two qualifications you have to serve on the Phoenix City Council?**
****
_"I am a Phoenix native. I grew up and live in District Six.____
_
_I have seen firsthand how Phoenix has grown and changed. The neighborhood where I grew up used to have fruit orchards. Now the SR 51 runs through it. When I moved to Ahwatukee in 1993, the corner of Ray and I-10 was literally a dump. We didn’t have stores or homes west of the freeway for miles. Obviously, that is no longer the case, but we do need additional housing that include safe communities, development for the change in community needs and to protect our environment.
___
__ _I built a 34-year business that started with only $500 which was enough to buy business cards and stationery. I know the dreams and struggles of those who want their American dream. I can help with reducing red-tape and ideas how to strengthen their business.___
__
_My clients range from small by design businesses to billion-dollar corporations. They work with me because when they have a problem, I can help solve it.___
__ _In the late ’60s, my grandmother was the second woman to be elected to Phoenix City Council. From a young age, I was taught the value of public service and community-building.___
__
_My real-life examples show the importance of knowing the history of the community and I have the proven skills to solve the problems of today and tomorrow. I have a bold vision, common-sense solutions, and compassion to solve our daunting challenges which will move District Six to a better future."___
****
Stay tuned for Part 2 tomorrow where I talk about three of the important kitchen table issues the people of District Six are talking about.__
****
How long have you lived in AZ? Hit "Reply" on this email with your answer, I’d love to know!

Talk soon,

\- Joan Greene

****
---

name: Mary Vought
subject: Biden Declares War on Parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
body:
Fellow Patriot:

Like most parents, I'm done with politicians and
bureaucrats smuggling anti-American propaganda into our kids'
classrooms.

The un-scientific school closures and mask mandates
were bad enough. But now, teachers' unions, school boards, and
educrats are poisoning our children with Critical Race Theory,
the 1619 Project, Critical Gender Theory, and every other phony
lie they can sneak into a lesson plan.

That's why every SCF Senate candidate is opposed to
Critical Race Theory in our classrooms!

Parents have had enough. As you have seen across the
country, moms and dads are fighting back at school board
meetings. Americans are finally holding the CRT bagmen on the
school boards accountable for their lies and corruption. The tide
is turning. Citizens want their rights and our country back!

But now, the Swamp is striking back.

Joe Biden's Attorney General Merrick Garland ordered
the FBI to crack down on concerned parents! Leftist activists
want parents classified as "domestic terrorists" simply because
these parents don't want their kids' schools to become woke
re-education camps.

This is why we need true conservative fighters in
the Senate who will stop this tyranny!

Garland ordered the FBI to investigate mothers and
fathers concerned about their school boards lying to them, but it
gets worse. Now we know that the Attorney General's son-in-law
runs a pro-Critical Race Theory organization bankrolled by
Facebook's Mark Zuckerburg.

Are you ready to fight yet?

Washington Democrats believe the government exists
to protect elites from you. We think government exists to protect
you from them.

The Senate is split 50/50. Nominees like Merrick
Garland only get through because Establishment Republicans still
won't fight.

We need more fighters in the Senate - real
conservatives who understand the stakes.

That means we need you - your votes, your ideas,
your time, and your contributions. If the Left can brainwash our
children, our country is finished.

We have to fight back today. In the Senate. At
school board meetings. Everywhere!

Thank you for helping us stand up to the DOJ's
attack on parents and for doing so much to help fight for our
country's future.

Sincerely,

Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund

2022 SENATE CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave
SEWashington, DC 20003

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots
organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect
conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by
former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change
Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are
not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from
corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident
status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the
name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT
AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

body:

| | | Patriot,

We are often reminded that we live in the greatest country in the history of the world.

Do you agree?

Fill out this [quick survey](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=67912f2fa7&e=1050d051da) to **_help us show Democrats how much we love the USA._**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tina=20Ramirez=20for=20Parents?=
subject: Do you agree with Terry McAuliffe?
body:
We need to know. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=ff2d937227&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

Did you see what Terry McAuliffe said about our children in the gubernatorial debate?
“I don’t think parents should be telling schools what they should teach.”
\- Democrat Terry McAuliffe
Tina Ramirez knows that it is her right as a parent to decide what her daughter is taught.

But we want to know what you think, Friend. If you _agree_ that as a parent, it is YOUR right to have a say in what your children are taught, [**please sign our petition below**.](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=c036fe4671&e=ae0ea222da)

body:
I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t so important >>

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470890?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-swing-district-spartz-101221?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=e_swing_district_spartz_101221&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=5c39a597b9&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

I don’t need to tell you how destructive Joe Biden’s far-left agenda has been for our country.

That’s why it’s so important that we hold the line in Indiana and take back the House next year. And I can’t think of a more important race this year than the one in Indiana’s 5th Congressional District.

Located just north of Indianapolis, IN-5 has been trending towards the Democrats for years now. And conservative Victoria Spartz kept it red with just over 50% of the vote last year.

Now IN-5 is one of the Democrats’ TOP TARGETS in 2022, and I need your help to support Victoria in this fight. Will you rush an urgently needed donation of $5 or more today?

Hoosier Republican, we need a united Republican Congressional Delegation fighting for Hoosier values in Congress, and Victoria is a vital member of our team.

body:
We need to secure our borders. But that’s not all... | |
---
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=248a8894b6bc4ea299ca7cba7842d63b&_e=4lVKjb9S2aT-7uxrOJYkDKLm3k_m69csD4UfN5q1FMRPqmFy11RsgD1jwjjEhDaovHySC82K6i4RWFS_DqDzodTsgWySPpei1ukAUZf0VGYbahKVoZzb2W3IsESOuQC7V0LMOJFL0ULrnhrJRn0I3L2MIZQdgm_iXSfuGXWOu--QktSXt0kFipmREgZ1jSJZjQtVkAXcAPBmMkhT7aUd8xBH7SU50ctOMYlMDxX8sAHoNYfPlkXfF6mjen9zzCyrg4b6-grrQ52YXzDRiFn0ZBfueGnl3oBQ6iKzvSnqghzDH_nhc5zYBX_H5qQBXHDNWIU-nXhQc7c7ajdLM-tOttheENL4bmonwRQEt1yl37SCxVemXFVnktK1HK2tcOPHO54Z9KFVqJjo6oHrrnH_o9YdlODS-NxCoYpwQ1w_6d5DbJg1clea0-iBe3H7F-wf2NHSUlP-f0GYUgpCoae89koaSS0dFMvY8lWdht89wkSsU0m2Io4N_VnA7USE2zHS)
|
---
|
---
Peter,

Biden’s Border Crisis is out of control. He would know that if he bothered to visit our southern border and see for himself...

**_But he hasn’t._**

Instead, he’s hiding away in his basement, attacking the brave law enforcement agents trying to defend our border!

**Our leaders have a responsibility to keep Americans SAFE.****That means securing our borders, ending illegal immigration, banning sanctuary cities, and creating a fair and common-sense immigration system in our country.**

I’m sick of these politicians that leave our border defenseless and make our country weaker, that's why I’m stepping up and running for Congress. But Peter, the road to Congress is long, and I need your FULL SUPPORT on this journey.

**Will you _[chip in $10 today](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=248a8894b6bc4ea299ca7cba7842d63b&_e=4lVKjb9S2aT-7uxrOJYkDKLm3k_m69csD4UfN5q1FMRPqmFy11RsgD1jwjjEhDaovHySC82K6i4RWFS_DqDzodTsgWySPpei1ukAUZf0VGYbahKVoZzb2W3IsESOuQC7V0LMOJFL0ULrnhrJRn0I3L2MIZQdgm_iXSfuGXWOu--QktSXt0kFipmREgZ1jSJZjQtVkAXcAPBmMkhT7aUd8xBH7SU50ctOMYlMDxX8sAHoNYfPlkXfF6mjen9zzCyrg4b6-grrQ52YXzDRiFn0ZBfueGnl3oBQ6iKzvSnqghwKdVP0RCi_GJModFIzmG9d2w5cgMl-zVeTI1QuT5Zq4_6nlYsMNkEO_J5DH2CdY4hy3pUdIvDJ3YxP_4ki5TDnL5xTewKjKZPL0S3USO_iaftOvA0ryNhwJOfiMsbvw8no5ba4xVyJTGTarlT7MYg9BpN9pV3GTPwtBlFgnOTblWZBWldzrOBAzuEV4fU2bljaLMZKoGEAOHiMfvGWuG9u)_ to let me know that I can count on you?**
[**> > CLICK HERE TO MAKE A DONATION <<**](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=248a8894b6bc4ea299ca7cba7842d63b&_e=4lVKjb9S2aT-7uxrOJYkDKLm3k_m69csD4UfN5q1FMRPqmFy11RsgD1jwjjEhDaovHySC82K6i4RWFS_DqDzodTsgWySPpei1ukAUZf0VGYbahKVoZzb2W3IsESOuQC7V0LMOJFL0ULrnhrJRn0I3L2MIZQdgm_iXSfuGXWOu--QktSXt0kFipmREgZ1jSJZjQtVkAXcAPBmMkhT7aUd8xBH7SU50ctOMYlMDxX8sAHoNYfPlkXfF6mjen9zzCyrg4b6-grrQ52YXzDRiFn0ZBfueGnl3oBQ6iKzvSnqghwCq_lL5RB3eiVG_3vLQE2RQTgXbfA0Uf0Qm1KykfJjecd7SznyVD5RiGqHsG602gKODsSJlC53hspqT25UunqZyFcLwe-9s7sqE0W8i5c6NYlk5bZ9u5tc7pCaFVPpgfIePt62bgGnOms2s59HwixlTwsJuKue6YmzBmPr3RAsPluP3e88-1f_1WynCEoTF_NE_j5CVcezCNgvnetFIItr)
Thank you for standing with me, Peter. Together, we can get things back on track and make sure American families are SAFE!

In freedom,
Harold

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: How to stop critical race theory
body:
In recent years, it has invaded our K-12 schools, workplaces, state and federal governments, and even the military.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zn70hoob50mq9vve62he8107j2000seqcsll7k58_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1hm0p34sph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqcdtjmpqj4srk65qb6t9j6toj79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onge2qnddlie9ib6cpgcprb5d9lciqm2oj2c9ge3chgcgp63d37mth62d3mchoe1puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75d366hgbbc30epgmcs3gm9h3csh5u)
| | | [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2znevo6canghfu6u81t3noc8viotv5tb7m63hbdn0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1hm0p34sph2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,
Critical race theory has taken our nation by storm.
For a long time, it had been mostly isolated to colleges and universities. But in recent years, it has invaded our K-12 schools, workplaces, state and federal governments, and even the military.
There’s a good chance that you—or your children—have encountered it. And there’s an even better chance that you didn’t realize it.
That’s because critical race theorists are really good at disguising their indoctrination. They use words like “diversity,” “equity,” and “inclusion” because those words sound harmless. And it can be easy for busy citizens—especially parents—to overlook such terms.
But those words have become key indicators of critical race theory. And they’re not the only ones.
That’s why I’m sending you this email today.
---
| | I’m told you are an American who is concerned about the level of indoctrination we are seeing in our nation. And I want to make sure you get a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation’s latest eBook, **_Knowing Critical Race Theory When You See It and Fighting It When You Can_**.
Inside this eBook, you’ll learn:
* What critical race theory is
* 5 ways you can spot it
* 4 practical things you can do to stop it

---

And also, I want to tell you that you are more than welcome to share it with your family and friends.
Critical race theory is growing. And it’s vital that we inform as many people as possible about the harm it causes.
So, please don’t wait. Use this link to get this important eBook right now: **[https://secured.heritage.org/critical-race-theory-ebook-offer/](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zlehmvc06f7laq2r9no2cvugdekqp8nb0j3afpa8_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1hm0p34sph2bs)**

name: Hugo Flores
subject: Happy Hispanic Heritage Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | I was born and raised in Sauk County, Wisconsin, the son of 1st generation Mexican Americans. I grew up listening to music by Jenni Rivera and going to Latino markets in Milwaukee. One day, when I was 10 years old, I saw a man on television. The man was Donald Trump. I listened to him speaking about Mexicans, about me, in such a nasty way that it stuck with me. At that point I didn’t know he’d become president, but I was terrified of him and his ideas.

He won that election off of fear and blame. His presidency has made many Americans angry, disgusted, and even hostile towards Mexican immigrants. Immigrants around here in rural Wisconsin help a lot more than one would think. Small family farms and cheesemakers need helpers and staff. A lot of these small businesses find their staff being made up of Latinos. Latinos help Wisconsin do what Wisconsin does best. I do not want to live in an America where I fear for myself and my family. I seek the same change I’ve looked for since I was 10.

We find ourselves unsatisfied with the state of our county. People like Donald Trump and Ron Johnson divide us and pit us against one another. Now is not the time for division and anarchy. We may never see eye-to-eye on everything, but we can still work together.

Around that same time, I started listening to the words of another man. This time the man, Bernie Sanders, spoke of hope, progress, and a future we could believe in. I was a naive little kid who thought everyone would agree with the good guy and Donald Trump would never lead our country. When the results of the 2016 Democratic Primary were in, I realized change is hard, change is slow, but change is possible.

Today, I see another person who is ready to bring change one step at a time. A man not afraid to accept people’s differences and is ready to fight for the people. That man is Tom Nelson. For years I’ve felt apathetic towards our government and our politicians. But as a high school sophomore, I’ve been inspired to get involved and continue the fight for change in my community. Tom Nelson is the change we need. He has stayed true to his beliefs and is willing to stick up for the people. Happy Hispanic Heritage Month!

Sincerely,
Hugo Flores

---
|
---

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Mobilizing my community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Over the weekend, our campaign had the amazing opportunity to table at a mass community event with some inspiring civic leaders. **We seized the moment and put on our organizer hats. In just a couple hours, we registered 15 people!** That may not seem like a lot now, but the more events we attend and host, the more folks get registered, and we get that much closer to flipping this district blue.
**Team Derek showed up loud and proud and had some transformational conversations like the true activists we are.** We know that in this district, there are thousands of people who aren’t registered to vote yet who are disenchanted or disinterested in politics because our elected officials have never properly served them. We’re talking to the folks who have never been registered and changing their minds.

**[That’s a really big deal, and it’s a huge part of our path to victory. Will you chip in so we can expand our voter registration program?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37469296/311201431/-1802129321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg0YWM3ZS04NjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLZrqW5ggtqpXiW-fBSMb-yYbxY_LLe14pP1IdS71TY=)**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37469299/311201432/-1802129321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg0YWM3ZS04NjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLZrqW5ggtqpXiW-fBSMb-yYbxY_LLe14pP1IdS71TY=)

That’s why this race is changing the game: because I’m running not just as a Democrat, but as a staunch progressive. **I’m not afraid to champion the big, bold ideas we need** to modernize our infrastructure here in California’s 8th and start delivering on accessible healthcare, climate action, affordable housing, and good-paying jobs.**And when I talk about those ideas, people listen.** That’s why it’s crucial we can sustain our voter registration efforts.

**[I need support from folks like you if we’re going to continue hosting more and bigger voter registration drives. Can you contribute today to fund our mission?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37469301/311201435/-1802129321?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTg0YWM3ZS04NjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QLZrqW5ggtqpXiW-fBSMb-yYbxY_LLe14pP1IdS71TY=)**

In Solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**

We’re talking to the folks who have never been registered and changing their minds. = = That’s why this race is changing the game: because I’m running not just as a Democrat, but as a staunch progressive. I’m not afraid to champion the big, bold ideas we need to modernize our infrastructure here in California’s 8th and start delivering on accessible healthcare, climate action, affordable housing, and good-paying jobs.And when I talk about those ideas, people listen. That’s why it’s crucial we can sustain our voter registration efforts. = In Solidarity, Derek Marshall * = Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress. P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • tel:\(760\ 486-2416)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Re: The most vulnerable Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.
_Sponsored message_
|
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z27v184r32n5uoljm7nt2uk80gj6upkh1sve2m98_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1hm8or4c3h2bs)

---
Fellow American,

Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about.

**_First_** , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the _**"most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection."**_ That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins **when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line.**

If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months.

**_Second_** , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one.

**[Will you chip in $5, $10, or even $34 right now to help us start building our media fund so we're ready to respond when the attacks intensify?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zegv3caccpq6maps8jvebu49r34h6cfja7cp65k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1hm8or4c3h2bs)** We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal.

I appreciate your consideration!

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfmi0l7qeet8lelqno50dssihp7n31ti7icbsfog_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1hm8or4c3h2bs)

clean_body: Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about. Sponsored message | Fellow American, Democrats recently sent an email to their supporters that you should know about. First , they site a report by CNN that Georgia is the "most vulnerable Senate Democrat seat up for reelection." That's probably true because they won the seat in a runoff election by the narrowest of margins when the entire national Democrat machine was focused on pushing their candidate over the finish line. If the Georgia Senate seat is as vulnerable as CNN and the Democrats claim, then we must be prepared for the desperate attacks that are sure to be hurled at our campaign in the coming months. Second , Democrats point out that a recent poll shows them "neck and neck" in Georgia. It's far too early for any polling to predict the outcome of the race, but we know for sure that it's going to be one heck of a race - and an expensive one. We're trying to raise $40,000 in the next 24 hours to kickstart our media fund so we can flip Georgia's Senate seat RED, so please help us hit this important goal. I appreciate your consideration! Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
