| | Derek,

The Virginia Governor’s race is coming down to the wire, with _The Cook Political Report_ now calling it a toss-up — and the stakes could not be higher.

On the one hand, Democrat Terry McAuliffe has put forward plan after plan to help Virginia families — from protecting voting rights to increasing teacher pay.

And his Trump-endorsed opponent? _The Washington Post_ said Glenn Youngkin is “undermining democracy” by “playing footsie” with Donald Trump’s so-called ‘big lie.’

These are difficult times for so many in Virginia and our country. We need to elect leaders who will stand up for working families and our democracy.

Derek, that’s Terry McAuliffe, and he needs our help.

**[Please donate if you can to Terry’s campaign today. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, and Terry needs our help so he can get out the vote in the final weeks of the campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470028/311205133/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.5_EAW_10CL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNjNzYzNy04NjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yalls1Zo1mK21HWf6IdWfLmBToE8mBwdEXBSfWd4jIw=)**

Your support is especially important because Terry’s opponent is trying to use his vast personal wealth to buy the race.

In fact, Glenn Youngkin outraised Terry at a recent filing deadline only because he wrote his campaign huge checks totaling more than $4 million.

Derek, the Virginia governor’s office shouldn’t be sold off to the highest bidder. Our democracy is not for sale.

Terry can stop him, but he’ll need our help to match Youngkin’s bucket loads of cash.

**[So I am asking. The average small-dollar donation to Terry’s campaign is just under $30. name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: We’d love to have you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

We're writing to you today to ask you to join us in the fight for a progressive Pennsylvania.

Keystone Progress needs volunteers now more than ever.

This is an election year, so we're working tirelessly in communities around PA to create coalitions, train organizers, empower voters, and spread awareness on key issues. We're rallying in areas of the state that are often overlooked by mobilization efforts to build a progressive movement that includes a diversity of PA voices.

You can get involved by filling out our volunteer form now.
[https://secure.everyaction.com/uzGCPSTbqE-PPaK8Nmgqjw2?contactdata=GwG8cANjqWix%2BPbURHIEqvc0Z4OR2Zm%2B9NCWEs%2ByazFwag7fHRLVFFo%2FJ4E5qpCiDirWZ%2BaEp1mv4VqPdDojwZUzZMkes8G1bcdyVB1bUa9g3a2BUAIHn9uLxQ4Bx8Jtv91%2F2WOARVElH8iOcD3mgQ%3D%3D]

Let's work together to empower Pennsylvanians to create a more just and equitable Pennsylvania for all.

I look forward to working with you!

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

P.S. If you can, donations also support our work in protecting workers' rights, women's rights, voters' rights, and so much more.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=101221]

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress Education Fund
PO Box 1206
Harrisburg, PA 17108
United States

name: Tanner, Director of Morale on Team Sarah
subject: woof
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Woof-woof, I'm Tanner -- Sarah’s rescue dog and Director of Morale for the campaign. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470430/311206986/-1146540901?refcode=em21_211012_dog_fndd_gq_act___TGB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211012_dog_fndd_gq_act___TGB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDgwZTc5Ny04OTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbvxvKz_aJrT4cnFW8ksaW2ECKAS0FpIWvMTEmhhAEc=) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470432/311207016/-1146540901?refcode=em21_211012_dog_fndd_gq_act___TGB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211012_dog_fndd_gq_act___TGB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDgwZTc5Ny04OTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XbvxvKz_aJrT4cnFW8ksaW2ECKAS0FpIWvMTEmhhAEc=)
---|---
I have a very important _pup-date_ on the campaign: **Right now, our October fundraising is off to a slow start.** That means my mom has been spending more time raising money than giving this very good boy a belly rub.

Look, I know how hard my mom works for the people (and pups) of Wisconsin, so I decided it was time to lend a _paw_ because she would make an excellent U.S. Senator. She knows we need to fight for affordable health care, an increased minimum wage, and a strong education system.

Ron Johnson may have the full backing of dark money donors who are supporting his campaign, but my mom is different. She's not taking a dime from corporate PACs. This campaign relies on grassroots supporters to help us send Ron Johnson to the dog house for good.

clean_body: Woof-woof, I'm Tanner -- Sarah’s rescue dog and Director of Morale for the campaign. | = | = ---|--- I have a very important pup-date on the campaign: Right now, our October fundraising is off to a slow start. That means my mom has been spending more time raising money than giving this very good boy a belly rub. Look, I know how hard my mom works for the people (and pups) of Wisconsin, so I decided it was time to lend a paw because she would make an excellent U.S. Senator. She knows we need to fight for affordable health care, an increased minimum wage, and a strong education system. Ron Johnson may have the full backing of dark money donors who are supporting his campaign, but my mom is different. She's not taking a dime from corporate PACs. This campaign relies on grassroots supporters to help us send Ron Johnson to the dog house for good. I’m sniffing out some extra human support for my mom’s campaign by asking you to donate just $2 today. Please, chip in to help her get back on track for fundraising. name: Dr. Yadira
subject: How we’re going to end this pandemic.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
The pandemic isn’t over just because you’re over it. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470486/311207835/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVlMjg2OS04YTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME5n5aXDbCgSxA27LCbde1jYm2lXH7FtPWivZ1MnasA=&emci=850bf8df-7a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=095e2869-8a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Are you vaccinated, Peter?

In December 2020, I was thrilled to receive my first dose of the COVID-19 vaccine.

As a pediatrician, I give out vaccines all the time. The kind of vaccines we know and love — flu shots, tetanus, chickenpox, and many more.

The COVID-19 vaccine is just as safe and important — if not more so. It is the product of decades of research and development in the scientific community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470487/311207836/-1697418960?source=group-Caraveoforcongress&referrer=group-Caraveoforcongress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fja_caravaeo_covid19%3Famount%3D25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVlMjg2OS04YTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME5n5aXDbCgSxA27LCbde1jYm2lXH7FtPWivZ1MnasA=&emci=850bf8df-7a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=095e2869-8a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102) This pandemic will not end until enough of us are vaccinated, and right now we’re not moving fast enough towards that goal.

It’s incredibly frustrating to see the GOP politicize this pandemic, spread misinformation, and ultimately hinder our public health community’s ability to lead us out of this pandemic.

That’s why I’m grateful to President Biden for putting science over politics and requiring all federal workers, health care workers at Medicare and Medicaid facilities, and many workers at private businesses to get vaccinated. This is a necessary step towards getting us out of the pandemic.

**[I need 1,000 grassroots supporters to join me in saying thank you. Sign President Biden’s Thank You Card today >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470488/311207837/-1697418960?source=group-Caraveoforcongress&referrer=group-Caraveoforcongress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fja_caravaeo_covid19%3Famount%3D25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVlMjg2OS04YTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME5n5aXDbCgSxA27LCbde1jYm2lXH7FtPWivZ1MnasA=&emci=850bf8df-7a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=095e2869-8a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37470489/311207838/-1697418960?source=group-Caraveoforcongress&referrer=group-Caraveoforcongress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fja_caravaeo_covid19%3Famount%3D25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTVlMjg2OS04YTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME5n5aXDbCgSxA27LCbde1jYm2lXH7FtPWivZ1MnasA=&emci=850bf8df-7a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=095e2869-8a2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102)****

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: We are writing to show you just how important individual donors are to Mark Kelly’s campaign, and to ask you to add a $3 donation to our total before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to an end.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**$52.34**
That is the amount the average online donor has contributed to Mark Kelly’s campaign. With almost 1 million individual donors, you can see how it all adds up.
**2.98**
That is the number of donations the average online donor makes to Mark Kelly’s campaign. About an average of $33 each. So you can see just how important every individual donor is to Mark’s success.
**47 days**
That is roughly the amount of time between the average person’s individual donations to Mark Kelly’s campaign. Because most of our donations come from people chipping in several times, you can see how important consistency is.
**4.**
CNN says Mark Kelly’s seat was the 4th most likely one to flip in the next election. There are more than 30 Senate races up in this election, so you can see how competitive this one will be.
**3.**
That’s how many days we have until our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close. Not long at all. Easy to see how time is running out.
**$3**
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. Hopefully you can see how important this request is:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to help re-elect Mark Kelly? Do it before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close in just three days. Mark really needs your help. It all adds up.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?refcode=em211012-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1510_6688874_3ugpnB&akid=1510%2E6688874%2E3ugpnB)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-oct21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em211012-1-subs&t=20&refcode2=1510_6688874_3ugpnB&akid=1510%2E6688874%2E3ugpnB)**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Tick tock, tick tock
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We can't afford half measures.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/NazRs3dpaWHL/M1BZRGdUOTdCVjlrcUVmZHdHTk8zTmJJVVFrWENHVjRnM3dyaXRWNmlialdIcEQ1TFNqNXNJS0lFUU1Ua2FFS2R4RzNla21pMVFZNzVSQkZ5NjR3UXZoUmRnNW5RMnUvSUl6U2JYN3Z6SWc9S0/VTFoa21kYzdJdzJxVUx0WEdqWU9BMDAzODlsbHdBazZTMjdEYlVYbEJOST0S1) Tick tock, tick tock, friend. The clock is running out. We're nearing a point of no return on the climate crisis. But President Biden and Congress have a deadline at the end of this month to pass a bold, transformative reconciliation package that can pull us back from the edge. [**_Now is not the time for half measures. Will you join me in adding your name next to mine to demand Congress and the president make an aggressive investment to address the climate crisis before it 's too late?_**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/D_r2cGz-jRSV/M1BZRGdUOTdCVjlrcUVmZHdHTk8zTmJJVVFrWENHVjRnM3dyaXRWNmlialdIcEQ1TFNqNXNJS0lFUU1Ua2FFS2R4RzNla21pMVFZNzVSQkZ5NjR3UXZoUmRnNW5RMnUvSUl6U2JYN3Z6SWc9S0/VTFoa21kYzdJdzJxVUx0WEdqWU9BMDAzODlsbHdBazZTMjdEYlVYbEJOST0S1) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/k2KjHm3b9-HN/M1BZRGdUOTdCVjlrcUVmZHdHTk8zTmJJVVFrWENHVjRnM3dyaXRWNmlialdIcEQ1TFNqNXNJS0lFUU1Ua2FFS2R4RzNla21pMVFZNzVSQkZ5NjR3UXZoUmRnNW5RMnUvSUl6U2JYN3Z6SWc9S0/VTFoa21kYzdJdzJxVUx0WEdqWU9BMDAzODlsbHdBazZTMjdEYlVYbEJOST0S1)
---
President Biden is slated to head to the Global Climate Conference in Glasgow at the start of November, and he can't show up on the world stage without proving that the United States will be a world leader on climate action.
Here's what that'll mean: investing majorly in clean electricity, cutting greenhouse gas emissions, and slashing tax subsidies for fossil fuel companies. All while funding environmental justice programs in our most vulnerable communities.
Big Oil and their lobbyists are already doing all they can to kneecap this unprecedented and necessary bill. To pass the bold, transformative package that our country needs, we must come together and speak loudly in support.
[**_Sign on now to demand Congress and the president pass a bold, transformative reconciliation package that tackles the climate crisis before the end of the month._**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/D_r2cGz-jRSV/M1BZRGdUOTdCVjlrcUVmZHdHTk8zTmJJVVFrWENHVjRnM3dyaXRWNmlialdIcEQ1TFNqNXNJS0lFUU1Ua2FFS2R4RzNla21pMVFZNzVSQkZ5NjR3UXZoUmRnNW5RMnUvSUl6U2JYN3Z6SWc9S0/VTFoa21kYzdJdzJxVUx0WEdqWU9BMDAzODlsbHdBazZTMjdEYlVYbEJOST0S1)
Thank you for signing on. Let's get this done.
Very truly yours,
Jay

subject: Raphael Warnock’s Proud Boys stalker: ”I will keep watching for the signal”

body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Last Friday at 4 AM the FBI raided the home of a top Proud Boys leader, “seizing his computer, phone, and other electronics” according to _The Philadelphia Inquirer_. Look, these people aren't playing games. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — just tapped Herschel Walker to oust Warnock. Now CBS News reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised an eye-popping $3.7 million. Members of the Proud Boys have stockpiled over 1,000 rounds of ammunition and threatened Raphael Warnock's life, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” If Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. Too many Democrats think we can afford to take it easy. YOU are to thank for Raphael Warnock's historic election, which gave Democrats a 50/50 Senate. Our American families received crucial COVID-19 relief money because of you. Please, we're asking for your urgent support right now to fight back against the Proud Boys efforts to intimidate and oust Raphael Warnock, to protect the Democrat Senate, and to defeat Trump's hand-picked candidate. **[Help us fight this, Peter: We can't keep playing defense. We NEED to raise $5,250 by Wednesday to catch up with the GOP's seven-figure offensive. Failure wouldn't just mean losing Warnock's strong progressive voice in the Capitol— it would mean losing our Democratic Senate. Don't hand the Republicans the keys to the country. Don't let Donald Trump keep emboldening right-wing domestic terrorists. | **Peter, we’re _outraged_!**

Our conservative Supreme Court has stayed silent as the far-right has stripped down our voting rights and proposed -- and recently passed punitive laws in Texas -- that blatantly violate _Roe v. Wade_.

As Republicans threaten women’s basic right to bodily autonomy and all of our access to the ballot box, you have an important choice to make:
* You can either sit back and do nothing as the far-right chips away at our most fundamental rights across the country.

* **Or you can step up right now and support the Democrats fighting in Congress to codify our voting and reproductive rights into law.**

Fellow American,

Another establishment pretender, Evan McMullin, just announced he has entered the U.S. Senate race in Utah against me.

| | |

| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
AZ-09 congressional candidate Tanya Wheeless continues to hit the campaign trail hard. For the past few weeks, the name of the game was fundraising, fundraising, fundraising. Team Tanya kept the Americano coffees coming to get her through, but it was so worth it. Tanya raised over $200,000 in the first eight weeks after announcing her candidacy for Congress.

Tanya celebrated her victory in the best way she knows how - meeting with fellow Arizonans who are ready for fresh leadership. She had a great time at the Arizona Federation of Republican Women event in Ahwatukee. No better way to celebrate!

Check out a note from Tanya and what she has been up to!
---
|

name: Kat Cammack
subject: VIDEO UPDATE: I’m fighting for YOU
body:
I’m heading back to D.C. to let Nancy know that we have had enough of her radical agenda.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011opsKeRCrluZmz7PCK-9kSfL3jMgW5vIbObhTsQBYAkwiGrjRJnIbdybQi8cCcHPcYpmBmKRNEaBdvNi70xLXTAO5h5qybj8MaP1uDt_1HWNXCVqfL7g7DdT8lk7PWY4et6zys9YX6I2x9OkOrXBo-ICE-dtJDUO4GDCHDpUiK9eH46J8HLeOzG2qN6RVLHZQL8P3zcjgP2hprlkvqDLSw==&c=m1jHoSKqVtCeFEIvx9dRMhHeNDum1pEVAEcULI3T8P8bbyDyDz6WAA==&ch=Rhd5u2RXd6G0Tpo3VX3gnsPPU-ahPyakvw7Dx3svoZhDqemh1y3UNg==)
---
| Friend,
I'm heading back to D.C. to let Nancy know that we have had enough of her radical agenda.
The far-left liberals in Congress have passed policies that only benefit them. They don't care about working-class America, they only listen to Silicon Valley and the liberal elites.
I'm done letting big government push middle America around. It's time we make D.C. put America First.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011opsKeRCrluZmz7PCK-9kSfL3jMgW5vIbObhTsQBYAkwiGrjRJnIbdybQi8cCcHPcYpmBmKRNEaBdvNi70xLXTAO5h5qybj8MaP1uDt_1HWNXCVqfL7g7DdT8lk7PWY4et6zys9YX6I2x9OkOrXBo-ICE-dtJDUO4GDCHDpUiK9eH46J8HLeOzG2qN6RVLHZQL8P3zcjgP2hprlkvqDLSw==&c=m1jHoSKqVtCeFEIvx9dRMhHeNDum1pEVAEcULI3T8P8bbyDyDz6WAA==&ch=Rhd5u2RXd6G0Tpo3VX3gnsPPU-ahPyakvw7Dx3svoZhDqemh1y3UNg==)
---
| I can't take on this fight alone. The radical left is pulling in millions of dollars from Big Tech and Big Business. But I know they're no match for true conservative grassroots patriots across the country.
As your Representative, I have and always will support America First policy. We need policies and reforms that benefit everyday Americans; not the wealthy liberal elite. When conservatives retake the House in 2022, we will secure our borders, end school board censorship, stop unconstitutional mandates, and prevent radical socialist spending.
[Can I count on you to support my fight to put America First in Congress?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011opsKeRCrluZmz7PCK-9kSfL3jMgW5vIbObhTsQBYAkwiGrjRJnIbdybQi8cCcHPcYpmBmKRNEaBdvNi70xLXTAO5h5qybj8MaP1uDt_1HWNXCVqfL7g7DdT8lk7PWY4et6zys9YX6I2x9OkOrXBo-ICE-dtJDUO4GDCHDpUiK9eH46J8HLeOzG2qN6RVLHZQL8P3zcjgP2hprlkvqDLSw==&c=m1jHoSKqVtCeFEIvx9dRMhHeNDum1pEVAEcULI3T8P8bbyDyDz6WAA==&ch=Rhd5u2RXd6G0Tpo3VX3gnsPPU-ahPyakvw7Dx3svoZhDqemh1y3UNg==)
---
| | | [JOIN THE FIGHT](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011opsKeRCrluZmz7PCK-9kSfL3jMgW5vIbObhTsQBYAkwiGrjRJnIbdybQi8cCcHPcYpmBmKRNEaBdvNi70xLXTAO5h5qybj8MaP1uDt_1HWNXCVqfL7g7DdT8lk7PWY4et6zys9YX6I2x9OkOrXBo-ICE-dtJDUO4GDCHDpUiK9eH46J8HLeOzG2qN6RVLHZQL8P3zcjgP2hprlkvqDLSw==&c=m1jHoSKqVtCeFEIvx9dRMhHeNDum1pEVAEcULI3T8P8bbyDyDz6WAA==&ch=Rhd5u2RXd6G0Tpo3VX3gnsPPU-ahPyakvw7Dx3svoZhDqemh1y3UNg==)
---
| Thanks for joining the fight,
Kat Cammack

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Joe Manchin wants Democrats to choose between paid leave, child care,
universal pre-K, free community college, Medicare expansion...the list
goes on.

[ IMG ]Tweet from @karavoght about Manchin wanting to cut family programs from
the Build Back Better Act

Joe Manchin’s obstruction is blocking progressive policies AND could put
Democrats back in the minority in the House and Senate. His obstruction
will disproportionately hurt women and people of color. And this is the
last time Democrats could be in the governing majority for a long time.

Bernie Sanders and our 10 Justice Democrats in Congress are holding the
line to win a $3.5 trillion Build Back Better Act that includes all of the
economic relief and climate action currently in the bill.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75245?refcode=em20211012-19974&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=19974%2E1203867%2EFIOfr6 ]If you’re down to keep building progressive power in Congress and want
our fight to stay strong, please chip in $3 or anything at
all right now.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75245?refcode=em20211012-19974&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=19974%2E1203867%2EFIOfr6 ]Chip in $3 Now

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Pramila Jayapal, and Bernie Sanders are lifting
up progressive policies in Congress in a way we haven’t seen in a very
long time. We need to keep that momentum going AND elect more progressives
to expand our power in Congress.

We’re counting on your support to help us upend the status
quo, Peter. So,
if you can:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/75245?refcode=em20211012-19974&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=19974%2E1203867%2EFIOfr6 ]Chip in Now

Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=19974%2E1203867%2EFIOfr6 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=19974%2E1203867%2EFIOfr6 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

| | Friends,

It's been an incredible kick-off to the 4th quarter!

Last week we announced our [record-breaking first quarter fundraising numbers](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=ebb7ef1446&e=659fba240e), then on Wednesday [our video launched](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=4754d38a62&e=659fba240e) and TODAY the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) [announced our advancement into their "On the Radar" program](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=279e43b27a&e=659fba240e). The program recognizes candidates across the country who have built serious and winning campaigns.

None of this would be possible without _**your**_ support. THANK YOU!

We aren't slowing down and we need everyone to continue spreading the message of our campaign, because **whoever wins this district will determine who wins Congress**. [Let's work together and make Nancy Pelosi an ex-Speaker](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=413a32afce&e=659fba240e).

We look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail!

Team Ciscomani

body:
There’s another a crisis emanating from Joe Biden’s federal government - a huge new army of invaders is about to make the push through our Mexican bo | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=bd6dfb57e8ca480892597a595339fcb7&_e=3fBzn75dh7pH0d3d0wHThq5TGD45LjFKiqykiLslSfb1gxuprYEThYtg3HDSD5PKVZGdy5Weg66lRZAIEMspcc7rQJvnt3xappkhNdQD_Fe5XXfjPhTh9R13twwHw1PKrGxFvi2bJC_aLtVurrM04E5leQpH5k6dzplJ3a7fxICPWEo51ksBhCqRHEZCyxzJyEEt_XkjuJGYKBhYYIgm1951blGDmknJDLCoqMRv3EPijw3IZcYP7fB1L7UrGk_NZl9DFHYN5SoZPAD21TaoQyxUEskNUO-sfrb1X7xnJ3GZeiNy_BqsuEjQ4320b26crlcWF58NTzFU2eCHwicb0J6z_7-op9Qn0hKq1LQEWOOsnRFdXHqy3BH2u3RdzgZJKKmTsGqZkG9h6FoRIV1PuyfLKXyYH1vjuIgQ0gDxGX-P6a37THHK2_KMFyDvauaS) | Peter,

There’s another a crisis emanating from Joe Biden’s federal government - a huge new army of invaders is about to make the push through our Mexican border - and now the Governor of Texas is calling out the National Guard to stop it.

Peter, we’ve been outraged as the Biden Administration practically invited hordes of illegals into our country, cancelled completion of President Donald Trump’s border wall, appointed do-nothing VP Kamala Harris as utterly ineffective “border czar,” and dispersed thousands upon thousands of migrants - untested and unvaccinated in the middle of a pandemic - throughout our country.

And the Biden illegal invasion is only getting worse - and it’s not just Mexicans or other Central Americans who are breaching the border - they’re coming from overseas, too.

In fact, a “caravan” of as many as 60,000 Haitians, and maybe more, is said to be about to make its move - and now Texas National Guard troops must deal with the invasion: overwhelming Border Patrol agents, bringing deadly weapons and drugs, sex and child trafficking, and willful disregard for our laws and sovereignty with them.

[**Peter, this madness must stop, now, and Great America PAC needs your immediate help to make it clear to Joe Biden and his radical open borders globalist administration that we’ve had enough!**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=bd6dfb57e8ca480892597a595339fcb7&_e=3fBzn75dh7pH0d3d0wHThq5TGD45LjFKiqykiLslSfb1gxuprYEThYtg3HDSD5PKVZGdy5Weg66lRZAIEMspcc7rQJvnt3xappkhNdQD_Fe5XXfjPhTh9R13twwHw1PKrGxFvi2bJC_aLtVurrM04E5leQpH5k6dzplJ3a7fxICPWEo51ksBhCqRHEZCyxzJyEEt_XkjuJGYKBhYYIgm1951blGDmknJDLCoqMRv3EMgMpYv6LosaKyvaO0IzQSt8SBxXgi5kC4aC67q57w_2X1b87ifVu-IAhyRDUkeld41QYfVnzHH4-hH45eFpVOFnX8krrwlnHGTvoFmQS38RsEErVGrK5IBRcYx2m4uYIWkT6s_0a9XbCJ5HDRRjWqgd2ZGH7GtOP9OTbLE2dAQnp49OfLXVafkV7MDEOjAMqNhqmqwSMupxIJ-f8KtmYT2)

clean_body: There’s another a crisis emanating from Joe Biden’s federal government - a huge new army of invaders is about to make the push through our Mexican bo | | | Peter, There’s another a crisis emanating from Joe Biden’s federal government - a huge new army of invaders is about to make the push through our Mexican border - and now the Governor of Texas is calling out the National Guard to stop it. Peter, we’ve been outraged as the Biden Administration practically invited hordes of illegals into our country, cancelled completion of President Donald Trump’s border wall, appointed do-nothing VP Kamala Harris as utterly ineffective “border czar,” and dispersed thousands upon thousands of migrants - untested and unvaccinated in the middle of a pandemic - throughout our country. And the Biden illegal invasion is only getting worse - and it’s not just Mexicans or other Central Americans who are breaching the border - they’re coming from overseas, too. In fact, a “caravan” of as many as 60,000 Haitians, and maybe more, is said to be about to make its move - and now Texas National Guard troops must deal with the invasion: overwhelming Border Patrol agents, bringing deadly weapons and drugs, sex and child trafficking, and willful disregard for our laws and sovereignty with them. Sincerely, Ed Rollins, Chairman, Great America PAC | | | Paid for by Great America PAC 107 S. name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: ❗️Trigger Warning: Police brutality in Dayton, Ohio.❗️
body:
Barrier To Entry candidate Shenise Turner-Sloss demands justice NOW >>

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472607/311218956/1300596418?refcode=211012_FR_shenisewapo_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472608/311218957/1300596418?refcode=211012_FR_shenisewapo_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=)
---
_**Unfortunately, this email contains a trigger warning for police brutality against a person of color with disabilities.**_ On September 30, police in Dayton, Ohio forcibly removed a Black, paraplegic man named Clifford Owensby from his car while his 3-year old daughter sat in the back seat. Despite Owensby pleading with officers that he cannot walk without his wheelchair, they dragged him to a police cruiser — all during a traffic stop.

**Footage released demonstrates yet another instance of unnecessary police brutality against an unarmed Black man.**

While city officials in Dayton remained silent, Barrier to Entry PAC candidate **_Shenise Turner-Sloss_** , who is running for City Commission, spoke out and called for an outside investigation into the incident. She has been calling for justice for Owensby, as has been written about in the [Washington Post](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472609/311218958/440798255?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=&emci=3f8a4606-6b2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3f6a6101-962b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=17300922), locally in [WHIO7 story](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472610/311218959/-1610373217?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=&emci=3f8a4606-6b2b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=3f6a6101-962b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=17300922), and beyond.

_“What we’re talking about is that an individual’s civil rights were violated, again. My voice has been consistent,”_ Turner-Sloss said.

**Shenise has a long track record of fearlessly advocating for justice, and she's exactly who the city of Dayton needs. And her election is just 3 weeks away.**

[**Now more than ever, it is critical that Daytonians elect a strong, progressive voice to the City Commission. Can you chip in $10 today to help Shenise serve her community as an elected official? Your gift will go directly to Shenise’s campaign. DONATE NOW >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472611/311218960/-1750206784?refcode=211012_FR_shenisewapo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=) If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: **______[DONATE $10 TO SHENISE →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472612/311218988/-1750206784?refcode=211012_FR_shenisewapo_EL5&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=)** **______[OTHER AMOUNT→](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37472613/311218989/-1750206784?refcode=211012_FR_shenisewapo_ELothr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmNmE2MTAxLTk2MmItZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JZpMoTLg5zf2_yOVlF33i0psHUqoOJKjazMCbhrQHus=)** Thanks for helping us lift up Shenise, **_Barrier To Entry PAC_**

clean_body: Barrier To Entry candidate Shenise Turner-Sloss demands justice NOW >> | | | = = Unfortunately, this email contains a trigger warning for police brutality against a person of color with disabilities. On September 30, police in Dayton, Ohio forcibly removed a Black, paraplegic man named Clifford Owensby from his car while his 3-year old daughter sat in the back seat. Despite Owensby pleading with officers that he cannot walk without his wheelchair, they dragged him to a police cruiser — all during a traffic stop. Footage released demonstrates yet another instance of unnecessary police brutality against an unarmed Black man. While city officials in Dayton remained silent, Barrier to Entry PAC candidate Shenise Turner-Sloss , who is running for City Commission, spoke out and called for an outside investigation into the incident. She has been calling for justice for Owensby, as has been written about in the , locally in , and beyond. “What we’re talking about is that an individual’s civil rights were violated, again. My voice has been consistent,” Turner-Sloss said. Shenise has a long track record of fearlessly advocating for justice, and she's exactly who the city of Dayton needs. And her election is just 3 weeks away. = If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: __= ____= Thanks for helping us lift up Shenise, Barrier To Entry PAC ********** ********** ****************EXPRESS DONATE to Barrier to Entry PAC**************** ****************If you've stored payment info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** | ****************= "="**************** ---|---|---|--- BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37473160/311223482/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmMxMzM3Yy05NzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Gidpa9_5uzAZ-86REuD6OEvc2ESCtDSTN7eRBKiDaI=)

Peter,

Yesterday was Indigenous Peoples' Day -- a day we honor the people whose ancestors lived here long before Christopher Columbus ever set foot on the shores of the continent; the people who have endured ethnic cleansing, expulsion, and broken promises from the settlers who formed our previous government leadership.

The struggles of Indigenous peoples in this country remind so many minorities of why we must be proactive and intentional about protecting our communities and righting the wrongs of our history. The power structures of the past destroyed their land, and we simply don't do enough to pay our respects today.

This week, as we recognize Indigenous Peoples' Day, let us not forget how much more we need to do, and take a moment to honor the Indigenous people in Florida and beyond!
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37473161/311223483/-578272527?refcode=em21_211012_indigpeople&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmMxMzM3Yy05NzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9Gidpa9_5uzAZ-86REuD6OEvc2ESCtDSTN7eRBKiDaI=)
---

Let's keep pushing for change.

\-- Michele

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race is about our future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0ccfba770433462395e561340caf982e&_e=ZzJM_gRBwkcuCZQO42YllryKu8XBZvYM67NtHGjnGlLchBP5oVDn2976o7yh-LZFF6Fl7S4wr_xImPKyisDJ_p-4s2NpmhWIL7T9_XVi_-3jacCK8lwcH4vn_fJ9qL0C6Lzu688U6IW9dfZsmC0YPHYZuhyqkktZUuY7fg2_YIPPwF5yVARrQxAtZOv3tog91FuPvjwLATrTEwV4LZCgwtGtNhWlPk0EUh3ZNYgwoiPxDXmfYgKe2CiVSdDhYBdj8TExqh7N5GKfD6z6N-hrYs6WEy61It3b-WTy7psL9ylDLSMY1iRggvXAAw1B0_UcEt6aoXl3YZBYypIc-SWImJu1-NE_Iu5L7juqXBqk-6Q_lJpk3gtEl4IJdD0zDrZ3_p9UCvyoxNKiloRPzEGSMrj1bzMfHbEu8slVHbnbLiNWBU1ewdUPt_4nKmFLHiP4biXeK7nx3l_9iQT_aOxnfQ%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0ccfba770433462395e561340caf982e&_e=ZzJM_gRBwkcuCZQO42YllryKu8XBZvYM67NtHGjnGlLchBP5oVDn2976o7yh-LZFF6Fl7S4wr_xImPKyisDJ_p-4s2NpmhWIL7T9_XVi_-3jacCK8lwcH4vn_fJ9qL0C6Lzu688U6IW9dfZsmC0YPHYZuhyqkktZUuY7fg2_YIPPwF5yVARrQxAtZOv3tog91FuPvjwLATrTEwV4LZCgwtGtNhWlPk0EUh3ZNYgwoiPxDXmfYgKe2CiVSdDhYBdj9sUw3WY9_Ti-fQtHRrKkWnTbv4uzx92cDJzjwg5W-l7UwlRtcLVfsKtk-bSojuk7hz3jlcY1CCgXYmw-p-M40aCTZYeEsRMXOUkOKciL06yoy847pN6JX-wk-OR0NfXdb0TE4Lbgmnyqr8TtpW511Sn0YCctukW-33pEDteoI-p7Ib3P8BCF0SZHpeHLyeJV6f17CYwN3ll7-J6GIZPQqw%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Peter, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0ccfba770433462395e561340caf982e&_e=ZzJM_gRBwkcuCZQO42YllryKu8XBZvYM67NtHGjnGlLchBP5oVDn2976o7yh-LZFF6Fl7S4wr_xImPKyisDJ_p-4s2NpmhWIL7T9_XVi_-3jacCK8lwcH4vn_fJ9qL0C6Lzu688U6IW9dfZsmC0YPHYZuhyqkktZUuY7fg2_YIPPwF5yVARrQxAtZOv3tog91FuPvjwLATrTEwV4LZCgwtGtNhWlPk0EUh3ZNYgwoiPxDXmfYgKe2CiVSdDhYBdjv_s8Pt2v1penbVtnXsXcxVV5u8dybOhpl0X8P7wFjiIMhkvxWcVKImx17Ewqd4ic8WbsLxqIwq4K2OB3JXcbo1peAMlN8VGY7IcNJbA0586df-7VsUHh5P8UHjY39f8YcdhGeCAeoY5S4A75fh9kWRemdDNsQ8aa85T9gKywp6g1eGYthdrf1iaxVtCr0zSyhhvUoCAYRjq0iamfA4u8JA%3D%3D)**

I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

clean_body: I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. | Peter, As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now. While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party. This race is about the future of America. Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs. When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Peter, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path. That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself. I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important. Democrats know what's at stake. Republicans know what's at stake. I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg. I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America. I hope you'll join us on this journey. body:
On broadband, Kim Reynolds is trying to have her cake and eat it too. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37473881/311227368/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzVkOTEyYS05YjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B-8SICfVZB2NcEXlD8Q2ETy6V_c-6e3Yw7OgllNJDN8=)
Friend,

Iowa has some of the slowest broadband speeds in the country. It's an issue that disproportionately affects rural communities and it's something our opponent Kim Reynolds talks a lot about. Here's what she said back in May:
**_"I just joined 12 other states to sue Joe Biden for his overreaching, unconstitutional stimulus bill that does NOTHING but bail out blue states."_**
Apparently as of yesterday, she changed her tune:
| | **Gov. Kim Reynolds** @IAGovernor
---|---
| | | Today I announced additional grant opportunities for rural broadband access totaling $200 million.
---

That's right, friend: the federal government allocated $200 million to expand rural broadband in Iowa and now Kim Reynolds is taking credit for it, while continuing to bash President Biden.

**Make no mistake, Kim Reynolds is trying to have her cake and eat it too. That's why we need to remind Iowans who is actually looking out for working families:**

**[Can you chip in $3 so we can get the word out about Reynolds' hypocrisy to more undecided voters? clean_body: On broadband, Kim Reynolds is trying to have her cake and eat it too. | = Friend, Iowa has some of the slowest broadband speeds in the country. It's an issue that disproportionately affects rural communities and it's something our opponent Kim Reynolds talks a lot about. Here's what she said back in May: "I just joined 12 other states to sue Joe Biden for his overreaching, unconstitutional stimulus bill that does NOTHING but bail out blue states." Apparently as of yesterday, she changed her tune: | | Gov. Kim Reynolds @IAGovernor ---|--- | | | Today I announced additional grant opportunities for rural broadband access totaling $200 million. That's right, friend: the federal government allocated $200 million to expand rural broadband in Iowa and now Kim Reynolds is taking credit for it, while continuing to bash President Biden. Make no mistake, Kim Reynolds is trying to have her cake and eat it too. That's why we need to remind Iowans who is actually looking out for working families: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Ras serves as a member of the Iowa House Information Technology Committee and has had significant challenges accessing satellite internet on his farm. He knows how broadband access affects rural communities, farms, and small businesses firsthand -- so you won't find him playing politics with this issue. = Thanks in advance, Team Ras = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you'd like to make a contribution to Ras' grassroots campaign, please chip in = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Allison Russo
subject: This special election is less than a month away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ][IMG]

Hi folks,

I’m Allison Russo and I’m running for Ohio’s 15 Congressional District in
this November’s special election -- did I mention it’s less than a month
away!?

I’ve spent my career fighting for Ohio families to get the care they need,
and as a working mom and wife to a combat veteran, I know how to cut
through the chaos and find real solutions.

With Election Day less than a month away and early voting already
underway, I need all hands on deck to win this seat and ensure Ohioans
have a Representative that fights for them in Congress.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5056?t=1007&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Tim Ryan’s
campaign for Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5056?t=1008&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5057?t=1009&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5058?t=1010&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5059?t=1011&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5060?t=1012&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5056?t=1013&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Other Amount

Tim and I both know the hardships everyday Ohioans face -- and we’re ready
to go to bat to make sure everyone gets a fair shake.

But we need YOUR help to ensure our GOP extremist opponents don’t win --
their only interest is lining the pockets of themselves and their rich
friends. My opponent is a Trump-backed coal lobbyist who couldn’t be more
wrong to represent Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5056?t=1014&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Can you chip in what you can so Tim and I can work together to build an
economy that works for everyone, not just those at the very top?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5056?t=1015&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5057?t=1016&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5058?t=1017&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Donate $100

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5056?t=1020&akid=1116%2E3611125%2EdMMhwG ]Other Amount

Thanks for being with us,

Allison

Allison Russo
Candidate for U.S. Congress Ohio 15

Raphael a TOP target for defeat.

Thanks to Democrats' _razor-thin_ Senate majority, we've been able to make huge strides in defending voting rights, supporting working families and rebuilding our country's economy. **But the GOP is launching attack ads to smear Raphael and turn Georgia red – and if they're successful, we'll hand our majority to Mitch McConnell, and our entire progressive agenda will go up in smoke.**

clean_body: time is running out | | | With time running out before our crucial fundraising deadline, we're still falling $89,000 short of our goal. That's why Sen. Raphael Warnock is reaching out with an urgent message: Derek, we have ZERO room for error. With the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell – and now, NBC News reports that the GOP is making Raphael a TOP target for defeat. Thanks to Democrats' razor-thin Senate majority, we've been able to make huge strides in defending voting rights, supporting working families and rebuilding our country's economy. But the GOP is launching attack ads to smear Raphael and turn Georgia red – and if they're successful, we'll hand our majority to Mitch McConnell, and our entire progressive agenda will go up in smoke. The only way we can fight back against Republican attacks and win this race is if grassroots supporters like you chip in now. But with so little time to go until our deadline, we're still falling short. So please, Derek, Raphael is counting on you: Thank you for your support in our fight for justice. – Team Warnock | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
Team --

In a minute, we're going to ask you to **[become a monthly recurring donor to Karen's campaign for Los Angeles Mayor](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaiXUsn1sde-2JZrheityeTysyGhsjsonXeOhb4UKXg=/Do7SgpERUbC7uEZrFBTU85O3rPEXj26kBJoQ92Og67k=?r=1&ms=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask1&refcode=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask1&source=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask1&utm_campaign=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**, but first, we wanted to tell you why your support is so important.

Karen's entering this race with a lifetime of experience serving the people of Los Angeles. She's been a community organizer, nurse, Physician Assistant, speaker of the California State Assembly, and member of Congress.

The structural problems L.A. is facing require a leader who truly advocates for Angelenos, and Karen's ready to get to work on behalf of every person in every zip code. But keeping this campaign running isn't cheap. To see this race through to the end, Karen is relying on folks like you chipping in to help us spread her message to every corner of the city.

**[Will you commit to becoming a monthly sustaining donor to ensure Karen has the early resources to run a winning campaign? Every dollar helps.](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaiXUsn1sde-2JZrheityeTysyGhsjsonXeOhb4UKXg=/Do7SgpERUbC7uEZrFBTU85O3rPEXj26kBJoQ92Og67k=?r=1&ms=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask2&refcode=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask2&source=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask2&utm_campaign=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

[CHIP IN $3 MONTHLY](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaiXUsn1sde-2JZrheityeTysyGhsjsonXeOhb4UKXg=/Do7SgpERUbC7uEZrFBTU85O3rPEXj26kBJoQ92Og67k=?r=1&ms=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_3bttn&refcode=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_3bttn&source=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_3bttn&utm_campaign=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_3bttn&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&am=3)

[CHIP IN $10 MONTHLY](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaiXUsn1sde-2JZrheityeTysyGhsjsonXeOhb4UKXg=/Do7SgpERUbC7uEZrFBTU85O3rPEXj26kBJoQ92Og67k=?r=1&ms=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_10bttn&refcode=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_10bttn&source=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_10bttn&utm_campaign=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_10bttn&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass&am=10)
---
[MAKE A ONE-TIME DONATION](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaiXUsn1sde-2JZrheityeTysyGhsjsonXeOhb4UKXg=/Do7SgpERUbC7uEZrFBTU85O3rPEXj26kBJoQ92Og67k=?ms=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_1bttn&refcode=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_1bttn&source=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_1bttn&utm_campaign=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_1bttn&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)
---

Monthly donations are crucial for a campaign like ours. It's money we can rely on every month to direct to the most important parts of our campaign. It makes it easier to plan our budget and will ensure we can effectively send Karen's message to every Angeleno that needs to hear it.

Our monthly donors are the backbone of this campaign, team. Karen is counting on you to help build the sustainable base of support this team needs to help take this movement straight to City Hall, starting now.

**[Will you become a monthly supporter of Karen? Chip in $3 or more a month to help keep this campaign running strong.](https://act.myngp.com/el/UaiXUsn1sde-2JZrheityeTysyGhsjsonXeOhb4UKXg=/Do7SgpERUbC7uEZrFBTU85O3rPEXj26kBJoQ92Og67k=?r=1&ms=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask3&refcode=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask3&source=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask3&utm_campaign=em21_211012_recurr_fndd_gq_50less___tb_ettx_alask3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=karen-bass)**

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A.. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. Rush a donation today to support Karen's campaign:

name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race is bigger than me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec83b7bb46864aea887af40f1122e2cb&_e=av-vOkLf9kCx4yd776EDDDoMKCCg6dfqIX_X8-jyM88MWUGbwhVWyHz3Ou7fvDXAg4v1f6YeyioranRwtYmAPIB4wPocz4DQ5RvE1Ci-eO-yj1BFX7Dyggw_0bP2OL3sSaYfY9Zc7v2O_dMwaBJ_cNB4j5oGQUuy62DIH1be6sH-spLxqcW9yJlikEhQi_OeOqg1LmS25fPewP3EopC6RvTjpN2wkexWC56JmIUHEtPTZC4NqNzpyTC0nlQ4mnM9NWRVhHCTymbda2EebY3gYvI8Tm1LbjPxxj7jFfrfWgxfvfd5WITS5witHxcHoqsrs5dj9AueZ3m-jKlXCCZvXg7JN0diS64jv5wSgL5nHL8WSd8EUdIk3OqTnfMepahuCqXMUhwsObTWZFynU1b71IrvbCloO8lMSkDL5ZQvfSn2_nIpe1p84LeoX6o-O7PEBdHJmmndxuIjpZ9P0bIj9Q%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec83b7bb46864aea887af40f1122e2cb&_e=av-vOkLf9kCx4yd776EDDDoMKCCg6dfqIX_X8-jyM88MWUGbwhVWyHz3Ou7fvDXAg4v1f6YeyioranRwtYmAPIB4wPocz4DQ5RvE1Ci-eO-yj1BFX7Dyggw_0bP2OL3sSaYfY9Zc7v2O_dMwaBJ_cNB4j5oGQUuy62DIH1be6sH-spLxqcW9yJlikEhQi_OeOqg1LmS25fPewP3EopC6RvTjpN2wkexWC56JmIUHEtPTZC4NqNzpyTC0nlQ4mnM9cUs7Zf4sg-TUQZnw2QhT1Ql91py3925wzs39isM2P2ebL6PesVKb8qE8POYU9sfu7Sxni5MlM6abu55w5t9On5Y8lMn0kudvlZwUXgoG1EBJNFNtEs3GxUXNsbZ4IW-1Ie7JG-mRNs5Q1TJUl4TDqAoMeIicougaaWZroRz2ZgOMYhCEAiRlSJfN3LrzzQzt0ZXu8CgSWN8vUX5A4gbhQQ%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec83b7bb46864aea887af40f1122e2cb&_e=av-vOkLf9kCx4yd776EDDDoMKCCg6dfqIX_X8-jyM88MWUGbwhVWyHz3Ou7fvDXAg4v1f6YeyioranRwtYmAPIB4wPocz4DQ5RvE1Ci-eO-yj1BFX7Dyggw_0bP2OL3sSaYfY9Zc7v2O_dMwaBJ_cNB4j5oGQUuy62DIH1be6sH-spLxqcW9yJlikEhQi_OeOqg1LmS25fPewP3EopC6RvTjpN2wkexWC56JmIUHEtPTZC4NqNzpyTC0nlQ4mnM9A9ezbQwJM0pAIKGKIEUjtRAmlrZnim5UPh0Eo22IR3KsjhsG3MvvFwvhMZbSPozkMUuKboYB4vdqAQsr5Hz4YyIPkl8kAfzDQ5aGr9_1mniQxUiVJN5ADtXUbovw5m_3IZFIv0EpTrguoTInlKNUJ5VLMzm-XxSfGtj-itlDXvZzkRK0tJP2nJiAAnKP-8n2A4wKegB4a0k9nMapGbvqFQ%3D%3D)**

[**Send $5, $10, $34 or more our way today ->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=ec83b7bb46864aea887af40f1122e2cb&_e=av-vOkLf9kCx4yd776EDDDoMKCCg6dfqIX_X8-jyM88MWUGbwhVWyHz3Ou7fvDXAg4v1f6YeyioranRwtYmAPIB4wPocz4DQ5RvE1Ci-eO-yj1BFX7Dyggw_0bP2OL3sSaYfY9Zc7v2O_dMwaBJ_cNB4j5oGQUuy62DIH1be6sH-spLxqcW9yJlikEhQi_OeOqg1LmS25fPewP3EopC6RvTjpN2wkexWC56JmIUHEtPTZC4NqNzpyTC0nlQ4mnM9OwGvPGwxKZxXz8-D-DHU4NcMSVdW1fVihA-J4Z_19HU0O_Rlu9ovvg24CDBEOYPev_3oSQ1XsHtHZZdK420PQJKhOzGdl-DNxkiEZZqi34oeST0BJuI02lMeamRe0l8CRjgXcPGiwHIaWmFiEd82qRx_gaG0r-n32e1Dl5o0LsLQUwSxnFcI7yZ1IvHNJxUL9GF6am_JrrA3pN7TdDiTag%3D%3D)
I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

Democrats know what's at stake.

Republicans know what's at stake.

I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now.

The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - _**and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg.**_

I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America.

I hope you'll join us on this journey.

Thanks,

clean_body: I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. | Fellow American, As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now. While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party. This race is about the future of America. Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs. When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path. That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself. I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important. Democrats know what's at stake. Republicans know what's at stake. I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg. I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America. I hope you'll join us on this journey. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for US Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Vernon Jones for Governor
subject: Sign Vernon Jones's Petition to Add Items to the Special Session Agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
Call on Governor Kemp to Take Action
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Vernon Jones for Georgia \- October 12th, 2021 -
---
|
---
Take Action
The Georgia Constitution allows for governors to add subjects to special sessions before the session begins. Join me in demanding that Governor Kemp amend his agenda for the special session on Nov. 3 and add these four items.

* Independent forensic audit of all 159 counties
* ban by law, CRT from K-12 schools
* make Georgia Constitutional Carry State
* replace the Dominion voting machines in order to restore public trust in voting
* ban vaccine mandates by any entity

[Sign the Online Petition](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A_yuoKd55uiX8FGojsPZ0RlpEPiPLCxWBZujbZ_MHbppoRgYWol9ynxIVKlBkHumHlHid0wEQToPBSWA_ulWK2u1ztFeF_5aO98sXCVb95dice0ca9pwKhRp5jVMSig2Ao_9sJVi0Cu898os94qtVUD0_klNvQF9RQcQ72ll-pUhNAvsC2PYreDeAWITXXuaIX66_AkwRdzRt9u0II_FoL8LoAgpOags7kRVB_hIr3A29aY8A8GNMe781vMZcq6w&c=05xsYcCNNHwyJI66BagyuK6yHYz_E1E9bhFHGBg9SUxXHSZtRXekKA==&ch=905Ln9KdkYMLRnkKBqWR3aMglg4yGbOOEmLuqzL0LzcI40j5noi7iQ==)
---
Georgians are tired of Kemp's lack of leadership.
Cobb County GOP Censured Governor Kemp. One resolution censured him for his failure to keep his campaign promises concerning illegal immigration. A second resolution calls on him to prohibit vaccine passports. A third resolution calls for a statewide forensic audit and criminal investigation into the 2020 and January 2021 elections
[Cobb County GOP Censures Gov. Kemp](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A_yuoKd55uiX8FGojsPZ0RlpEPiPLCxWBZujbZ_MHbppoRgYWol9ynxIVKlBkHumbkhkEw7p3DBS1rGpew9t7PkTVP_ToBjvz5jIE672wVBxURUcYmLxe19UHxzS9LEOZ0DaRNOPeUE6ighsYpT9W1voRwY0DUvtOFWIM6TKD4PvNtIFmth7LJqAQ0HkhLRyFICr727-44o=&c=05xsYcCNNHwyJI66BagyuK6yHYz_E1E9bhFHGBg9SUxXHSZtRXekKA==&ch=905Ln9KdkYMLRnkKBqWR3aMglg4yGbOOEmLuqzL0LzcI40j5noi7iQ==)
Gwinnett, Cherokee, Camden County GOP passes a resolution for an audit. [Camden County GOP Passes Resolution for Audit of 2020 Elections](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A_yuoKd55uiX8FGojsPZ0RlpEPiPLCxWBZujbZ_MHbppoRgYWol9ynxIVKlBkHumDfoYfBLnKPSIFhotsNs-oAveNUw6Bze__sy6Y3BuoUGCVsk-TdIEy8kmlMD56Vat8uNpAinSDNO4QUE9k15wrU95VY8PX5CN0rVInCDn0Po=&c=05xsYcCNNHwyJI66BagyuK6yHYz_E1E9bhFHGBg9SUxXHSZtRXekKA==&ch=905Ln9KdkYMLRnkKBqWR3aMglg4yGbOOEmLuqzL0LzcI40j5noi7iQ==)

In The News
[Fulton County Election Workers Fired for Allegedly Shredding Voter Registration Applications](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A_yuoKd55uiX8FGojsPZ0RlpEPiPLCxWBZujbZ_MHbppoRgYWol9ynxIVKlBkHum5idzNz9HV752jlZB3eQjPcxhJoytpnC6V_15H_IeQj-BOjN1uLy_3hhI2dgDqm9UgC7GXdSbbSwNYodBm9xIDxstMjhGw7QxKjuhgh4PdJTTndU1IAfnagHeLtg5tmrNogzS4JUjd90q6HYGMaexmtbAV3l8Z-oN0Vp9kGJeMOMK5mkNGJUCkRDAMfsEzwYhVJRQnI7ALcGcA1Oe0wp5-A==&c=05xsYcCNNHwyJI66BagyuK6yHYz_E1E9bhFHGBg9SUxXHSZtRXekKA==&ch=905Ln9KdkYMLRnkKBqWR3aMglg4yGbOOEmLuqzL0LzcI40j5noi7iQ==)

[Governor Abbott Issues Executive Order Prohibiting Vaccine Mandates](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A_yuoKd55uiX8FGojsPZ0RlpEPiPLCxWBZujbZ_MHbppoRgYWol9ynxIVKlBkHumz-D7unLf1hsT_1jxaAsqFiebvzcN68XdZrz8qF6JunjOfdyiCO57JRJhP3jid-7EuXddepspbrkU9xcHJHHPOCI-VBXHJnaWhbaOygWc7hTljdkqp7MMXlehBuxmnE7rJxAcD6npV9Xf3TuvTGo6hXfUbMwDJA6f1aLUyPQx5JiQkc01SClP5GrJms8XXseQrQdYhjhklutRNO2w8K7w4qIEDRo8evL74w_ZCUPFYkWr2IXM04WGoZlWjK_7iNBv&c=05xsYcCNNHwyJI66BagyuK6yHYz_E1E9bhFHGBg9SUxXHSZtRXekKA==&ch=905Ln9KdkYMLRnkKBqWR3aMglg4yGbOOEmLuqzL0LzcI40j5noi7iQ==)
[Gun Owners are Waiting On Kemp's Promise to Make Georgia a Constitutional Carry State](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A_yuoKd55uiX8FGojsPZ0RlpEPiPLCxWBZujbZ_MHbppoRgYWol9ynxIVKlBkHumEwgt9fQ3YelDv7_hO1YxvX-7DZfdtl68IDSjTqAZmnku-aagR_wnxviZ5Lpz72F8XOj5zLZYROskyiJ0OKkS46LXQy2_mya4bU1XBip9qRGq99afdsRLbx2e_HSg7caSpSg_VlzcDvaPR_i2Wyi8ag==&c=05xsYcCNNHwyJI66BagyuK6yHYz_E1E9bhFHGBg9SUxXHSZtRXekKA==&ch=905Ln9KdkYMLRnkKBqWR3aMglg4yGbOOEmLuqzL0LzcI40j5noi7iQ==)
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week I visited Spalding and Cherokee Counties. It is always such a privilege to meet the Great Patriots of Georgia! This week I'll be stopping by Jasper County and Pike County.

Hearing from my fellow Georgians is what keeps me inspired and ready to fight for our state all day every day! Too many establishment elites and RINO's in our state forget that the People are the boss of government, not the other way around. President Lincoln said that our government is "of the people, for the people, and by the people". When I become governor, I intend to govern that way!

To my fellow Georgians,
Though I am constantly under attack by RINOs and the establishment elite, I do not fret one bit because I know I have YOU on my team. Corporate dollars and big government elites will never be able to stand against the power of the People. That is why I am running a grassroots campaign, the likes of which the state of Georgia has never seen before!
I will continue traveling the many counties of Georgia, listening to you all, and learning how I can be the best governor for the people of Georgia once I am elected.
Thank you for your patriotism. With your help and support, we will Take Georgia Back.
Your friend,
Vernon Jones Candidate for Governor
---

Saturday 10/16 12:00PM: Pike County Parade (144 Main St., Concord, GA 30206)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Peter, we assigned you to Monroe County!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If we’re going to flip this Senate seat blue in a midterm election, we can’t just rely on turning out the same people who always vote.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211012-2988-header&t=1&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)
Hey, it’s Eric — John’s Deputy Campaign Manager.
In a minute, I’m going to ask you for $5 to support our campaign to elect John Fetterman. But before I do, I hope you’ll allow me to unpack exactly why your donation is needed to flip this PA Senate seat blue.
**Joe Biden won Pennsylvania by just 1% in a year with record turnout.** If we’re going to flip this Senate seat blue in a midterm election, we can’t just rely on turning out the same people who always vote.
The Republicans have recently been making smart investments in registering new voters. Especially from 2016 to 2020.1 And if we want to get anywhere CLOSE to flipping this seat, **we really need to register more Democrats ASAP, or we risk getting overwhelmed in 2022.**
So, I'm asking for your help. We’ve assigned each person a county to help spread the funding around:
_[**Can you sponsor Monroe County and help register more Democrats to vote in this key swing state? Every dollar will help us resource a big push in all 67 counties.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30721?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211012-2988&t=2&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)_
**You have been chosen to sponsor Monroe County. Can you chip in $5 to help us close the registration gap statewide?** | Democrats | 54,657
---|---
Republicans | 40,588
**[Yes, I can help with $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30721?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211012-2988&t=3&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)**
It’s true there are already more registered Democrats than Republicans in Monroe County. But this is an area where we need to seriously run up the margins to keep Pennsylvania from going red statewide.
**We can't let Republicans have any kind of advantage when it comes to registering new voters. They want to make Pennsylvania a permanent red state by out-registering us.**
It’s up to us to make sure that doesn’t happen. John’s already proven he can win statewide. He’s a candidate who will bring a lot of independent voters into our fold. And, last but not least, he’s running a grassroots campaign that will reach out to new voters in every single one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.
**But we can’t pull this off without your help!**_[**Can you chip in $5 to sponsor our efforts to bring in new Democratic voters in Monroe County?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30721?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20211012-2988&t=4&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)_
If even 25% of the people reading this email decide to chip in, we would meet our goal for funding this plan in just a matter of hours. This is within reach, but only if we get enough participation.
Thanks for considering a donation today.
Eric
Eric Stern 💙
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
1 - [PA Dept. of State Data](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30771?t=5&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211012-2988-footer&t=6&refcode2=2988_434096_9RSkjg&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2988%2E434096%2E9RSkjg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Fight medical mandates NOW. Momentum is on our side!
body:
| |
---
**We have an additional urgent call to action this week. **

Right now, there is a fierce and gathering momentum against vaccine (and other medical) mandates – an issue we have been working on for months, working to build exactly this sort of momentum.

With the pilots, other airline workers, truckers, government employees, and more, walking out, calling in sick, NOW is the time to push harder!
**First,** visit our website, [**StopMedicalMandates.com**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg1LWEwZDhhYjM1NGYxNzRmZTk4MGJkNGE3M2JhMjlmOGI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0NDM3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=oMggOxiM_O_pt9dYXqXPRA), to find protests already organized in your area, so that you can attend and support, and help further this momentum.

**Second,** if there is not a protest in your area, please step up to organize one! At this point, they do not need to be complex, large protests. Sign and flag waving at a busy intersection is a perfect thing to do! You can also register your event on **[StopMedicalMandates.com](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg1LWEwZDhhYjM1NGYxNzRmZTk4MGJkNGE3M2JhMjlmOGI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0NDM3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=dqm8sRv6OpnVSpqGSzjczw)** , and then we will list your event too!
**Third,** make calls to your state government officials – state legislators and your governor – particularly if you live in a state governed by Republicans who have yet to stand up to vaccine mandates. Every Republican legislature should be passing legislation and every Republican governor should be signing executive orders protecting their citizens from mandates. Unfortunately, too many are NOT, and they need to feel the heat from the citizenry. There are many businesses and hospitals, even in red states, that are forcing vaccinations on their employees, and Republican elected officials can stop this. Put the pressure on them to protect you!

**Fourth,** doctors in many states (again, including red states!) are the subject of witch hunts by state medical associations, left wing groups, and/or the state medical boards, for simply doing what doctors are supposed to do – treat patients who are sick! They are literally filing complaints against doctors who prescribe Ivermectin (for instance), in an attempt to get their medical licenses taken away! This is happening in multiple states.
**How can you help the doctors?**
We created a mini-guide to help you defend these courageous doctors. **[Please look through the guide, and follow the instructions in it.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg1LWEwZDhhYjM1NGYxNzRmZTk4MGJkNGE3M2JhMjlmOGI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vdG9vbGtpdHMvU1RPUC1NZWRpY2FsLU1hbmRhdGVzLUNvbnRhY3QtTWVkaWNhbC1Cb2FyZHMtYW5kLUFzc29jaWF0aW9ucy5wZGY_bWlkPTQ0NDM3JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=tdFYqulXeeHrKA4Evfkrcg)** You should do some research to find out if your state-based medical associations have put out statements or made complaints against these good doctors, and if so, include them in your action too. Lastly, if you were saved by a doctor who treated you for Covid, write your story down and send it to your doctor so that he or she has a copy. Save it, because you may have a use for it later as well. Conversely, if you have a doctor who refused to treat you, write that story down. You may want to file a complaint against that doctor for refusing to treat you.

**There is momentum to push back the medical tyranny that has gained a foothold in America – don’t let it slip away! NOW IS THE TIME TO FIGHT!!**
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg1LWEwZDhhYjM1NGYxNzRmZTk4MGJkNGE3M2JhMjlmOGI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00NDQzNyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=uVrjAhv6RbvFxxkhQJv8xA)

There are many businesses and hospitals, even in red states, that are forcing vaccinations on their employees, and Republican elected officials can stop this. Put the pressure on them to protect you! Fourth, doctors in many states (again, including red states!) are the subject of witch hunts by state medical associations, left wing groups, and/or the state medical boards, for simply doing what doctors are supposed to do – treat patients who are sick! They are literally filing complaints against doctors who prescribe Ivermectin (for instance), in an attempt to get their medical licenses taken away! This is happening in multiple states. How can you help the doctors? We created a mini-guide to help you defend these courageous doctors. You should do some research to find out if your state-based medical associations have put out statements or made complaints against these good doctors, and if so, include them in your action too. Lastly, if you were saved by a doctor who treated you for Covid, write your story down and send it to your doctor so that he or she has a copy. Save it, because you may have a use for it later as well. Conversely, if you have a doctor who refused to treat you, write that story down. You may want to file a complaint against that doctor for refusing to treat you. There is momentum to push back the medical tyranny that has gained a foothold in America – don’t let it slip away! NOW IS THE TIME TO FIGHT!! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 |

Friend,

Remember when I said the China Virus came from a Chinese lab, and the Left and their friends in the media tried to SMEAR me?

I do. And I also remember when they said I was wrong about all of the following (spoiler: I was RIGHT AGAIN):
* **[We did produce vaccines before the end of 2020, in record time I might add.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66071%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GrzgxmVoKUNDTbvPo2j1Yg&sysid=1)**

* **[Blue state lockdowns didn’t work.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66087%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fOnovJNwDqwV8bF03F9%2fnQ&sysid=1)**

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474628/311230753/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)

| | Did you read my wife Jasmine’s coming out story for National Coming Out Day, Peter? Of course, I’ve already heard it before and it still gets me because it cuts to the core of who she is, and who we are as a family. It’s never easy going against the status quo, but Jasmine’s determination to fight for what’s right is one of the things I love most about her. She’s always demonstrated she has what it takes to be a fierce leader and I’ve personally seen her in action -- during both our Southern LGBTQ equality movements _and_ her service as county commissioner. Trust me when I say that Jasmine is the most qualified candidate to lead Western North Carolina -- but in order to do so, she needs your help. [**Jasmine has a mid-month fundraising goal of $12,000 and needs your grassroots support to reach it. Will you chip in $5 or more today to help my wife make history twice over?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474629/311230756/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=) | | | [Chip in $5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474630/311230758/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)

| | [Other amount ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474631/311230760/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)
