Jasmine wouldn’t just be the first woman to represent NC-11 in Congress. She would be the first _LGBTQ person_ elected to represent North Carolina. From either party. Ever.
Let’s make history together.
\-- Meghann

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jasmine
Date: Mon, Oct 11, 2021
Subject: My coming out story
To: [info@jasmineforcongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474632/311230762/298981687?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)

Below is a longer, personal note about my coming out story. If you're able to pitch in, [**please click here to make a donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474633/311230764/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)

Peter: This is a longer, but especially important, email about why I’m running for Congress to defeat Madison Cawthorn.
It’s also National Coming Out Day so I thought I’d share my coming out story with you and some thoughts on how that connects to this moment and my campaign.
[**I hope after you’re done reading, you’ll chip in $25 or more to ensure we have the resources to fund our organizing work and run a winning campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474634/311230766/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474635/311230768/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)
---
As a LGBTQ person, you never really stop coming out. Instead, it’s a part of daily life, with countless moments and choices about how you talk about your life, how you dress, how you move through the world.
That’s true for me right now, as we campaign across Western NC, knocking doors, organizing in parking lots and back yards. The moment I introduce myself and talk about my family -- Meg and our three kids, the four loves of my life -- I come out again. Each time, I feel proud and I am also reminded why coming out matters.
Sometimes I also feel that familiar feeling of my pulse racing. When you come out to a stranger, you do not know how they will react. But what I have learned again and again is that, inevitably, there is someone in the room who also needs to hear those words, and that makes it worth it to say them.
For me, this process started when I was 18 and came out for the first time. It ushered in a new chapter of my life -- one that was both more honest and riskier. Telling the truth about who I am was an enormous relief on one hand; on the other, it tested some of the most important relationships in my life.
And it meant letting go of a lot. I stopped feeling at home in the church, even though my faith never wavered. It wasn’t easy to imagine a future for myself in North Carolina, as much as this was home to me.
I knew that ultimately this was where I belonged, even though I still harbored questions, and sometimes fear, about what it would mean to be out here. I started organizing political campaigns and LGBTQ rights campaigns. And I met my wife Meghann.
When we got married in 2008, our marriage was not legally recognized in North Carolina, or most places in the country. It was a daily reminder to us of the work that needed to happen.
When I followed a call to ministry, I knew that part of my work would focus on the public square and what it means to be a LGBTQ person of faith in the South. So with Meghann’s support, we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality together.
We were told that what we were doing was unrealistic and that we were reaching way beyond the stars. But with patience and grit, we kept pushing forward. And finally, marriage equality became legal across all 50 states.
**That’s why on this National Coming Out Day, I’m celebrating all of the progress that’s been made and reflecting on how far we still have to go. On a daily basis, I’m reminded of what’s at stake, especially for LGBTQ youth who are bravely coming out.**
If we’re going to ensure our laws finally work to fully protect LGBTQ people, then we must defend and expand our House and Senate majorities and pass the Equality Act.
We never gave up on the fight for marriage equality until we won. That’s how I feel about this race to be the next NC-11 representative.
[**We win when we work together. Will you please chip in $25 or more today to our grassroots campaign to help us spread our message and organize across Western NC.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474636/311230770/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)

| | [Other amount ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37474638/311230774/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211012_FR_ComingOutBump_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTFiZDI1Yy05ZjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n-Y8HvHFxFTM_yhuZzSAEvz8ZGGJjS4NmQlsDhWjhy4=)

National Coming Out Day is about celebrating the LGBTQ community. It’s about supporting people who are coming out for the first time. And it’s about recommitting to being brave and strong about working to create a world where things considered “impossible” actually happen.
We’re in this together -- always.
\-- Jasmine

name: Nicole Neily, Parents Defending Education
subject: DOJ: “Concerned parents = domesticterrorists?”
body:
Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for st
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6stao5gf5ll2osskuo8fhfcvcl9v4r52d0np6vg_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1jm4ob4clh2bs) Fellow American, Maybe you heard the news – recently, the U.S. Department of Justice said **they will mobilize the FBI against parents ... for standing up for their own children!** On October 4, 2021, the DOJ announced a new initiative to address “harassment, intimidation and threats of violence” against school board members and employees – including but not limited to **the creation of a federal task force as well as dedicated lines of communication for threat reporting, assessment, and response by law enforcement under the auspices of the FBI.** [**Tell the DOJ this is unacceptable**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zlh5tqa687fms22ce9gfi9fkmbjcv85qn2hnu85g_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1jm4ob4clh2bs) My name is Nicole Neily, and I’m the President of Parents Defending Education. We’re a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas, and fighting against indoctrination in the classroom -- and _for_ the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. We are also standing with parents like you who are troubled by what’s happening in our schools today. You might be wondering how something so outrageous -- **the FBI being mobilized against parents for simply speaking up for their own children** \-- could happen in “the land of the free.” It all started recently, when the National School Board Association (NSBA) sent a letter to President Biden asking for help **silencing parents like you** who are demanding change at school board meetings. In their letter, NSBA cites a tiny number of minor incidents to insinuate that** parents who are criticizing and protesting the decisions of school boards are or may be engaging in “domestic terrorism and hate crimes."** While PDE naturally does not support _anyone_ who uses violence or threats against school board members, officials, or teachers, the NSBA choosing to invoke the PATRIOT Act (which was passed after 9/11 to uncover potential terrorist plots) takes it WAY too far. The association of legitimate protest with terrorism and violence reveals both NSBA’s contempt for parents and their unwillingness to understand and hear the sincere cries of parents on behalf of their children. In short, **_NSBA’s letter to President Biden was a thinly veiled threat_** , intended to intimidate into silence and submission the very constituents -- parents and taxpayers like you, -- that its members ostensibly represent. And the Department of Justice is wholly complicit in this charade. [**Tell the DOJ you OPPOSE FBI persecution of parents**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjgu0mehjaldujk8bv8ubmfhdnthqlcdi9q9uv20_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1jm4ob4clh2bs) I’m in awe that NSBA would choose to threaten parents for having the courage to hold them accountable -- as I’m sure you are. And it’s unthinkable that concerned parents should be equated with domestic terrorists. **We will not be bullied.** We refuse to have our free speech chilled by threats. America’s parents have a constitutional right to petition our elected officials -- and Parents Defending Education will continue to do so, with the support of parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens like you! The good news is that this proves the NSBA, the teachers’ unions, and radical school boards around the country are running scared. They’ve been bullying us for decades -- and now that parents are standing up to them, they’re terrified. **The mere fact that they’ve summoned the Biden administration to back up their crazy power trip clearly shows they feel the power slipping from their hands.** In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. [**Tell the DOJ you won’t be bullied**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqrdf586uegfgk2bbnlq1f07d5svjdl0nbmpqe90_rp22sh2s8i66pj1c1jm4ob4clh2bs) So thank you for standing with us -- and standing _up_ for America’s parents! Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education 4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central
MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the persons or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. 1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

In cities and towns across America, we’re seeing a backlash against the school administrators and bureaucrats who disdain the parents whose children they are entrusted with educating. This behavior is arrogant and out of touch and these fiefdoms must be exposed and held accountable. And that’s exactly what Parents Defending Education is doing -- keeping the pressure on the NSBA, teachers’ unions, and school boards. But we need the support of parents, teachers, and concerned Americans like you to effectively fight back against these bullies and defend the rights of American parents and school children. So thank you for standing with us -- and standing up for America’s parents! | | Derek, when I heard that _The Cook Political Report_ shifted the Virginia governor’s race from “Leans Democrat” to “Toss Up,” I thought for certain we’d have a surge in grassroots donor support. I mean for weeks, everyone from the _Associated Press_ to Donald Trump was claiming that Youngkin has the momentum. **_So I was stunned when my team told me all the bad news wasn’t fueling more donations._** If I haven’t been direct enough about this, let me be direct right now: I need you, Derek. Glenn Youngkin is using his bottomless bank account to flood the airwaves in the final weeks of the campaign. If we don’t have the resources to compete, Democrats may lose 2021’s most important race. **_[So, what do you say? Will you step up and split a contribution between my campaign and Mark Warner right away? We’re in a make-or-break moment, and I need your support now more than ever.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37475471/311234123/1940995021?refcode=mw_em_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODllYzYyNS1hMzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibGc1tjWFr7BbelBYYHjax4i1w_mKgQ9SIY15QLEikA=)_** Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37475472/311234124/1940995021?refcode=mw_em_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODllYzYyNS1hMzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibGc1tjWFr7BbelBYYHjax4i1w_mKgQ9SIY15QLEikA=)**

Hi friend,

As the active Democrat you are, I’m sure you get all types of fundraising emails. But today, I just wanted to reach out personally with _no tricks, and no gimmicks._

_The Question Biden Needs to Answer_

Fellow Conservative,

I'm writing today to share an article with you in which I was featured a few weeks ago. I realize that this article is a couple of weeks old now, however we've been very busy tying up loose ends and filing our 3rd quarter report, so you'll have to forgive me in circulating this piece after the fact. That said, I think it's worth your time.

Best,
John

This article originally appeared in _National Review_ on September 23rd, 2021

**WHENEVER** something awful happens in our government, there is a kind of informal competition among columnists to be the first to write: “What did the president know, and when did he know it?”

It is a tedious cliché. But the matter of the Kabul drone strike in which U.S. forces killed ten innocent civilians — including an aid worker and seven children — raises precisely that question. Joe Biden as commander in chief bears some general culpability for this slaughter — but if he was leaning on his underlings to put some bodies into body bags in order to grease the political skids with their blood, then his culpability is more intimate.

Ten innocent civilians — including an aid worker and seven children — raises precisely that question. Joe Biden as commander in chief bears some general culpability for this slaughter — but if he was leaning on his underlings to put some bodies into body bags in order to grease the political skids with their blood, then his culpability is more intimate.

The bungled, headlong U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan has been an embarrassment to the Biden administration (to say nothing of the country), and even President Biden’s staunchest allies have found it difficult to defend his team’s performance in this matter. His competency has been called into question by people who are not normally inclined to do so in public.

Naturally, those inclined to think the worst of Joe Biden have had a lot to say, too, much of it both valid and valuable. A specific accusation put forward by some Republicans is that President Biden, embarrassed by the terrorist bombing at Abbey Gate that killed more U.S. troops in Afghanistan than any single attack in more than a decade, was desperate to be seen offering a robust response and therefore put political pressure on the military, encouraging the kind of sloppy work behind that led to that fateful drone attack. The charge, in short, is that Joe Biden burned ten innocents on the altar of his political ambitions.

Mike Pompeo is one high-profile critic who has put forward that line of criticism. Pompeo is understood to be positioning himself as a Republican presidential contender in 2024. But, whatever you think of Pompeo as a politician, he is also a former secretary of state and former director of the CIA. As such, he is reasonably well versed in how these targeting decisions are made, what fail-safes are in place to avoid a massacre of civilians such as the one just perpetrated by U.S. forces, and the ways in which political pressure can influence the process.

It looks like they were in a rush,” Pompeo told Fox News. “They were in a hurry. You could see the political pressure. And if there was one thing that drove this failed evacuation, it was the arbitrary political deadline that President Biden set.”

**John Castorani is another Republican office seeker (he is running for the House from Virginia’s seventh district) who has come to the same conclusion.** Like Pompeo, he has some experience in these matters, but a little closer to the ground: He is a combat veteran and intelligence officer who spent much of his career in Africa tracking down — successfully, in the end — the organizers of the attack in Benghazi that took the lives of four Americans, including an ambassador. He was deployed to both Afghanistan and Iraq, as well as Syria.

“In layman’s terms,” he says, “I have a lot of experience with the targeting side and tactical intelligence.”

There is much about that Kabul strike that looks questionable to him: For one thing, it is unusual to conduct such a strike inside a city; for another, there is a formal process for reviewing such operations for the presence of women and children. Castorani talks about the “deconfliction” protocol. “If I have a target that I’m tracking, and I’m confident it’s him, I’m looking for corroborating intelligence. You want human intelligence, geospatial intelligence, and signal intelligence, and then you start spinning up.”

(“Deconfliction” is a bit of jargon that enjoyed some brief journalistic prominence when it was used to describe the efforts of Russian and U.S. forces in Syria not to kill each other by accident.)

In the immediate term, the catastrophic error in Kabul points to a failure of the Biden administration. But in Castorani’s view, it also points to a failure of Congress. “I wasn’t there, but I can almost assure you that there was executive-branch pressure put on Centcom to get a strike off. There are questions that need to be asked by members of Congress. What was the intelligence that brought you to the conclusion that you could strike that target? Our legislative body should be informed. If not in public, then at least in a SCIF.”

(That’s “Sensitive Compartmented Information Facility,” a term you may remember from one of the impeachments of Donald Trump.)

But that isn’t happening. It probably won’t happen in the near future.

Biden’s party controls Congress — for now — which means that effective oversight is unlikely — for now.

But Americans will wonder: **Who made the call on that drone strike? And, Biden being Biden: What did the president know, and did he know that he knew it?**

HELP ME FLIP THIS SEAT** **››**](http://links.johncastorani.com/u/click?_t=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_m=84af6a08d2ae409da9ea836aaa3cc35a&_e=mrplRD9dOV7VLO6DcvkUpqadgS6LUtkQV6Ndy8QjSVwW7nD4htmbDybObwr34qkLmKs_WR3SJfr3cKfWuHCjkg2HLI5VjvRfWictO8Jfk_UIhmhQeyFXV89u_jO3f7Vl_Jlpx-4S9xNyEfjfaHcNjWOmImjIJzMRNZ7L5tmGjqGTUDFi0Kqx_BkEDm3Glef6TxTUIczdFVKdJ-MCKjGeRkRi-Sg3WSG50Ngfkkm08z8xcr4Ps3PTeijUq_5YwA2GiRPXBnM7lQ-JNpxs7EtBPlpwvdkxn3nX8cL0ZMAOOBVYkOBfacJ5_N_OqiVEpG1IF5UsLX3Y3SQyjIdmN1jazztOkRLB3fH7bRI2ArV1vMGvl-nkK4ylSfNoTVUt-g_vVn-Tu-MeM4eKPbziVt5XcHHCbv28tspGmZiAsdS0Qd42nJvK1rqzLHIKfsiYqJkyvZS3XVFDo2lwstCl54HAtvsh0Sp66yQzZlb8AT8NaT2xY4KScyB6IFPe9uSwSjET)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476249/311238291/-793144256?refcode=dpva-em-211012-andrea&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTY4MDRiYy1hNzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=crsMObzL2yc0JVu-asZAqo5xrn-hgEX6mq2Bl54RYjw=&emci=20327612-832b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=656804bc-a72b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=15759664)

| | Hi, all! As the newest addition to the DPVA’s Digital Team (and as one of the people behind these emails), I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself and share why this year’s election is important to me. As a current journalism and political science student at Virginia Commonwealth University, you can probably (correctly) guess that I am heavily invested in both national and state politics. However, this wasn’t always the case for me. To be frank, as a teenager, I couldn’t care less about politics. It wasn’t until the 2016 election where I started to pay attention and discover what my values were for the first time in my life. I didn’t know much at 16-years-old, but I did know one thing— Donald Trump and his values absolutely did not align with mine. Coming of age alongside Donald Trump’s presidency was a unique experience—and for me, this meant morphing from a politically apathetic teenager into a passionate, educated voter. Today, this means interning at the DPVA & making an effort to vote in November— to keep people like Glenn Youngkin and his Trumpian ideology out of office. **Today that means reaching out to folks like you and asking for your support.** I urge you all to do something to make your own voices heard before November’s election. You are one of our strongest supporters—and Election Day will be here before we know it. clean_body: | | | Hi, all! As the newest addition to the DPVA’s Digital Team (and as one of the people behind these emails), I wanted to take a minute to introduce myself and share why this year’s election is important to me. As a current journalism and political science student at Virginia Commonwealth University, you can probably (correctly) guess that I am heavily invested in both national and state politics. However, this wasn’t always the case for me. To be frank, as a teenager, I couldn’t care less about politics. It wasn’t until the 2016 election where I started to pay attention and discover what my values were for the first time in my life. I didn’t know much at 16-years-old, but I did know one thing— Donald Trump and his values absolutely did not align with mine. Coming of age alongside Donald Trump’s presidency was a unique experience—and for me, this meant morphing from a politically apathetic teenager into a passionate, educated voter. Today, this means interning at the DPVA & making an effort to vote in November— to keep people like Glenn Youngkin and his Trumpian ideology out of office. Today that means reaching out to folks like you and asking for your support. I urge you all to do something to make your own voices heard before November’s election. You are one of our strongest supporters—and Election Day will be here before we know it. We need your help. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for your support! See you online, Andrea Kaniecki Democratic Party of Virginia = = | | Click here to . | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. body:
I don't take this for granted

|
---

| | [**_I want to take a moment before my Midnight Deadline to share my story and explain why your $12 will help me win my race for Congress. I hope you’ll take the time to read it, but if you’re in a rush please chip in $12 before you sign off. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476819/311240247/1129282168?refcode=20211012_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MzYjljMy1hODJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bAM49Xf9kyrkTm2i8RTOWcpdYlSvzmNvjE1XYLHX4=)

I’m the proud son of immigrants.

My parents fought to create a better life for my brothers and me.

We lived paycheck to paycheck, until their hard work paid off.

I became a public school teacher to support kids like me.

I never imagined that one day I’d be running for Congress.

[**_That’s why I don’t take this for granted, not even for a single day._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476820/311240255/1129282168?refcode=20211012_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MzYjljMy1hODJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bAM49Xf9kyrkTm2i8RTOWcpdYlSvzmNvjE1XYLHX4=)

My story is the story of people across the country. I know the struggles hard working folks face. [**_That's why I'll fight to:_

Protect our healthcare

Build affordable housing

Create better paying jobs

Make sure working folks get a break, not billionaires and corporations**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476821/311240262/1129282168?refcode=20211012_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MzYjljMy1hODJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bAM49Xf9kyrkTm2i8RTOWcpdYlSvzmNvjE1XYLHX4=) [**_But before I can put these ideas into action, I need your help. I’m facing a close race against a well-funded Republican Congressman. Hitting my $6,950 Midnight Goal will be the difference between funding a winning campaign, and struggling to keep up. So I’m personally asking: will you chip in $12 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476822/311240270/1129282168?refcode=20211012_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MzYjljMy1hODJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bAM49Xf9kyrkTm2i8RTOWcpdYlSvzmNvjE1XYLHX4=)

I’ll be honest: winning this race is going to take everything we’ve got.

But me and my grassroots supporters know exactly what we’re fighting for.

If we want to see change, we need more everyday people like me in Congress.

[**_That’s why I’m asking for your support before midnight. We have an unprecedented opportunity to flip this seat for Democrats. But I need your help to defy the odds and hit my $6,950 goal. Will you chip in $12 to help me get there? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476823/311240277/1129282168?refcode=20211012_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=12&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MzYjljMy1hODJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bAM49Xf9kyrkTm2i8RTOWcpdYlSvzmNvjE1XYLHX4=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476824/311240278/1129282168?refcode=20211012_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2MzYjljMy1hODJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=98bAM49Xf9kyrkTm2i8RTOWcpdYlSvzmNvjE1XYLHX4=)

Then this leaked GOP poll is bad news for you. With just weeks left until Election Day, internal Republican polling shows Trump-endorsed Glenn Youngkin ahead of Terry by three points. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. But now, all of that progress is under attack. If Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch of progress that Democrats have fought so hard for. Moreover, a Youngkin win means Trump-supporting Republicans all over the country will get a huge momentum boost ahead of next year’s make-or-break midterms. = | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for taking action, Terry for VA =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. | | | **Our Republic is facing the greatest threat of our lifetime. **

The Radical Left is determined to do WHATEVER it takes to strip away every single freedom our great nation has given us.

_They 're coming after your freedom of speech.

They're coming after your guns.

They're coming after every possible way for you to prosper and succeed in America. _

That's right, Peter, the Democrats value their socialist agenda more than they value you and your families well-being.

**I witness every single day in Congress how unhinged the Left truly is. The radical policies they try to sneak through and attempts to purge every Trump policy, is just the beginning.**

**I've seen enough and it 's time we take the fight to the Democrats. If you are a true Peter, and stand by his side, _[then fight with me to get our nation back on track.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58514607:JsyfS-2yN:m:1:3253819041:8F52D8D3AB24A646879E8B675D3288AA:r "then fight with me
to get our nation back on track.")_**

Peter, please understand, **the Left is out of touch and out of control.**

Not a single dollar will be spared to push their lies and destroy President Trump's policies and legacy. **Even if it 's at your expense.**

They are already spending millions of dollars of dark money across the nation to unseat Conservatives who speak out against their despicable behavior. **[I need you in the fight.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58514607:JsyfS-2yN:m:1:3253819041:8F52D8D3AB24A646879E8B675D3288AA:r "I need you in

---
I'll be honest with you, Peter, we have a difficult road ahead of us, but I know I can count on you when President Trump and conservatives need you most.

Fighting to take back the House and the Senate so we can restore Trump's conservative majority is no longer a want, it is a need. Without it, the future of our nation, and the future country that we leave for our children will be in ruins.

_The Left is all in on protecting their majority. Are you with us? Can I count on you to step up TODAY to fight to protect the future of our Constitutional Republic?_

Your support will help get us one step closer to taking back our country from the Biden regime. We can't do this without you!

**[Please, contribute whatever you can to save America.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58514607:JsyfS-2yN:m:1:3253819041:8F52D8D3AB24A646879E8B675D3288AA:r "Please,

For Freedom,

name: Team Maggie
subject: Investing in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
We've said it before, and we'll say it again, team, control of the Senate hinges on New Hampshire. We know you get a lot of emails about the urgency of protecting our fragile Senate majority, but we can't stress to you enough how vital it is that we reelect Maggie Hassan. Thanks to Senator Hassan's leadership, Senate Democrats have passed critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan – putting shots in arms, delivering much-need relief to small businesses and families, and expanding the Child Tax Credit. If Mitch McConnell takes back the gavel as majority leader, he will do everything in his power to block Democrats' agenda and undo all the progress they've made so far. McConnell and his dark money allies are already spending millions in New Hampshire to rally their far-right base and unseat Maggie. With our mid-month goal just around the corner, we can't afford to fall short. **[Will you chip in $5 to help us stay on track? New Hampshire is a notorious swing state, so investing in this race early will help us build the robust campaign infrastructure needed to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476855/311240577/-214106137?refcode=e20211012_invest-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmQwMWUyOS1hOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64Om_KsoSMIvev_6_HOHub_kC_gGdNXdQi6G28HKJhI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476856/311240578/-214106137?refcode=e20211012_invest-b&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmQwMWUyOS1hOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64Om_KsoSMIvev_6_HOHub_kC_gGdNXdQi6G28HKJhI=)

Thanks to Senator Hassan's leadership, Senate Democrats have passed critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan – putting shots in arms, delivering much-need relief to small businesses and families, and expanding the Child Tax Credit. If Mitch McConnell takes back the gavel as majority leader, he will do everything in his power to block Democrats' agenda and undo all the progress they've made so far. McConnell and his dark money allies are already spending millions in New Hampshire to rally their far-right base and unseat Maggie. With our mid-month goal just around the corner, we can't afford to fall short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = = = This is a key race – if we lose here in New Hampshire, we will lose our Senate majority. Your donation today will help us respond to Republican attacks, reach Granite Staters across the state, and keep our television ads on the air. = Thank you so much for your support. – Team Maggie | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States To receive fewer emails, click Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Maggie for NH

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Election Interference: Do you know the real players?
body:
It’s happened to you. One of your posts on Facebook or Twitter magically disappears or maybe you’ve been banned like I was.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw) It’s happened to you. One of your posts on Facebook or Twitter magically disappears or maybe you’ve been banned like I was.

It’s happened to tens of millions of conservatives . . . including a sitting United States President, Donald J. Trump . . . [**and this is our chance to fight back and END Cancel Culture and Election Interference**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw).

I’m about to file a groundbreaking lawsuit that will FINALLY expose the players who have been manipulating our culture and controlling our elections with the help of Big Tech.

[**Be a part of my lawsuit by chipping in today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)

| | [SUPPORT LAURA'S LAWSUIT NOW](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)
---

While Big Tech Billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey have been the targets of other lawsuits and campaigns in the past – they’re just the button pushers who happily support the communist agenda of their masters.

My lawsuit takes aim at the secret players who are driving Cancel Culture in America, and you’ll be shocked at who they are – **and how YOU have actually been supporting them nearly your entire life**.

While I can’t say who it is now, [**by supporting my lawsuit**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw), you’ll be among the first to know who is behind the drive to silence conservatives – **and you’ll be able to fight back with me**.

**I have to be prepared for a complete assault by billion-dollar companies as soon as I file** , and I have to raise an incredible amount of money to keep going – so it will take thousands of us supporting this case, and [**I’m humbly asking for your support**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw).

[**Please donate any amount that you can.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)

| [SUPPORT LAURA'S LAWSUIT NOW](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)
---

Cancel Culture isn’t about wiping out content that the Big Tech Mafia finds offensive, it’s about crushing all influence from within our entire movement!

**It’s about controlling our elections and our ability to communicate and persuade other Americans!**

Don’t think for a second this is about some conservative influencers whining that they’ve been banned on social media.

In 2020, I ran for Congress and was banned on Facebook and Twitter while my Democrat opponent received access to those sites – **which was an illegal in-kind campaign contribution**.

My campaign made history as the first federal campaign to be de-platformed by Big Tech.

While that was blatant and out in the open Big Tech election interference, behind the scenes, the Big Tech Mafia worked like crazy to suppress posts that supported conservative candidates and ideas throughout the 2020 election cycle.

And just like I warned in 2018 . . . when I confronted Jack Dorsey during the Congressional hearing on Tech Censorship . . . in 2022 and 2024, **they’ll do it all over again if we don’t stop them now!**

[**Help me stop them by backing my lawsuit today.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/w04plz7JjLtDBnXVhE953g/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)

If you can donate, as soon as my lawsuit is filed, I’ll shoot you an email with a copy of the legal complaint, exposing the power players, and together, **we can watch them run!**

Thanks so much for your time and your support.

With Gratitude,

Laura Loomer

(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)
[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/LEma1Z4Bqb1SAvdvy7ooUw)

---

name: Eddie Geller
subject: Progressives held the line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Want to see some elected leaders actually following through on their promises to constituents? | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37476910/311240718/810955667?refcode2=29f38eba-a92b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&refcode=fl_em_fr_20211013progressives_TE_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWYzOGViYS1hOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZEPtqOtjLja-R_cLEpjk8NeFTIp8xVAU9Tmof_LUsME=)
---
Friends,
Want to see some elected leaders actually following through on their promises to constituents? Look no further than the Congressional Progressive Caucus.
**Earlier this month, progressives held the line, refused to yield under pressure, and kept alive Democrats’ hopes for the core pieces of President Biden’s agenda. Bravo!**

body:
The science and experts are clear: Masks work, vaccines work, and Johnson’s approach is wrong. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477024/311241248/-1670121809?refcode=EM_FR_211012byeron_N_drj_90DA_6_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjZDRkNC1hOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTCt0AL8aMhhhymH4o2Zqll_17RjBi-Gf4q8ciRY1LU=)
---
Peter,

Ron Johnson is at it again, defying health officials and putting Wisconsinites in danger. This time, he’s directly attacking top health officials, contending that public health officials have ignored his preferred phony science. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477025/311241249/-1670121809?refcode=EM_FR_211012byeron_N_drj_90DA_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOWRjZDRkNC1hOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WTCt0AL8aMhhhymH4o2Zqll_17RjBi-Gf4q8ciRY1LU=) The science and experts are clear: Masks work, vaccines work, and _**Johnson’s approach is wrong.**_ It’s not an exaggeration to say that Ron Johnson’s anti-science approach is putting everyone at risk.

Ron Johnson’s evolution from Tea Party insurgent to the Senate’s biggest anti-science member didn’t just happen overnight. Senator Johnson was elected in 2010, and he’s changed for the worse since then.

**[We’re fighting to unseat dangerous Ron Johnson, and we need your support. name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Did you see what Nancy Pelosi said late last night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Democrats should not leave child care, paid leave, education, housing, health care, and climate action behind.
#
We can't believe this, Peter.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7729?refcode=em20211012-713&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=713%2E420207%2EiIMSCT)
Democrats should NOT leave child care, paid leave, universal pre-K, community college, affordable housing, Medicare expansion, climate action, and a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers behind. We CAN’T leave working families and those struggling to get by behind.
So why is Speaker Pelosi suggesting we should allow a couple of conservative Democrats to leave behind popular cornerstone policies of the $3.5 trillion Build Back Better Act? We need to deliver.
Pramila has been leading the progressive fight in Congress and urging her colleagues to protect desperately needed economic relief for the American people and urgent action to address the climate crisis. **Democrats should not be negotiating against themselves. We should be passing President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act and delivering for the people.**
**[If you’re still with Pramila in the fight for President Biden’s entire Build Back Better Act, please fuel her work with a $3 donation today. Our people and our planet can’t afford to wait any longer for serious, transformative action.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7729?refcode=em20211012-713&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=713%2E420207%2EiIMSCT)**
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7729?refcode=em20211012-713&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=713%2E420207%2EiIMSCT)**
While corporations spend millions of dollars to lobby Congress AGAINST long-overdue investments in children, families, workers, and seniors, so many in our country are afraid of being left behind.
Just look at this New York Times headline: _‘We Suffer While You Debate’: Many Fear Being Left Behind as Democrats Trim Spending Bill_
The people elected Democrats so we could deliver for them. That means expanding Medicare, securing universal child care, pre-K, and community college, fighting climate change, and investing in affordable housing. **Pramila won’t stop fighting to deliver for the people, no matter what corporations, the GOP, and a few conservative members of her own party do to try and stop her.**
**[Pramila needs your support at this critical moment in the fight for the Build Back Better Act. Can you chip in $3 to support the fight to hold the line and deliver economic relief for the people?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7729?refcode=em20211012-713&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=713%2E420207%2EiIMSCT)**
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7729?refcode=em20211012-713&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=713%2E420207%2EiIMSCT)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211012-713-footer&t=25&refcode2=713_420207_iIMSCT&akid=713%2E420207%2EiIMSCT)**

name: M. Lopez
subject: need to ask for your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor
body:
Hi, friend – I wanted to reach out one last time about our critical Founding Donor goal. **With just hours left until our midnight deadline, we're falling _just _short of the goal we need to hit to kickstart our campaign, defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue.**
---
Arizona is at a tipping point. For years, extremist Republicans like Kelli Ward and failed politicians like Doug Ducey have put politics before working people – pushing partisan lies and conspiracy theories instead of tackling the real challenges facing our state. We can change that, but I'm going to need your help to do it.
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight _confirms_ that Arizona's governor's race is a toss-up – which means Democrats can win this thing – but POLITICO is reporting that Republicans will be spending BIG time to defeat us.

If we're going to overcome the GOP's megadonors, win this race and restore the promise of Arizona, we're going to need to hit every single fundraising goal from now to Election Day – starting with this one.

**So please, I'm personally asking:[Will you make a contribution of $5 or more now – as much as you can spare before our crucial midnight deadline – to become a Founding Donor of my campaign for governor? Every dollar will go toward defeating Republican extremism in Arizona and winning a better future for our state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477907/311245090/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DN501YgY2dTb_K6f5FfgIykGuO18bLGYW_2jfvXOztU=)**
Thank you,

Marco Lopez
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Lopez, Marco**
Date: Mon, Oct 11, 2021
Subject: my story
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477908/311245091/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DN501YgY2dTb_K6f5FfgIykGuO18bLGYW_2jfvXOztU=)
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to become one of the 500 Founding Donors we need to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona's governorship blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
My story is the story of Arizona: I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents taught me that _la promesa_ of Arizona is that if you work hard and dream big, anything is possible.

Throughout my life, I've been blessed to live that promise – and I've dedicated my life to making it real for others. From being elected mayor of my hometown to serving in the Obama administration, I've always sought to bring people together to solve big problems.
But with the failed leadership of Republicans like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey – politicians who would rather divide us and spread lies about the 2020 election than tackle the real problems facing our state – that promise is no longer being met. **I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you're ready for a change, I have to ask: **
**[Will you give $5 or more now to become a Founding Donor of our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477909/311245092/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DN501YgY2dTb_K6f5FfgIykGuO18bLGYW_2jfvXOztU=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477910/311245093/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DN501YgY2dTb_K6f5FfgIykGuO18bLGYW_2jfvXOztU=)
Becoming a Founding Donor of our campaign is about more than a donation – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for _all_ our people.

Your support is essential to power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – a state that delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but that _still_ has a Republican governor. I know we can change that, and I'm not alone:
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a _toss-up – _and now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power.
We can flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical midnight deadline – to become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477911/311245094/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DN501YgY2dTb_K6f5FfgIykGuO18bLGYW_2jfvXOztU=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez

I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you're ready for a change, I have to ask: = = Becoming a Founding Donor of our campaign is about more than a donation – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for all our people. Your support is essential to power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – a state that delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but that still has a Republican governor. I know we can change that, and I'm not alone: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a toss-up – and now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power. We can flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. So please, I'm counting on your support: = Thanks for joining me in this fight. Marco Lopez | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Marco Lopez for Governor PO Box 34672 Phoenix, AZ 85067 United States | | 2021 | Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor Authorized by Marco Lopez

| | |
Peter, I just finished reading your response to our Biden Approval Poll and it reinforced why I am so glad to have you on this team.

Here are my main takeaways from your response:

✔️ You love America
✔️ You hate socialism
✔️ Biden has failed you

Did I sum that up pretty well?

I need more American Patriots like you on this team. I know Conservatives are the silent majority, we quietly go to work, take care of our families, and serve our communities...so it can be hard to reach true American Patriots. But I need to find and get to know as many of you right now as I can.

Could you do one more thing for me? I need your help with my outreach program. Like I said, I want to find and get in contact with as many Patriotic Conservatives as possible. Friend,
---
I just stepped out of our campaign’s latest finance meeting, and I’ll be honest, I’m deeply concerned.
---
**_You see, last week’s Facebook outage blocked our fundraising ads, and ultimately, cost us __thousands of dollars__ in grassroots contributions. _**
---
And after our team picked apart our budget to see where we could reallocate funds, there’s simply no other way to cut it -- we’re facing a **_$12,615_** deficit to kick off the month.
---
That’s why I’m reaching out to all of our top supporters, to ask if you can help us make up the difference so we don’t start October in the red.
---

clean_body: I just reviewed the budget with our team and... | Friend, I just stepped out of our campaign’s latest finance meeting, and I’ll be honest, I’m deeply concerned. You see, last week’s Facebook outage blocked our fundraising ads, and ultimately, cost us thousands of dollars in grassroots contributions. And after our team picked apart our budget to see where we could reallocate funds, there’s simply no other way to cut it -- we’re facing a $12,615 deficit to kick off the month. That’s why I’m reaching out to all of our top supporters, to ask if you can help us make up the difference so we don’t start October in the red. Thank you! \- Rebecca Sent from my iPhone Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

Dean Heller -- _the guy who doesn’t believe in mask mandates and says he “likes what Texas did” when they effectively banned abortions_ \-- says he wants to “fire” Gov. Sisolak.
**Folks, Nevadans already “fired” Dean Heller at the ballot box three years ago** _because_ _we knew he wasn’t the kind of person we would want representing our state._
And since Heller was booted out of office by voters, **Steve Sisolak has been a champion for Nevada’s hardworking families.** Since being elected, he’s **increased access to healthcare, expanded voting access, and strengthened public schools.**
_This is just the beginning._ All **FIVE** of Steve’s Republican opponents are ready to jump on the bandwagon and try to chip away at Gov. Sisolak’s accomplishments with attack ads and disinformation.
**_Not on our watch._**

We’ve been so honored by the response from our supporters about the launch of The Fight, our quarterly newsletter featuring updates including our joint achievements. Supporters like you empower us to do this critical work. Our successes are your successes –– we hope The Fight is a celebration of our collective work.
Fair Fight |

****

| | Friend - We’ve been so honored by the response from our supporters about the launch of The Fight, our quarterly newsletter featuring updates including our joint achievements. Supporters like you empower us to do this critical work. Our successes are your successes –– we hope The Fight is a celebration of our collective work. **A MESSAGE FROM LAUREN GROH-WARGO** _Dear Readers of The Fight,_ _With two monumental federal voting rights bills awaiting a vote in the Senate, while the attack on voting rights continues raging in the states, we are at a precipice. Our democracy is in peril but our march for progress continues. Nationally, the GOP is ringing misleading alarm bells to distract voters with inflammatory rhetoric and disinformation. At home in Georgia, Republicans in the state legislature have begun an unprecedented process to take over the Fulton County Board of Elections, using the new powers they gave themselves to undermine elections in legislation earlier this year. This is an attempt to undermine democracy in one of our most resilient and diverse Democratic counties. There are fires everywhere, but I want you to know: we are still fighting, and each and every week we have small to large wins on slowing, stopping or mitigating the damage being done by vote suppressors. Fair Fight Action believes in a future where voting is an equitable, accessible, and trusted process in our democracy. We believe in voters and their right to cast a ballot to make their voices heard. Our democracy should work for everyone. And until it does, we will continue to do the work to help voters across the country. I urge you to stay engaged, stay in this fight, and arm yourself with the resiliency of all those who fought this fight before us, as who has the right to vote and have their vote counted has been fraught and complex since the beginning of our country. When we fight, we win! Thank you for all you do._ _Yours in the fight,_ _Lauren, Senior Advisor to Fair Fight PAC _ **KEY UPDATES** _Fair Fight Action’s Civics for the Culture_ Fair Fight Action’s Civics For the Culture released its first in an eight-part series of videos for young people of color. Fair Fight Action will prioritize these videos in social media posts and digital ads to deepen engagement amongst young people who are often overlooked in between election cycles. Civics for the Culture is Fair Fight Action’s targeted campaign to educate and engage young Black and brown people in the political process before, during, and after Election Day. The educational series will also serve as a curriculum for More Than A Vote as they engage young voters and athletes associated with the organization. Videos from the series will debut every two weeks between now and the end of 2021. The first season of the series will help demystify civics topics like the need for pre-clearance of changes to election rules, the process for how a bill becomes a law, redistricting, and the role of elected officials at different levels of government. The first video, released last month, features Civics For the Culture co-creator Chelsey Hall and Stacey Abrams, founder of Fair Fight Action. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477954/311245304/-291861850?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) **_Where We Are_** _Fair Fight Action_ On August 24, the U.S. House of Representatives [passed the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477955/311245332/1218243168?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). This tremendous victory is due to months of work by progressive advocates and allies like you. On September 14, a group of Democratic Senators introduced the [Freedom to Vote Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477956/311245333/1490424409?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). This bill is a reformulated version of the For the People Act that addresses many of Fair Fight Action’s key priorities. [On October 6, voting rights leaders in the U.S. Senate introduced the Senate version of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477957/311245334/96167387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) Together, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act will protect our right to vote by ensuring all eligible Americans can register to vote, cast a ballot, and have that ballot counted fairly.
_Hot Call Summer and Freedom to Vote Fall_ Fair Fight Action relaunched the successful campaign [Hot Call Summer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477962/311245346/1361141168?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) as [Freedom to Vote Fall](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477964/311245364/1862954819?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). By September, this effort had driven over 80,000 calls to Congress to urge them to pass federal voting rights legislation! Hot Call Summer collaborated with celebrities and influencers to highlight the fight for federal voting rights. [Check out our collaboration with EARTHGANG](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477965/311245378/321858489?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477966/311245394/-323327104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) _What is Next for Voting Rights in the Senate_ Together, Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action have fought to make voting rights a top priority for Congress. Fair Fight Action is expecting movement in the Senate in the coming weeks on both the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. That’s why we need you to join us in Freedom to Vote Fall and call your Senators at 833-465-7142, every single day to demand their support for these bills. _Centering Voters and Their Stories_ In August, Fair Fight Action [flew dozens of voters (several pictured below) from 16 states to Washington, D.C](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477967/311245399/-1912124541?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). to speak face-to-face with their Senators and share their personal experiences facing voter suppression. To further drive the urgency for Congress to pass critical federal voting legislation, Fair Fight Action led a seven-state national media program featuring testimonials from voters. The first ad featured voters from West Virginia, Georgia, Louisiana, and Michigan calling on Congress to act. The [second ad](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477968/311245400/-1345942244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) was released in partnership with Four Directions Native Vote, featuring Native leaders working to protect the freedom to vote. The ad emphasizes the importance of protecting the freedom to vote for Native American communities, who continue to face disproportionate barriers in voting. In September, Fair Fight Action continued to center voters’ voices by releasing a series of six videos featuring voters from Georgia, West Virginia, Michigan, Louisiana, New Hampshire, and Utah sharing their personal experiences with anti-voting efforts. We encourage you to listen to their moving stories at [MyVotingStory.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477971/311245402/-440665644?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) and share the site with your friends and family. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477973/311245406/927175313?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) _Disability Council_ In April, Fair Fight Action launched our Disability Council, comprised of disability advocates and policy experts from across the country, to better advocate for disabled voters. In August the Disability Council [put out a public statement in support of the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477974/311245407/-1003843457?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277), outlining the important things the bill does to protect disabled voters from discrimination. Disabled voters in this country already face disproportionate barriers to accessing the ballot box. With the onslaught of 581 anti-voter bills introduced in 49 states this year, disabled voters could face further restrictions that will make it even more difficult for them to cast their ballots. _Legislative Session_ One of the most harmful provisions of Georgia’s Senate Bill 202 allows the Republican-controlled State Election Board to grab local power and take over county election boards. Fulton County, the county with the most voters of color in the state, is the GOP’s primary target. In August, Republican state legislators requested a performance review of Fulton County’s election officials as the first step to a long process to take over the county’s election board. The Fulton performance review is the first time a takeover provision has been employed in Georgia or anywhere in the country. The Fulton performance review represents a dangerous escalation of the assault on our democracy, and Fair Fight Action will be working to mitigate its harmful impact. Fair Fight Action also continues to push for [Medicaid expansion](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477976/311245408/-351531944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) to be added to Georgia’s special legislative session agenda. With Covid-19 cases persisting, the 500,000 Georgians who fall into the coverage gap cannot continue to wait for coverage. [Georgia’s Assembly has been called back into session](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477977/311245410/1917019027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) for a special redistricting session beginning November 3. Fair Fight Action and our allies will be following closely and fighting against partisan gerrymanders. _Litigation _ Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger is moving forward and our legal team is preparing for trial. The [federal lawsuit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477978/311245411/134397866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board alleges unconstitutional voter suppression. In the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put a permanent end to those practices. Notably, our case may be the first major federal voting rights case brought under the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to go to trial after the recent Supreme Court ruling [Brnovich v. DNC](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477979/311245412/-1648283096?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). Fair Fight Action will continue to use every tool available, including the judicial system, to protect the right to vote. We will keep you updated on the latest developments. _Sham Election Reviews_ Fair Fight Action continues to work with partners and coalitions across the country to monitor and mitigate the sham election reviews that are being perpetrated in various states across the country. They are a means by which the far right continues to peddle dangerous disinformation narratives. These sham reviews are attempts at election subversion by far right groups intent on undermining the freedom to vote. Fair Fight Action and our partners provide reliable and accurate content about these sham reviews on [NotAnAudit.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477980/311245413/-529040994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277). _**Fair Fight**_ _National Fellows Program_ Fair Fight launched a National Fellowship for state legislators from South Carolina, Alabama, Mississippi, Louisiana, and Tennessee. This program is an expansion of our Georgia fellowship that began in 2019. The fellowships provide mentorship to elected officials on Fair Fight’s mission: voting rights, legislative functionality, and grassroots advocacy. _District Attorney Program_ In a first-of-its-kind partnership with progressive District Attorneys, Fair Fight is providing resources, informative programming, and grassroots advocacy to a cohort of District Attorneys in the state to support issues that directly impact Georgia communities. _Endorsements_ Fair Fight continues to invest in building progressive power in Georgia. In September, Fair Fight [issued a new slate of endorsements](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477981/311245414/-576500317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) for city council and mayoral candidates across the state. These dedicated public servants reflect the diversity of their communities and will continue working to bring more Georgians into the democratic process. **IN THE NEWS** We are at a critical moment in the voting rights fight. Between the 2021 municipal elections, redistricting, the federal legislative fight, and with 2022 elections just around the corner, there is a lot to digest. Here are some key news clips about where we are and the path ahead:
* [Heeding Steve Bannon’s Call, Election Deniers Organize to Seize Control of the GOP – and Reshape America’s Elections ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477982/311245415/586840758?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277)

**Don't Miss Stacey Abrams’ CNN Op-Ed:** [Stacey Abrams: 'Callous' leadership in these states has left millions of Americans without health coverage](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477988/311245421/-507375119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) **THE ROAD AHEAD** _Suppressive Bills in State Legislatures_ On September 7, [Texas became the latest state to pass ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477989/311245422/-1052384241?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277)an anti-voter law, impacting elections as soon as 2022. In 2021, [according to 538’s most recent count](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477990/311245423/-105107984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277), 581 anti-voter bills have been introduced in 49 states and 52 bills were enacted in 21 states. Fair Fight Action is working with in-state allies, labor unions, and national advocates to mitigate the impact of anti-voter legislative proposals by stopping, slowing down, and making legislation less harmful to voters and democracy whenever possible. Fair Fight Action will continue to work with our allies to engage voters in state-level organizing and leverage these fights to make the case for why Congress must act urgently to protect the freedom to vote. _Redistricting_ As if passing legislation to suppress the vote wasn’t harmful enough, right-wing lawmakers are gerrymandering voters they don’t like out of their districts. We are tracking each state’s redistricting processes, including the special legislative sessions states are holding to approve maps. We will keep you updated on the redistricting process and keep you informed on how you can join us in the fight for fair maps. For the most current information on redistricting, you can sign up [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37477991/311245424/641772201?source=websitesignup&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjVjZDQyMC1iMDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rIHPznoukkWlSmdze9VsZTbPe8YZ-c10aSw1ztMDD3s=&emci=339daff7-882b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=6f5cd420-b02b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=1037277) to get updates from the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. **2022: MIDTERM ELECTIONS, VOTING PROTECTIONS, AND ELECTIONS ADMINISTRATION** As we prepare for 2022, we are working with our state and national partners to identify needs and plan for both traditional and expanded voter protection programs around the country. Fair Fight will continue leading hard-hitting, strategic campaigns and programs that respond to the evolving threat posed by the anti-voter war machine. **WAYS TO FIGHT BACK**
* **Advocate:** Continue to call your Senators every day at 833-465-7142 to demand they pass both the Freedom to Vote Act AND the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act.
