clean_body: We’ve been so honored by the response from our supporters about the launch of The Fight, our quarterly newsletter featuring updates including our joint achievements. Supporters like you empower us to do this critical work. Our successes are your successes –– we hope The Fight is a celebration of our collective work. Fair Fight | ** | | Friend - We’ve been so honored by the response from our supporters about the launch of The Fight, our quarterly newsletter featuring updates including our joint achievements. Supporters like you empower us to do this critical work. Our successes are your successes –– we hope The Fight is a celebration of our collective work. A MESSAGE FROM LAUREN GROH-WARGO Dear Readers of The Fight, With two monumental federal voting rights bills awaiting a vote in the Senate, while the attack on voting rights continues raging in the states, we are at a precipice. Our democracy is in peril but our march for progress continues. Nationally, the GOP is ringing misleading alarm bells to distract voters with inflammatory rhetoric and disinformation. At home in Georgia, Republicans in the state legislature have begun an unprecedented process to take over the Fulton County Board of Elections, using the new powers they gave themselves to undermine elections in legislation earlier this year. This is an attempt to undermine democracy in one of our most resilient and diverse Democratic counties. There are fires everywhere, but I want you to know: we are still fighting, and each and every week we have small to large wins on slowing, stopping or mitigating the damage being done by vote suppressors. Fair Fight Action believes in a future where voting is an equitable, accessible, and trusted process in our democracy. We believe in voters and their right to cast a ballot to make their voices heard. Our democracy should work for everyone. And until it does, we will continue to do the work to help voters across the country. I urge you to stay engaged, stay in this fight, and arm yourself with the resiliency of all those who fought this fight before us, as who has the right to vote and have their vote counted has been fraught and complex since the beginning of our country. When we fight, we win! Thank you for all you do. Yours in the fight, Lauren, Senior Advisor to Fair Fight PAC KEY UPDATES Fair Fight Action’s Civics for the Culture Fair Fight Action’s Civics For the Culture released its first in an eight-part series of videos for young people of color. Fair Fight Action will prioritize these videos in social media posts and digital ads to deepen engagement amongst young people who are often overlooked in between election cycles. Civics for the Culture is Fair Fight Action’s targeted campaign to educate and engage young Black and brown people in the political process before, during, and after Election Day. The educational series will also serve as a curriculum for More Than A Vote as they engage young voters and athletes associated with the organization. Videos from the series will debut every two weeks between now and the end of 2021. The first season of the series will help demystify civics topics like the need for pre-clearance of changes to election rules, the process for how a bill becomes a law, redistricting, and the role of elected officials at different levels of government. The first video, released last month, features Civics For the Culture co-creator Chelsey Hall and Stacey Abrams, founder of Fair Fight Action. Where We Are Fair Fight Action On August 24, the U.S. House of Representatives . This tremendous victory is due to months of work by progressive advocates and allies like you. On September 14, a group of Democratic Senators introduced the . This bill is a reformulated version of the For the People Act that addresses many of Fair Fight Action’s key priorities. Together, the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and the Freedom to Vote Act will protect our right to vote by ensuring all eligible Americans can register to vote, cast a ballot, and have that ballot counted fairly. Hot Call Summer and Freedom to Vote Fall Fair Fight Action relaunched the successful campaign as . By September, this effort had driven over 80,000 calls to Congress to urge them to pass federal voting rights legislation! Hot Call Summer collaborated with celebrities and influencers to highlight the fight for federal voting rights. . What is Next for Voting Rights in the Senate Together, Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action have fought to make voting rights a top priority for Congress. Fair Fight Action is expecting movement in the Senate in the coming weeks on both the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. That’s why we need you to join us in Freedom to Vote Fall and call your Senators at 833-465-7142, every single day to demand their support for these bills. Centering Voters and Their Stories In August, Fair Fight Action . to speak face-to-face with their Senators and share their personal experiences facing voter suppression. To further drive the urgency for Congress to pass critical federal voting legislation, Fair Fight Action led a seven-state national media program featuring testimonials from voters. The first ad featured voters from West Virginia, Georgia, Louisiana, and Michigan calling on Congress to act. The was released in partnership with Four Directions Native Vote, featuring Native leaders working to protect the freedom to vote. The ad emphasizes the importance of protecting the freedom to vote for Native American communities, who continue to face disproportionate barriers in voting. In September, Fair Fight Action continued to center voters’ voices by releasing a series of six videos featuring voters from Georgia, West Virginia, Michigan, Louisiana, New Hampshire, and Utah sharing their personal experiences with anti-voting efforts. We encourage you to listen to their moving stories at and share the site with your friends and family. Disability Council In April, Fair Fight Action launched our Disability Council, comprised of disability advocates and policy experts from across the country, to better advocate for disabled voters. In August the Disability Council , outlining the important things the bill does to protect disabled voters from discrimination. Disabled voters in this country already face disproportionate barriers to accessing the ballot box. With the onslaught of 581 anti-voter bills introduced in 49 states this year, disabled voters could face further restrictions that will make it even more difficult for them to cast their ballots. Legislative Session One of the most harmful provisions of Georgia’s Senate Bill 202 allows the Republican-controlled State Election Board to grab local power and take over county election boards. Fulton County, the county with the most voters of color in the state, is the GOP’s primary target. In August, Republican state legislators requested a performance review of Fulton County’s election officials as the first step to a long process to take over the county’s election board. The Fulton performance review is the first time a takeover provision has been employed in Georgia or anywhere in the country. The Fulton performance review represents a dangerous escalation of the assault on our democracy, and Fair Fight Action will be working to mitigate its harmful impact. Fair Fight Action also continues to push for to be added to Georgia’s special legislative session agenda. With Covid-19 cases persisting, the 500,000 Georgians who fall into the coverage gap cannot continue to wait for coverage. for a special redistricting session beginning November 3. Fair Fight Action and our allies will be following closely and fighting against partisan gerrymanders. Litigation Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger is moving forward and our legal team is preparing for trial. The against Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board alleges unconstitutional voter suppression. In the course of the trial, the State of Georgia will have to defend its suppressive voting practices while Fair Fight Action will seek remedies to put a permanent end to those practices. Notably, our case may be the first major federal voting rights case brought under the Voting Rights Act of 1965 to go to trial after the recent Supreme Court ruling . Fair Fight Action will continue to use every tool available, including the judicial system, to protect the right to vote. We will keep you updated on the latest developments. Sham Election Reviews Fair Fight Action continues to work with partners and coalitions across the country to monitor and mitigate the sham election reviews that are being perpetrated in various states across the country. They are a means by which the far right continues to peddle dangerous disinformation narratives. These sham reviews are attempts at election subversion by far right groups intent on undermining the freedom to vote. Fair Fight Action and our partners provide reliable and accurate content about these sham reviews on . Fair Fight National Fellows Program Fair Fight launched a National Fellowship for state legislators from South Carolina, Alabama, Mississippi, Louisiana, and Tennessee. This program is an expansion of our Georgia fellowship that began in 2019. The fellowships provide mentorship to elected officials on Fair Fight’s mission: voting rights, legislative functionality, and grassroots advocacy. District Attorney Program In a first-of-its-kind partnership with progressive District Attorneys, Fair Fight is providing resources, informative programming, and grassroots advocacy to a cohort of District Attorneys in the state to support issues that directly impact Georgia communities. Endorsements Fair Fight continues to invest in building progressive power in Georgia. In September, Fair Fight for city council and mayoral candidates across the state. These dedicated public servants reflect the diversity of their communities and will continue working to bring more Georgians into the democratic process. IN THE NEWS We are at a critical moment in the voting rights fight. Between the 2021 municipal elections, redistricting, the federal legislative fight, and with 2022 elections just around the corner, there is a lot to digest. Here are some key news clips about where we are and the path ahead: = Don't Miss Stacey Abrams’ CNN Op-Ed: THE ROAD AHEAD Suppressive Bills in State Legislatures On September 7, anti-voter law, impacting elections as soon as 2022. In 2021, , 581 anti-voter bills have been introduced in 49 states and 52 bills were enacted in 21 states. Fair Fight Action is working with in-state allies, labor unions, and national advocates to mitigate the impact of anti-voter legislative proposals by stopping, slowing down, and making legislation less harmful to voters and democracy whenever possible. Fair Fight Action will continue to work with our allies to engage voters in state-level organizing and leverage these fights to make the case for why Congress must act urgently to protect the freedom to vote. Redistricting As if passing legislation to suppress the vote wasn’t harmful enough, right-wing lawmakers are gerrymandering voters they don’t like out of their districts. We are tracking each state’s redistricting processes, including the special legislative sessions states are holding to approve maps. We will keep you updated on the redistricting process and keep you informed on how you can join us in the fight for fair maps. For the most current information on redistricting, you can sign up to get updates from the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. 2022: MIDTERM ELECTIONS, VOTING PROTECTIONS, AND ELECTIONS ADMINISTRATION As we prepare for 2022, we are working with our state and national partners to identify needs and plan for both traditional and expanded voter protection programs around the country. Fair Fight will continue leading hard-hitting, strategic campaigns and programs that respond to the evolving threat posed by the anti-voter war machine. WAYS TO FIGHT BACK Advocate: Continue to call your Senators every day at 833-465-7142 to demand they pass both the Freedom to Vote Act AND the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Volunteer: Sign up for a training to help us text voters and sign up to ensure you get emails about future volunteer opportunities. Engage: Follow us on: , , and . The best way to stay engaged is to be on the lookout on our social media for calls to action in real time! Share Fair Fight’s content with your networks to promote good information and encourage others to join our fight. Share Your Story: Wherever you live, go to to share your voting story with Fair Fight Action. Contact : You can reach our team with any questions by responding directly to this email. Donate:** You can contribute to fighting voter suppression, =. **[I have to ask you: Can you please read my entire platform and then pitch in $3 if our people-driven message resonates with you? _Here’s how I’ll fight for you in Congress:_
* **Affordable Health Care For All:** No one should ever have to sacrifice healthcare to pay the bills. We need to protect the Affordable Care Act and make Medicare eligible for more Americans.

* **An Economy That Works For The Working Class:** Far too many Western North Carolinians are afflicted with skyrocketing prices and stagnating wages. We need to make sure our district is business friendly without leaving working-class families behind.

* **Much-Needed Immigration Reform:** We must cut through the bureaucratic red tape and bigotry, and create an immigration system that will serve our national and economic interests.

* **Robust Voting Rights for All Americans:** As an African-American, I’m well aware without the sweat and tears of Americans before me, I would not have equal access to the ballot box. As Republicans pass laws designed to suppress our vote, we need to continue the fight for free and equal access to our Democracy.

---
I know together our grassroots movement can beat Cawthorn’s cynical agenda -- _I know we have a fighting shot at implementing our people-driven policies_ \-- but I can’t do it without your help.

**[So please, if you support our platform, can you pitch in $3 to get us one step closer to defeating Madison Cawthorn? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478274/311246567/1982424563?amount=3&refcode=EGFC_20211012_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTQzZjQwNi1iNDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0EQFqFlBQZ3E6sclpoayv7HPWXSbk4l7T_R4WIE0HI=)**

name: Mark Takano
subject: California’s wildfire problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
It will only get worse.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478359/311246870/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzAxYTE1MS1iNDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8j-ekTf3AfZypYX2JOhEwNqBciHRBNFED5ZdRTMqWM=)
---
Peter, in the past few years, our nation has seen increasingly worsening hurricanes, flooding, blizzards, and so much more.

**We’ve seen it right here in California, with raging wildfires that destroy forests and homes, threaten our air quality, and harm ecosystems.**

In fact, the Alisal Fire is currently causing irreparable damage to California’s Central Coast. And Peter -- we know worsening wildfires are not random accidents: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478361/311246872/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211012_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzAxYTE1MS1iNDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T8j-ekTf3AfZypYX2JOhEwNqBciHRBNFED5ZdRTMqWM=) It’s clear that we need to do more -- it’s why I’ve always championed the fight against climate change including supporting the Green New Deal.

**But MAGA opponents funded by Big Oil and Gas are doing everything they can to stop any climate change progress!** [**That’s why I’m asking you for help: I need 200 grassroots supporters to chip in any amount to DEMAND climate change action and fight back against Big Oil. We’re making really strong progress toward this critical goal, but we need to pick up the pace _just a little_ to stay on track.

The thing is, with just three weeks left in this race, we need to crush every single fundraising goal — otherwise we won’t have the resources we need to match Terry’s opponent in the final weeks of the campaign.

We need organizers on the ground knocking on doors. We need our TV ads up on the air. It’s so important voters hear Terry’s positive vision for Virginia’s future.

_**[So please, Derek, we need you to donate anything you can afford right now. Terry can win and protect Virginia’s progress, but only with your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478434/311247059/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.8_DM_10CP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODAxYTE1MS1iNDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khRJBnLDz3guUszj6Wh5JqQrt-PJoeIO6Zcu7gCopRs=)**_

Thank you for being such an important part of this historic team. Together, we will keep working toward a Virginia that works for all.

Dorothy | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478435/311247060/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.8_DM_10CP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODAxYTE1MS1iNDJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khRJBnLDz3guUszj6Wh5JqQrt-PJoeIO6Zcu7gCopRs=)**

clean_body: Do not forward. | TO: Peter Willis FROM: Michael Whatley, NCGOP Chairman SUBJECT: 2022 Senate Race Update The following is a confidential update for TOP REPUBLICANS only. Do not forward to anyone (especially Democrats). Democrats are raising shocking amounts of money, and they’re threatening to seize control of a long-held Republican Senate Seat when we need it most. If North Carolina falls to the Left, our hopes of winning back the Republican Senate Majority are completely ruined. President Trump’s legacy will be destroyed. The Democrats’ socialist agenda will pass and become law. Wokeism and Big Government will become the norm in every community. That’s why I’ve set up our , a dedicated place where Republican Patriots can chip in to fund our upcoming General Election Battle for the US Senate. But right now, that fund is still $83,739 short of where it needs to be. Thank you. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

Friend, We MUST STOP the Democrats from passing their TRILLION DOLLAR reckless spending bill. The 2,465 page bill (and counting) is nothing but a packet of socialist policies that will fundamentally expand the scope of our government and radically change our society. _**We cannot let this happen.**__ _ If we let the Radical Left get their way and pass this legislation, the repercussions will be beyond destructive to all hardworking Americans who will be left footing the bill. **If passed this bill will be:**** ** **-********The largest expansion of spending and debt in US history**** ** **-********The largest peacetime tax increase in US history**** ** **Also, if passed this bill will:**** ** **-********Lower wages**** ** **-********Decrease retirement savings**** ** **-********Increase the national debt**** ** **-********Raise taxes on working class families and small businesses.**** ** We need to elect a Representative in Wyoming who will stand up and fight against this radical agenda. Unfortunately, Liz Cheney is spending her time fighting to support Biden, Pelosi, and the Radical Left. clean_body: | | | | Working Class Americans are Footing the Bill Friend, We MUST STOP the Democrats from passing their TRILLION DOLLAR reckless spending bill. The 2,465 page bill (and counting) is nothing but a packet of socialist policies that will fundamentally expand the scope of our government and radically change our society. We cannot let this happen. If we let the Radical Left get their way and pass this legislation, the repercussions will be beyond destructive to all hardworking Americans who will be left footing the bill. If passed this bill will be: -****The largest expansion of spending and debt in US history -****The largest peacetime tax increase in US history Also, if passed this bill will: -****Lower wages -****Decrease retirement savings -****Increase the national debt -****Raise taxes on working class families and small businesses. We need to elect a Representative in Wyoming who will stand up and fight against this radical agenda. Unfortunately, Liz Cheney is spending her time fighting to support Biden, Pelosi, and the Radical Left. We know Americans cannot afford Biden and the Democrats' extremist agenda. Together we can take back our country and stop the Left’s socialist spending spree. For Wyoming, Harriet Hageman | | | |

Hello friend,

I'm writing to you today with a very important request, but first let me explain.

Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich wants to restrict access to abortion at all costs, and last week he even sought permission to break the law to do so.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478576/311247758/41694283?refcode=X_100721_MarkKellyTandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTdkOGVkNS1iNjJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9hBdUkesgz_s4rkAW05qoHrR-0mEIbW90o1kwToga7M=)
---

I’ll repeat that because I couldn’t believe it when I heard it myself. **The Attorney General wants permission to violate the law so that he can restrict a constitutionally protected right of Arizonans.**

Brnovich is not just attacking abortion access here in Arizona. He has _ repeatedly gone so low as to have his office write legal briefs urging the U.S Supreme Court to uphold abortion bans and restrictions in other states. _

Thankfully, term limits prevent Brnovich from running for Attorney General again. The bad news is that he’s the Republican frontrunner challenging **Mark Kelly in next year's U.S. Senate election.**

**Mark Kelly is doing an exemplary job representing the people of Arizona in the Senate and we have to make sure he is re-elected.**

[**That's why I'm asking you to rush a contribution today and we'll split it evenly between Sen. clean_body: Hello friend, I'm writing to you today with a very important request, but first let me explain. Arizona Attorney General Mark Brnovich wants to restrict access to abortion at all costs, and last week he even sought permission to break the law to do so. = I’ll repeat that because I couldn’t believe it when I heard it myself. The Attorney General wants permission to violate the law so that he can restrict a constitutionally protected right of Arizonans. Brnovich is not just attacking abortion access here in Arizona. He has repeatedly gone so low as to have his office write legal briefs urging the U.S Supreme Court to uphold abortion bans and restrictions in other states. Thankfully, term limits prevent Brnovich from running for Attorney General again. The bad news is that he’s the Republican frontrunner challenging Mark Kelly in next year's U.S. Senate election. Mark Kelly is doing an exemplary job representing the people of Arizona in the Senate and we have to make sure he is re-elected. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

subject: POLL: Do you support COVID-19 vaccine mandates?

body:
President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION! Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=0a100a5ca5684db7a14321b8782c7ea0&_t=jq5MR6le7ITxQnZGBT6b0NckWGE8oBLJ3PjAb54JHStmqrncboKdkfMfxbKjLIK4D-xlnfmrgw4n4SKxx9dyhI4qeXWlnletJguZPi7ktywkR2PAzWWNl7aNtVS-1sH50SI4XGH1TSlf3T3D8RSgmyRUqA59chFnzEKHhY2MLvI%3D)

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Is it time to let Americans decide how best to mitigate their risk of becoming infected with COVID-19, or should we simply accept that one day soon the government may force you to take the jab?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a100a5ca5684db7a14321b8782c7ea0&_e=l-Y_UgxiczSiUV-9CknkGXiC-1Fh4PUwNUm1u4ULV-qzBvJA5V6q6rOSO4IRcpBVKyrYVWHp9zuQ6U22_n-aFJOw06mNZEdIZQ3ZtofndrvkfmWAOSb--jL4oG5imbr3urPSWW6NuArOTvwIc4LeJNNQbx_nueAsrQKCN-SELXcMUCSsDQDaTJinSXaYMEBr5VCqj50qnJsWQByJ2ZiLYMny_WMrE-DYG664LQdFKXKQIfnq0YNFjhyla3OUjV-R7Jlz8KJthGpXDterLzyyu2Rn-58xMF9N3wbbKd9vmm8l8VX3tKnam6PVuvSrxYgt4YOOtk8WWXqj0u1ti9wsWeZgs9uctDU1uSggLW9YniHsU5Xw8kWcN9hk67-KBsfLX7hvDFqiO2Q_gW8lQWFl49IwMhKKxUgBNOiyYm3eX2ECGnEA6T4qOauqyX3G9JQiv0icEMP6QwRl80Droo9FkO5-fCAt7FHJGIpePc3F6lB3jSt7Dyb6Y509Vs7xZVeKzLsunmln2Lob-wPFlKMrzw%3D%3D)**

| _**

[WOULD YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON FORCED COVID-19 VACCINATIONS??](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a100a5ca5684db7a14321b8782c7ea0&_e=l-Y_UgxiczSiUV-9CknkGXiC-1Fh4PUwNUm1u4ULV-qzBvJA5V6q6rOSO4IRcpBVKyrYVWHp9zuQ6U22_n-aFJOw06mNZEdIZQ3ZtofndrvkfmWAOSb--jL4oG5imbr3urPSWW6NuArOTvwIc4LeJNNQbx_nueAsrQKCN-SELXcMUCSsDQDaTJinSXaYMEBr5VCqj50qnJsWQByJ2ZiLYMny_WMrE-DYG664LQdFKXKQIfnq0YNFjhyla3OUjV-R7Jlz8KJthGpXDterLzyyu2Rn-58xMF9N3wbbKd9vmm8l8VX3tKnam6PVuvSrxYgtN5Z5n3DhYQt3C7CcmpFxLeeoLtNZzf2xN9Y5TIzh41MSH211VhyG5i60-DzVbX19vndtGAqXXF0Z596zUNw3892SBzESr6hMoaAwKif4TZQEodBiF0LZM1Lo-_1UuCMvU76cuf9_UNESaOSfXjqAgdu6Warm8uaeXgX0vbRLcqKuJWerMBLgrg45ItQkmI7LtsKPAusyU46VZfE5L4jBvQ%3D%3D)** _

SURVEY REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: MIDNIGHT, October 12th

[** WHERE DO YOU STAND ON MANDATORY VACCINATIONS?
LET US KNOW->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a100a5ca5684db7a14321b8782c7ea0&_e=l-Y_UgxiczSiUV-9CknkGXiC-1Fh4PUwNUm1u4ULV-qzBvJA5V6q6rOSO4IRcpBVKyrYVWHp9zuQ6U22_n-aFJOw06mNZEdIZQ3ZtofndrvkfmWAOSb--jL4oG5imbr3urPSWW6NuArOTvwIc4LeJNNQbx_nueAsrQKCN-SELXcMUCSsDQDaTJinSXaYMEBr5VCqj50qnJsWQByJ2ZiLYMny_WMrE-DYG664LQdFKXKQIfnq0YNFjhyla3OUjV-R7Jlz8KJthGpXDterLzyyu2Rn-58xMF9N3wbbKd9vmm8l8VX3tKnam6PVuvSrxYgtI0GdFK22QY2qKBLviJcZ8rZ-VhFwzv3WSTdkmpcNRhWbmFM31p04t_ltZQvBWN3kzVxn1alHtgYd6JHrR9vT5tnD8D8cmNFkl04KhAYK2aNWn383DSJg59aJmspjuO-JpOfoirnXUGJiP-YjpeyPx7UfWBvU-Cjk3Y17FGZ-sg9yhm7UuNDqZ2fXTzOzdI5iYonje8Ud24q49yAoenOG8Q%3D%3D)

---

Democrats told us that the pandemic would be “defeated” when enough people were inoculated to reach herd immunity. The thing is, they keep moving the bar on us.

How can we trust a government run by folks who said that if you got vaccinated, you could take your mask off? **Then soon after, back to masks, no matter your vaccine status!** Now, if you work for a company with more than 100 employees, the government is going to try to force you to get vaccinated!

The simple answer is this: we can’t trust Democrats in DC to stick to their word.

**Democrats enact mask mandates. Then don’t wear them.**

Democrats restrict social gatherings. Then break their own mandates to host oversized gatherings where virtually no one is masked.

**Democrats want to require covid vaccine mandates but let COVID positive illegal immigrants cross the southern border.**

_Will the hypocrisy ever end?_

**[Let us hear from you today. Would you support a federal ban on forced covid-19 vaccinations?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a100a5ca5684db7a14321b8782c7ea0&_e=l-Y_UgxiczSiUV-9CknkGXiC-1Fh4PUwNUm1u4ULV-qzBvJA5V6q6rOSO4IRcpBVKyrYVWHp9zuQ6U22_n-aFJOw06mNZEdIZQ3ZtofndrvkfmWAOSb--jL4oG5imbr3urPSWW6NuArOTvwIc4LeJNNQbx_nueAsrQKCN-SELXcMUCSsDQDaTJinSXaYMEBr5VCqj50qnJsWQByJ2ZiLYMny_WMrE-DYG664LQdFKXKQIfnq0YNFjhyla3OUjV-R7Jlz8KJthGpXDterLzyyu2Rn-58xMF9N3wbbKd9vmm8l8VX3tKnam6PVuvSrxYgtD03EEISuaeZFZyjyKeQ9O92gvLPy0qYeZ6UOrE5iXolxVXvZqEv_0YokF42QdFLtDyj0EPn5-owxwoZ1QQcks0xXaYQR9EY-qRP09DCukhHWdZpnCj3Nu45uwt5QdPJ0KzsUJP6sY5Aql9dFD6dKs3_rgb61F2-ZiupWJBMapuKbvCNyXrMDK6nrRXP-H0h-TH48FrW_bKCcka2tfylAuA%3D%3D)**

Thanks for letting us know –

Thank you,
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0a100a5ca5684db7a14321b8782c7ea0&_e=l-Y_UgxiczSiUV-9CknkGXiC-1Fh4PUwNUm1u4ULV-qzBvJA5V6q6rOSO4IRcpBVKyrYVWHp9zuQ6U22_n-aFJOw06mNZEdIZQ3ZtofndrvkfmWAOSb--jL4oG5imbr3urPSWW6NuArOTvwIc4LeJNNQbx_nueAsrQKCN-SELXcMUCSsDQDaTJinSXaYMEBr5VCqj50qnJsWQByJ2ZiLYMny_WMrE-DYG664LQdFKXKQIfnq0YNFjhyla3OUjV-R7Jlz8KJthGpXDterLzyyu2Rn-58xMF9N3wbbKd9vmm8l8VX3tKnam6PVuvSrxYgtPB4eKn0mTEHGW-X-7XqrXVkmVdmWb6_erdTsTIdhK3w4tjg4GSq0AbVaM48PzjotT64PvnLBczQ7l1PrWK56cGaZH4tsoD7dMKxWRgdMxYDH7YW9AyP8kKF7kd9YZKpSEfgT-2Xq1u3GZMsHtkwtJeNNDWTnjpKmm9wNm_K4KrBjbiJWbYhp4Vr7XH43Mm7lVD0E4X3EaTks1YJgVqMgPg%3D%3D)

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Voting has started and my opponent is ahead
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

It's Terry McAuliffe, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I’m sorry to bother you, but it’s important. Early voting in the Virginia Governor’s race has already begun, and a recent poll shows my

Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin ahead by 2 points . It’s the first poll he’s led all campaign and it’s coming at an awful time.

Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear before the November election.

Please split a donation of anything you can afford between Nikki Fried and my campaign right now. Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-tm-split]

If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021.

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

Let’s be clear, Glenn Youngkin is a right-wing Trump acolyte. He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets.

Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin five separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022.

So I’m asking — can you split a donation right now to help me deliver a huge victory for Democrats this November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-tm-split]

Thanks for your time,

Terry

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/773ff9ec-662b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208/dc723b40-b72b-ec11-981f-c896653b9208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzcyM2I0MC1iNzJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KkPdEGGVCcNJaZGZdU4lJVVWByM3eOqZ6q04_qvFoxw=&id=116879433 .

He wants to ban abortion, he pushes Trump’s big lie, and if he becomes Governor, he’ll put more guns on our streets. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin five separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022. So I’m asking — can you split a donation right now to help me deliver a huge victory for Democrats this November? [] Thanks for your time, Terry Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Exclusive: Counterfeiters Beware!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=53d8a16fd6&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

What a whirlwind. The last week has taken me around the country to fight for election integrity and spread it nationwide.

I just wrapped up in Iowa where I spoke at the _Save America Rally_ with President Donald Trump, fighting for our need for a 50-state audit, an audit of Pima county, and also for my Ballot Integrity Project!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e507bf19fe&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _“What a job he’s done – Mark, great job, Mark! You’re going to win big, Mark!” – President Trump_
The rally was a great chance to see thousands of proud Patriots united, standing against the tyranny of the Left and for President Donald Trump!

**I am proud to have been invited to speak and endorsed by the President. We are making a great team heading into 2022. And yes – the President was right, we will win BIG! **

_In the middle of the rally, he gave me a HUGE shoutout to the work that I and my campaign have been doing. I am deeply honored that he would be so confident in our victory._

**He said this in front of the thousands in attendance and the over 100,000 people watching because he knew as a matter of a fact that I am the patriot who will continue the good fight in Arizona for election integrity and as Secretary of State!**

_[But only with continued support from Patriots like you. Can you stand with President Trump and help my campaign for Secretary of State with a donation of $25, $100, $250, $500, or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ab05acf8eb&e=44b8c466b0)_
**_Taking the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=22643fc963&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This last, Wednesday, I assembled a group of over 30 patriots, election officials, election integrity activists, and technology experts in Dallas Texas to take my Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National by meeting with the company _Authentix_ to discuss how we can make our ballots more secure.

_Authentix_ is amazing at what they do. They are international authenticators, authenticating currencies, pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, and tax stamps.

**They are good at what they do. **This is why I sought them out to work with me to develop significant countermeasures to ensure the sanctity of the ballot.
Working in tandem with me, they took on an innovative, never-been-done project, for the good of America!

_Human Events_ reports:

_When asked how he got the idea to initially launch the BIP, Finchem said, “Back between September and November of last year there were rumors circulating that somehow ballots had been secretly watermarked. Those rumors were not true. But it got me to thinking, what if they could be?”_

_That question ultimately led to him being introduced to the Chief Sales & Marketing Officer of Authentix, Kent Mansfield. “At first I didn’t know what to think when I got the request,” said Mansfield. “We had never done a project exactly like this, but I also knew Mark was serious about making this happen. Without any spec’s, this was an open opportunity for our people to create. I worked with our teams to design a concept and once we had it, it took about thirty days to produce a prototype.”_

**And, man, did they take this project seriously. We now have the technology to actually make it impossible for anyone to commit fraud with these ballots. And if the results of the Maricopa Audit prove anything, we need those ballots now more than ever.**

_Human Events_ continues:

_When asked about the potential problem of steering people toward paper ballots in a nation obsessed with the bells and whistles of digital security, Mansfield says,” We get that question all the time. It is often the case that a newer technology comes along that can be deployed that simply wasn’t available at the time that the last technology was deployed. This is brand new technology. It is a way to serialize documents. It can let people know that the document that left is the actual document that came back.” This lets people track and interact with their ballot and the government can know it is a legitimate ballot.”_

---
|
---
| Folks, this is going to go national if we continue our momentum in our fight for Election Integrity.

_I had seven different states approach me who are interested in getting started on this, and 38 more that are interested in learning more. This is huge. This level of interest is why I led this meeting in Dallas over this last Wednesday._
**_The Fight Continues At Home_**
[And while I continue to push for a nationwide audit and educate other patriots about what they can and _should_ do in their home states, the fight must continue at home.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b3efb1fc27&e=44b8c466b0)

In addition to auditing Pima County, the second largest County in Arizona, we must continue to push for these _Authentix_ ballots in Arizona.

**To do this, what is important to know is that money _is_ earmarked for these new ballots, but we need to get our process legislatively approved. With a narrow majority in the House and Senate, we need all the help that we can get to push this through.**

We need to Audit Pima. We need to push hard and expand our grassroots effort to ensure that the Ballot Integrity Process I pioneered gets final approval. Only then can we begin to have safe elections.

[**_Please help us audit Pima and get our Ballot Integrity Process into law with a generous donation today!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a20e54e231&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0bf493337b&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b9529dcaca&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5c5be23f6d&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=7e17ca13f1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=7e17ca13f1).
---

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Humbly asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We need to start laying the groundwork now
#

**$5.**
That’s the amount we are humbly asking you to contribute to Alex Padilla’s campaign today.
We know November 2022 seems like a long way away, so we hope you’ll take a minute to read why your contribution _today_ makes such a big difference, and then [**chip in $5 to keep Alex in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211012-1-15&t=1&refcode2=386_159979_fUEkr-&akid=386%2E159979%2EfUEkr-)
1. **The same deep-pocketed Trump supporters who funded the right-wing recall are going to be coming after us:** Now that the recall failed, Republicans in California are going to turn their attention — and their dollars — toward Alex. Making sure we have the resources to fight back against whatever they throw at us is crucial if we want to hold this seat.

2. **The stakes are incredibly high:** We’re operating on a 50-50 margin in the Senate. That means Alex’s race could be the difference between a Democratic majority that takes action to address the issues facing our country or Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.

3. **We have a LOT of people to reach:** California is a HUGE state. There are almost 25 million eligible voters, and it’s simply impossible to reach out to everyone if we don’t get started early. _We need to start laying the groundwork now._

[**If you can afford it, please make a $5 contribution to our campaign today. We’ve got so much work to do in the coming months, and every donation sends a powerful message that we will not back down without a fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211012-1-15&t=2&refcode2=386_159979_fUEkr-&akid=386%2E159979%2EfUEkr-)
As long as we stand together, we can win this race and keep Alex in the Senate fighting for immigration reform, action on climate change, and universal health care.
Thank you for everything you do for this campaign and this movement.
Team Padilla
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-oct21?refcode=em211012-1-15&t=3&refcode2=386_159979_fUEkr-&akid=386%2E159979%2EfUEkr-)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=386%2E159979%2EfUEkr-)

name: Team Rosen
subject: The first computer programmer was a woman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
You might not have heard of this pioneering mathematician and writer -- but Ada Lovelace was regarded as the first ever computer programmer after she published the very first algorithm.
#
Team,
**Today is Ada Lovelace Day -- an annual opportunity to celebrate the achievements of women in STEM (science, technology, engineering, and mathematics) around the world.**
You might not have heard of this pioneering mathematician and writer -- but Ada Lovelace was regarded as the _first ever computer programmer_ after she published the very first algorithm.
It is so important that we continue to advance STEM education -- especially for women and girls -- to help equip our future leaders. And in 2018, this team extended Ada Lovelace’s legacy by electing Sen. Jacky Rosen -- the first ever computer programmer to serve in the U.S. Senate.
**[Will you contribute $5 to support Jacky Rosen on Ada Lovelace Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478842/311251289/202138210?refcode=jr_em_nd_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjc2MDczMy1iOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGlWL-Tyau5uhiT9aynxvDVk5SNaQFyCrTNajwoX3ss=)**
In the Senate, Jacky is fighting for our values, like raising the minimum wage, expanding affordable health care, and implementing urgent climate action. She has also made STEM education a top priority because we must ensure our workforce is ready for the digital economy.
Senator Rosen will keep up the fight for all of us -- but she needs this team to have her back.
**[Can you pitch in $5 or any amount to support our STEM champion Jacky Rosen](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478843/311251290/202138210?refcode=jr_em_nd_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjc2MDczMy1iOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGlWL-Tyau5uhiT9aynxvDVk5SNaQFyCrTNajwoX3ss=)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Rosen

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37478844/311251291/202138210?refcode=jr_em_nd_211012_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjc2MDczMy1iOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VGlWL-Tyau5uhiT9aynxvDVk5SNaQFyCrTNajwoX3ss=)**

body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=531a196e9dc840a88a372bb4762ed27d&_e=ItxpkRUOTy-WKRXPjPHXIMsg4TL6nmCTtKx6Gpb6xvpU8lQzFPnKH_zM7pFklFuZcfL0uMFjmbE-FNgV8W0R6ELhMImfNWDQ9Jy67kZgp_smiFsbEYumMQO6GcZjgNnRxejPo3WsGiH1mnqNOlcLVXal5ydBWnf74PS4dlBEVdOsBTXga90Fh8TpDbcGvql6frm3v_4a_uJ3zMxEMzD1yEgCi7JSoXf774ySTQjwaR_ZS-uNXIp9C7jeiDLWlRRW6Oa7qqru6Z4_j4UqT6YPpirRQ-RyM7Pq2kKcRFd-34XDEW5XqpROi23uE23a0d9MZWJpa_n-Eowh4Py-ciZkQVg0lSWQHruljRw6JhQ6ATE8IAcjEYcx-Ul5zLNSb04EP6SCIyqPUSWyMU-trdkbkPPH-MXiMQDpjzHU4yQbEbJejMm7NFC1JE41yFaCTCI-7JO_S3vlq8tQBI_sLHm_xQ%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=531a196e9dc840a88a372bb4762ed27d&_e=ItxpkRUOTy-WKRXPjPHXIMsg4TL6nmCTtKx6Gpb6xvpU8lQzFPnKH_zM7pFklFuZcfL0uMFjmbE-FNgV8W0R6ELhMImfNWDQ9Jy67kZgp_smiFsbEYumMQO6GcZjgNnRxejPo3WsGiH1mnqNOlcLVXal5ydBWnf74PS4dlBEVdOsBTXga90Fh8TpDbcGvql6frm3v_4a_uJ3zMxEMzD1yEgCi7JSoXf774ySTQjwaR_ZS-uNXIp9C7jeiDLWlRRWs-Wf97Mrv2Qy_sCcbl-QOtMLoyybP4vXEHUkxjCmgLWJmbUapxC0bn8KXrDfBk46RTvdfcEtndvxJczmLYMF8irbKA0Dw5pgL7Ni5xVx4UPVRmHO0o26QVXX3rGNBwYg5f6EftZRorgFaN3r1uMwiivBhA0hwpa2BJD111qYajuL9HTjF756PoPQbiGMVULe3hSR7oPZcs4s28wZpxgBKQ%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Fellow American, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=531a196e9dc840a88a372bb4762ed27d&_e=ItxpkRUOTy-WKRXPjPHXIMsg4TL6nmCTtKx6Gpb6xvpU8lQzFPnKH_zM7pFklFuZcfL0uMFjmbE-FNgV8W0R6ELhMImfNWDQ9Jy67kZgp_smiFsbEYumMQO6GcZjgNnRxejPo3WsGiH1mnqNOlcLVXal5ydBWnf74PS4dlBEVdOsBTXga90Fh8TpDbcGvql6frm3v_4a_uJ3zMxEMzD1yEgCi7JSoXf774ySTQjwaR_ZS-uNXIp9C7jeiDLWlRRWq1u3PaRpzisiRAIp1gqaynMail2FT8ZDqhjaELV9SaejtAzBP8FJOnCgbtANNqsP_CZAX0QQsXT7nu4cgukWDAZ5aCfU-ZuqwUJqG8uQAIc_tzYdbcNfGnmduxYwUeLTq8Rof7eARffrGDrP3gjD8aw4g4SdIFkxUz1iJ8DyzQkkTwbqR3RD9Ds87Ab3vvK0iCMiV_0T51bjHeRvXzzOvw%3D%3D)**

[**Send $5, $10, $34 or more our way today ->**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=531a196e9dc840a88a372bb4762ed27d&_e=ItxpkRUOTy-WKRXPjPHXIMsg4TL6nmCTtKx6Gpb6xvpU8lQzFPnKH_zM7pFklFuZcfL0uMFjmbE-FNgV8W0R6ELhMImfNWDQ9Jy67kZgp_smiFsbEYumMQO6GcZjgNnRxejPo3WsGiH1mnqNOlcLVXal5ydBWnf74PS4dlBEVdOsBTXga90Fh8TpDbcGvql6frm3v_4a_uJ3zMxEMzD1yEgCi7JSoXf774ySTQjwaR_ZS-uNXIp9C7jeiDLWlRRWzqf_JaGeRL1k389AOvq4bg0iIp6J3-aCBkNWJVjXa589S-giU1qi8Fb4gG2-4wNCO62dQnxGW_hkCPhM6-WPzTO-5b4p8f27Wsyka1pwFhjj3TRGruN062S1CBHTPvfx3JXgONqsO9ZvY3YnoIuJJ2gXA4CskxyPmINSDATjPNLKx95owTAzEiPVPUMUm5rJQECpA-YTQH5-HFk451i2bg%3D%3D)
I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

Democrats know what's at stake.

Republicans know what's at stake.

I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now.

The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - _**and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg.**_

I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America.

I hope you'll join us on this journey.

Thanks,

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=531a196e9dc840a88a372bb4762ed27d&_e=ItxpkRUOTy-WKRXPjPHXIMsg4TL6nmCTtKx6Gpb6xvpU8lQzFPnKH_zM7pFklFuZcfL0uMFjmbE-FNgV8W0R6ELhMImfNWDQ9Jy67kZgp_smiFsbEYumMQO6GcZjgNnRxejPo3WsGiH1mnqNOlcLVXal5ydBWnf74PS4dlBEVdOsBTXga90Fh8TpDbcGvql6frm3v_4a_uJ3zMxEMzD1yEgCi7JSoXf774ySTQjwaR_ZS-uNXIp9C7jeiDLWlRRWyozsNikad8O5m74Ev9mqnQ8rAZ01ARTXG6frZmnEZyWBDw477fGCerraOn32g_W1tNgRPJIaCyD5nCG0d0W90Oa1LVnI5qfQ8FMqK8Hst89r1sm058HkgFJ4ehnm7odzhY5bWMWkIlrM4UOCl9hvlFN-hQgjYvv5uQ0cYY-2xUFrf2xre3be1cjBcotPnn-XXIbDqa3nOHM4IOK64nhKsA%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for US Senate

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, I’ll keep this update quick. I just met with President Trump to discuss how to save America from the socialist Biden Administration. He was so proud of your hard work, Fellow Conservative, but we’re just beginning. Bottom Line:President Trump and I need 432 patriots to take a stand in the next 5 HOURS to show their support for Senate conservatives. Fellow Conservative, the Democrats are trying to stack the game against you and silence you at every turn, and it’s more important than ever to fight back. President Trump is doing everything he can to save America from Big Tech oligarchs and liberal Hollywood elites, but he can’t finish this fight without you. TAKE BACK AMERICA NOW Thank you, Senator Rick Scott Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. body:

Mark is lucky.

He has you.

Most candidates have to spend extraordinary amounts of time fundraising.

But again, Mark is lucky. He has you.

Mark has received more individual, small-dollar donations than any candidate in the country during the first six months of the year.

Not only does that support help him fend off expensive attacks — like ones on air right now. But it allows him the time and space to be the best Senator he can be, which is the top priority.

But because the majority of Mark’s donations come from emails like this one, it means that we have to send out these emails from time to time. And today is one of those days:

**[Can you please split a $25 contribution between Mark Kelly’s campaign for Senate and Common Good VA? name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Re: Outraised
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Erica’s well-funded, establishment-backed opponents announced bringing in massive third-quarter fundraising hauls.
#
This isn’t the news we wanted to share today. Erica’s well-funded, DC-backed opponents announced bringing in massive third-quarter fundraising hauls.
**As it stands, our grassroots campaign was outraised this past quarter in one of the most competitive Senate races in the country — and that puts us at a disadvantage.**
In a race with national attention and super PAC investment, we need the resources to compete and continue growing our statewide moral movement to elect a progressive champion like Erica.
**So we’re asking:**[**_Will you make a $5 donation to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate right now to help us close our fundraising gap? This movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you — not fossil fuel, Big Pharma CEOs, or corporate PACs._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20885?t=1&akid=541%2E3698%2EKSme15)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/21410?refcode=em20211012-541&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=541%2E3698%2EKSme15)**
****We know Erica is the best candidate to fight for the bold, progressive change North Carolinians need.** If elected, she’d proudly vote YES for the PRO Act, raising the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, abolishing the filibuster, and so much more.
But people powered campaigns like ours face an uphill battle, and winning in North Carolina won’t be easy — but we can do it if we push harder this quarter and build a massive coalition of diverse, working-class people in every corner of the state.
[**_Will you make a $10 donation to Erica Smith for U.S. Senate right now? We must raise as much as possible to compete with our establishment opponents and build a winning campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20885?t=21&akid=541%2E3698%2EKSme15)
Let’s do this!
Thanks,
Erica Smith HQ
P.S. Unlike her opponents, Erica doesn’t have a rolodex of wealthy conservative donors to turn to. **Instead, we’re relying on you.**[**_Will you show your support by making a $5 donation right now? Every dollar will make an immediate impact on the success of our campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/20885?t=22&akid=541%2E3698%2EKSme15)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211012-541-footer&t=23&refcode2=541_3698_KSme15&akid=541%2E3698%2EKSme15)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ][IMG]

Folks,

In a minute I will ask you to make a critical donation to my campaign to
help us catch up after a HUGE setback, but first let me explain:

Our campaign runs a lot of digital ads -- it’s one of the best ways we can
compete against attacks from my opponents. When we had to take down events
during my COVID quarantine, our numbers plummeted so we relied on digital
ads to make up the difference.

But when Facebook went down last week, our fundraising completely fell off
a cliff. I’m not kidding -- we lost about $15,000, and we’re still
scrambling to catch up.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5071?t=1007&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]We’re running WAY behind on our monthly goal -- can I count on you to
chip in $25 to make up for lost ground?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5071?t=1008&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5072?t=1009&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5073?t=1010&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5074?t=1011&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5075?t=1012&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5071?t=1013&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Other Amount

My millionaire opponents have the backing of GOP mega-donors who can
easily drown us out online -- I need YOUR help to stay in this fight and
make sure voters hear my message loud and clear.

There’s so much on the line here -- if we don’t flip this seat and expand
the Senate majority, Mitch McConnell will snatch back the gavel and plow
forward with his dangerous agenda. We can’t afford that, folks.

Ohio is standing in McConnell’s way but we won’t have a snowball’s chance
in hell of winning this race if we get drowned out online by the GOP.
That’s why I’m asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5071?t=1014&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]folks, can I count on you to chip in now to help us fuel our
digital ads and flip this open Senate seat blue?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5071?t=1015&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5072?t=1016&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5073?t=1017&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5074?t=1018&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5075?t=1019&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5071?t=1020&akid=1141%2E3611125%2EZcl2Qp ]Other Amount

Thank you for everything you do to power this campaign.

-- Tim

Friend,
---
Our campaign to win Texas’ brand-new congressional seat and flip the House has already achieved so much -- all thanks to YOU!
---
We came out of the gate strong and CRUSHED our very first FEC-mandated deadline.
---
**_But, after such a strong start, we’re now facing a MAJOR setback this week after last week’s Facebook outage blocked our fundraising ads and cost us _thousands_._**
---
_That’s why I’m reaching out to our most trusted supporters, to ask if you can help me make up this deficit so we don’t start off October in the red._
---

name: Bianca Keaton, Campaign Manager
subject: Campaign Update: Rand Paul raised 4 million dollars from his corporate donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, last week,
our team found out that Rand Paul raked in millions in corporate donations
in his attempt to stop our movement.

Let’s make this clear: 75% of Rand Paul’s campaign money comes from
corporate money, rich people, and big business.

And when you look at his voting record in the ten years he’s been in
office, it makes perfect sense. Rand Paul has catered his agenda time and
again to the rich and powerful, leaving the rest of us in Kentucky behind.

Meanwhile, our campaign raised nearly half of our donations from
Kentuckians — an unprecedented demonstration of the energy on the ground
for this race. 98% of our donations were from grassroots supporters like
you.

This is about more than money. This is about values — whether we let
corporate influence drown out the voice of the people, or stand up and
fight back.

Peter, Kentuckians
know how to fight back. But we need you.

We’re so close to hitting our internal fundraising goal this week.
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11134?refcode=em20211012-1055&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=1055%2E346206%2EgQEc_1 ]Will you chip in $20.17 (our average donation) or whatever you can
right now to help us catch up? If you and one other person
from 18326 donates, we can close this gap.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11134?refcode=em20211012-1055&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1055%2E346206%2EgQEc_1 ]Contribute $20.17

THIS is how we’re going to elect a new chapter of leadership that will
always put people first. THIS is how we’re going to finally elect a leader
who will fight for urgent policies like Medicare for All. THIS is how
we’re going to transform the future of our Commonwealth and our Country.

It costs $0.05 for our campaign to contact 1 voter in Kentucky. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11134?refcode=em20211012-1055&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1055%2E346206%2EgQEc_1 ]Can
you chip in $20 right now so we can contact 400 voters in Kentucky and
start doing the hard organizing work it’ll take to defeat Rand Paul?

Thank you,

Bianca
Campaign Manager, Charles Booker for Senate

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211012-1055-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1055_346206_gQEc_1&akid=1055%2E346206%2EgQEc_1

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1055%2E346206%2EgQEc_1

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: Sleepy Joe needs to wake up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana
body:
| [](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=6d3ed91d635e43a8b3fb05302efc6514&_e=CGFLr045a9OWy6oYaxzoZqzcEUzH8O08KRCVjfQMXTTEHW9fKlca_UdcI4jifXFcGXOgJVgYJO0pClaW7E-GsWoXAcEpqC5anb_vOhFUZoobtKP4VsfLt9xSsYJty4a3dw-1FF0dHr7uXmhwBIBazRpVeMNH9Bmh6ZS8mYRJj3QYp3EjlhQ5aqh3BroiYWVAwEH5_-YAga7cDQNTgcYYP69PmPCwKNIrA3t2subE28edK9zRzit4-7GT9meBvAKkUa3BdNvAGnTPcT0DGTF64qa1bPr5DvWZBRiKgIWZzioNNDQoImKqeFUTFDDmnCyiJGIymTFxlLYvi88Ix7CKD0Ys3QzPgOSzXpUCkdLx4f6d3TVsUlbaBCU7IMZCnCAs8QO4_bL0r3ik0w9493gx5owtyU9Pgps9nOUbk5qpiKCmGPPmsV1K_ClEM6KE4YY09EmlU8rDBjMrAsbwxmTxnw%3D%3D)

Friend,

**The chaos at our southern border is a man-made disaster, and that man is Joe Biden.**

Joe Biden is doing **NOTHING** to fix this crisis.

Joe Biden put Kamala Harris in charge of the border crisis and she has done **NOTHING.**

We **MUST** demand better. We need to bring back Trump’s border wall policies immediately. The crisis at our border is only getting worse.

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Read this. It’s important.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37479665/311274824/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.9_TM_10CQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTlhZGU0NS1jOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S88lnTpWO7Wt2vKxw47z-sB8yncPcOXcAJWrjsb77d0=)

| | Let me lay it out for you, Derek: **this is the most important election in the country this year. Virginia is a must win for Democrats.**

For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families.

But now, our progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for.

And right now, **Youngkin winning is a real possibility.** Polls show a razor thin margin, we’re being outraised, and initial reports show diminishing enthusiasm amongst Democrats.

**That’s why I set this goal to reach $2 million online by midnight, Derek:** we’ve got to raise enough money to fund our massive voter turnout operation, _and we won’t have much time to make up ground if we miss._

_**[So right now, will you chip in to my campaign? I need all hands on deck to reach tonight’s $2,000,000 goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37479666/311274825/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.9_TM_10CQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTlhZGU0NS1jOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S88lnTpWO7Wt2vKxw47z-sB8yncPcOXcAJWrjsb77d0=)**_

Derek, Donald Trump wants to use this election as the launchpad for his 2024 campaign — and Glenn Youngkin has already said he supports four more years of Donald Trump.

If a Trump-wannabe like Youngkin can win in Virginia, a guy like him can win anywhere. We have to send the message that we’re ready to end Trumpism in this country once and for all.

_**[With stakes this high, we can’t afford to miss even one fundraising benchmark. So please, chip in whatever you can right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37479667/311274826/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.9_TM_10CQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTlhZGU0NS1jOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S88lnTpWO7Wt2vKxw47z-sB8yncPcOXcAJWrjsb77d0=)**_

Thank you,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37479668/311274827/-2023814932?refcode=20211012.9_TM_10CQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTlhZGU0NS1jOTJiLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S88lnTpWO7Wt2vKxw47z-sB8yncPcOXcAJWrjsb77d0=)**

Terry McAuliffe for Virginia

Arlington, VA 22215

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chuck=20Rocha=2C=20Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: Announcing Nuestro Texas
body:
Help us defeat Greg Abbott and his Republican legislature in 2022. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/074bae746c67/announcing-nuestro-texas?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
| | -

We've said from day one that our main goal is mobilizing Latino voters across the country to become involved in the political process.

Our work to achieve that goal has not stopped.

That's why today we announced Nuestro Texas, a new state PAC committed to turning out Latino voters to remove Gregg Abbott and his Republican legislature from office. Nuestro Texas will concentrate its efforts in the Rio Grande Valley, where Republicans made huge inroads to the Latino community during the 2020 election.
---
| **[If you believe in the vision of Nuestro PAC and in the work we are seeking to achieve in Texas, make a contribution of any amount you can afford right now.](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=f719cb32fd&e=b8f90417f9)**

---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=f31d0baf87&e=b8f90417f9 "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| Governor Abbott and his Republican legislature have gone out of their way to restrict the rights of marginalized groups across the state. From the draconian abortion bill passed last month to the voting bill passed earlier this year to suppress the voting rights of minorities, Abbott and Texas Republicans have made it clear that thriving Latino and minority communities have no place in their vision for Texas.

If Democrats do nothing, we risk ceding more votes from Latinos and in the Rio Grande Valley to Republicans.

We're counting on your support to not let this happen.

Chuck Rocha
Nuestro PAC
---
| | | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=0782f5f86d&e=b8f90417f9)

Our work to achieve that goal has not stopped. That's why today we announced Nuestro Texas, a new state PAC committed to turning out Latino voters to remove Gregg Abbott and his Republican legislature from office. Nuestro Texas will concentrate its efforts in the Rio Grande Valley, where Republicans made huge inroads to the Latino community during the 2020 election. | | "CONTRIBUTE" | Governor Abbott and his Republican legislature have gone out of their way to restrict the rights of marginalized groups across the state. From the draconian abortion bill passed last month to the voting bill passed earlier this year to suppress the voting rights of minorities, Abbott and Texas Republicans have made it clear that thriving Latino and minority communities have no place in their vision for Texas. If Democrats do nothing, we risk ceding more votes from Latinos and in the Rio Grande Valley to Republicans. We're counting on your support to not let this happen. Chuck Rocha Nuestro PAC | | | | | | | | | | | nuestropac.com | | Copyright © 2021 Nuestro PAC, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 15845 Washington, DC 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | "CONTRIBUTE"

Peter,

What’s happening in this country is genuinely disheartening.

The radical Left has hopped in the driver’s seat, and they are taking us on a wild and bumpy ride.

In my home state of Nevada, Democrat Governor Sisolak takes every opportunity to seize your freedom and liberty and expand Government control. When will the Left stop hiding behind a pandemic and admit that the real goal is limited freedom for the people?

Under the current radical liberal leadership, Nevadans have faced endless lockdowns, business closures, and rising crime rates.

We have a Democrat governor more interested in locking us out of work than putting us back to work.

**Under Governor Sisolak, Nevada is headed in the wrong direction.**

Don’t get me started on what is happening in Washington.

President Biden and his pals Chuck and Nancy in Congress are on a tyrannical tear. They are forcing reckless Government spending, tax hikes, and amnesty on America.

body:
Don’t let the Democrats take our country
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
Fellow Conservative,

We are counting on you to act now.

President Trump continues to call out the Radical Socialist Agenda that is promoted by the Democrats. He stands up for our country and for putting America First. **We picked our top Conservative Patriots to contact because we know, as fellow American Patriots, we can count on your support!** [**CONTINUE TRUMP'S AMERICA FIRST VISION**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=04f63ee33f444f04995d1bb4da4dde7a&_e=G0sYqfJ_ldnYK8q9_TEwGE1snvlXj3VjiMDCMTT8rImblIrGPCbw_RPTO7tRqJrPhn_zHV-yIywwyFI1uo4G2qw3esfTUprz5b-T8OTv5uwuF0kSsDrCPrhPE-S6aK6REWzfyh8dw4BnED9k_g7XhvsrNQ60nNgZs8ZIFGaA4pS8euGEcYdR5UzP8O-ECq5kVYWLzqV6TeMpZa3fOYXsy_-y_Q-bf7ZlB0qV0lkV6dd-8gkogBPOitD80eAH1o1jnBx5mfrLCVp_Tdjt52bQIKTTqLTwJfERbk2QUGkOHoR0t9bDndj4sd2QlfWv1hPSwGF5cpEfXlObVfExGXN6c8GOHxYzJh_SJoetPdBofwk5m-01bWk94L_ppwKGKg7DcOpuE8L-y7os0VUP_wXLSL7xiGghVeFTQ_S9TCK0Fg-fgG0m-7YmuH7b7Oq42vb411RXujpzmMLtWT4K3fc3u5ntYeVLL2E6cywc7hkqbZjRUtbprk095SeHcbob2MPA0gsdxExvGIkKRhk3yXNz8Q%3D%3D)
---

**The Democrats want to leave our borders wide open, defund our brave police officers, raise taxes on hard‐working Americans, and pack the Supreme Court to further their disastrous agenda.**

**[President Trump is calling on us to stand up to the woke mob! ACT NOW>>](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=04f63ee33f444f04995d1bb4da4dde7a&_e=G0sYqfJ_ldnYK8q9_TEwGE1snvlXj3VjiMDCMTT8rImblIrGPCbw_RPTO7tRqJrPhn_zHV-yIywwyFI1uo4G2qw3esfTUprz5b-T8OTv5uwuF0kSsDrCPrhPE-S6aK6REWzfyh8dw4BnED9k_g7XhvsrNQ60nNgZs8ZIFGaA4pS8euGEcYdR5UzP8O-ECq5kVYWLzqV6TeMpZa3fOYXsy_-y_Q-bf7ZlB0qV0lkV6dd-8gkogBPOitD80eAH1o1jnBx5mfrLCVp_Tdjt52bQIKTTqLTwJfERbk2QUGkOHoTqzwQtObdyXwBDmY-rAXfqI-L0j0VW53nJL6lCSyz4dXrU2Wnx4MVjor2ARBjU-B2LSwZeuyBP6_EKYnF1qvpt3rB11mPQkrAcHzoopThkVdGdmk0aUmy2rHL9j6tmsHeS92ekj50pcgCAQZGCUIQ4vSNzK7PZ1oGn5nratOOrEGLVQQ6sFQCp-sh7S74qVziGFMFnnhkGYKuQ_-4HNSWQnNI6eXIz0QvP6y0eYWu1WA%3D%3D)**

Without your support, the Democrats will be able to stop the America First agenda in its tracks and ruin our country as we know it. We have to stop them before it's too late. **[Can we count on you to be a true patriot?](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=04f63ee33f444f04995d1bb4da4dde7a&_e=G0sYqfJ_ldnYK8q9_TEwGE1snvlXj3VjiMDCMTT8rImblIrGPCbw_RPTO7tRqJrPhn_zHV-yIywwyFI1uo4G2qw3esfTUprz5b-T8OTv5uwuF0kSsDrCPrhPE-S6aK6REWzfyh8dw4BnED9k_g7XhvsrNQ60nNgZs8ZIFGaA4pS8euGEcYdR5UzP8O-ECq5kVYWLzqV6TeMpZa3fOYXsy_-y_Q-bf7ZlB0qV0lkV6dd-8gkogBPOitD80eAH1o1jnBx5mfrLCVp_Tdjt52bQIKTTqLTwJfERbk2QUGkOHoRUaye8cMXnup013VFD_BEF7f4xqDF4uYYXhclPZw1EJq9QFf25Es_lQH7Ic2tmqBcBfgLQ95G4pbpGh-b2Q0IXPSyVzndh6N8eOFAzKCITx3PN6SWBj9innpodEqd77Uq0MLEt8Xpk6SOAg6JMxg8v0rYbUZgdQxeRuCzFYFL9Y4Zvo7TUOdI60hsX4zJULIzAUzxQdN-NuN_CnimrVHEfqHBtPf5f4uP1RNEdIYCcng%3D%3D)** [**JOIN THE AMERICA FIRST MOVEMENT**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=04f63ee33f444f04995d1bb4da4dde7a&_e=G0sYqfJ_ldnYK8q9_TEwGE1snvlXj3VjiMDCMTT8rImblIrGPCbw_RPTO7tRqJrPhn_zHV-yIywwyFI1uo4G2qw3esfTUprz5b-T8OTv5uwuF0kSsDrCPrhPE-S6aK6REWzfyh8dw4BnED9k_g7XhvsrNQ60nNgZs8ZIFGaA4pS8euGEcYdR5UzP8O-ECq5kVYWLzqV6TeMpZa3fOYXsy_-y_Q-bf7ZlB0qV0lkV6dd-8gkogBPOitD80eAH1o1jnBx5mfrLCVp_Tdjt52bQIKTTqLTwJfERbk2QUGkOHoTB2A4qvtycmwAatuQZUYWz2XFd5gLUT8G5sItnFHQF30dSeLS-LGqc1c6HCzQazLUuqVwGzkAzt51YLo2bRKGs_6a-H-19TvAMZDp8aGPORQ9eXyYvOcHbm63CaO0eECXgjuC_INMYSTSV5R7oLfD_qO3zJty2Jxnq6MJAa7L7gwmQRrzwcI8aYs0nh-DOL5JUs9LOY2fk3ZejxgOK7xCgkVue29TVDT1lSW_pbzsa2Q%3D%3D)
---

**If we can get enough support, we will take back the Senate by electing Trump Conservatives into office and work towards finishing what Donald Trump started.

[Will you step up and join the movement to finish the America First Agenda?](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=04f63ee33f444f04995d1bb4da4dde7a&_e=G0sYqfJ_ldnYK8q9_TEwGE1snvlXj3VjiMDCMTT8rImblIrGPCbw_RPTO7tRqJrPhn_zHV-yIywwyFI1uo4G2qw3esfTUprz5b-T8OTv5uwuF0kSsDrCPrhPE-S6aK6REWzfyh8dw4BnED9k_g7XhvsrNQ60nNgZs8ZIFGaA4pS8euGEcYdR5UzP8O-ECq5kVYWLzqV6TeMpZa3fOYXsy_-y_Q-bf7ZlB0qV0lkV6dd-8gkogBPOitD80eAH1o1jnBx5mfrLCVp_Tdjt52bQIKTTqLTwJfERbk2QUGkOHoSpwZhvdGfCyGL-UDMONsWk1ogb4_BgJoMuFvRrYt9jB4AhumB1CmzEJt0ka9JTsvZDZ0Bs2rn6362ozOJtcc1lqdbYtO4hB8J9vgxfFfOV09ZOBWPVj-Dg8P5ZifixGUbunRiIPmMx1YGbRHkjEr09PazH7b9x6CQ6S3SzQvgiMV-ds8S9Dtn2Bl0RQFDYNCW2kEZNGto4ZQb-y4YnK6J5vAMCH1kgYKhyAtHh8WdKxQ%3D%3D)**

We will not be stopped!

America First Patriots
