name: Herschel Walker
subject: This race is bigger than me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
I’m running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66181db55e0f4ef6992d37cb9b6fe349&_e=GDo5FTLGKA7D0WiRXlbanP1DcNxZ3mlkVL8mcXY0lhJXFuVYSIA_dVfDxHCPFfgeLySDDXTxKZl_I547niNUx-s8ktQMSUVV89a4Y0_ytGJcDRXge-FFMX0fDmdKJ8jKlu1VcMR29Pn4Rb1v8OAvJTbMicz1Z3E1mLraAxLO6tN45XunS2JCEIHeIjfeUzz0q2efACBbzJGyBiJ2EKpxN-5CgkcSwXCuqdrgn21zj38hQZbpW6Va8GxANyqvx1amwMHBOaoPMNzK8_A0bNq3RwGVQhflY8H236pFMQwuLmLUHBv77XTYXRUPdRmLH_Jj580110hHr-xPyzqLjaxru5j7VgXvKRAE2gDNE4CxqAg-2v-DxUkIljUwurf4jF9ABCHZxCoqcpSOgVO30EbMWJxwBaPOkFPk4L__-fddK7Sg7KK-WjLHm0pBGv-s7NXlL9gKbp8JqNxbQEqqtQ2C9Q%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

As a kid growing up in the small town of Wrightsville, Georgia, I never thought I would be interviewing for a job like the one I'm writing to you about now.

While I am a candidate for the United States Senate, the truth is that this race is about so much more than me. The 2022 Senate race in Georgia is even bigger than either political party.

**This race is about the future of America.**

Right now, there is a change afoot. Some change happens incrementally, and some change happens overnight. Sometimes we blink and miss it. Georgia has changed a lot over the course of my life, mainly because folks from all around the country have flocked here because **[Republicans have done such a good job running the state that everyone wants to live here.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66181db55e0f4ef6992d37cb9b6fe349&_e=GDo5FTLGKA7D0WiRXlbanP1DcNxZ3mlkVL8mcXY0lhJXFuVYSIA_dVfDxHCPFfgeLySDDXTxKZl_I547niNUx-s8ktQMSUVV89a4Y0_ytGJcDRXge-FFMX0fDmdKJ8jKlu1VcMR29Pn4Rb1v8OAvJTbMicz1Z3E1mLraAxLO6tN45XunS2JCEIHeIjfeUzz0q2efACBbzJGyBiJ2EKpxN-5CgkcSwXCuqdrgn21zj38hQZbpW6Va8GxANyqvx1amNlZ82C8Y4wtpYuBOHTSPp1qPlD8L8IsqlHVQKxWt66rMXbq_AML_ZlWbkLGneMatxX9LP67GOXLSwl0eJLn68msHJshcboEwe7nt_8DzVh-apQAtVngQo-Uphm4NFqSW4Xps3Hfl1oEbbn2tBnzYnO_HvHn0iDzSGEuIV9rYlWbifuyliycF1l_9EzS1Elu884cJ78H0Bcct_TMR_DkmLQ%3D%3D)**

I took a long time to decide whether to enter the race. We counted the costs.

When you run for elected office, it can be hard on the candidate and family. But Peter, at the end of the day, I'm willing to sacrifice everything I have for America. I love this country too much to stand on the sidelines and watch it go down the wrong path.

That's why I decided to run for political office - despite not being a politician myself.

**[If you think that America needs lawmakers in Washington who continue to see the best America has to offer- rather than the worst, would you make a sacrifice on my behalf today by sending us $5, $10, $34 or more so we can build a campaign machine capable of going up against whatever Democrats are going to throw our way?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66181db55e0f4ef6992d37cb9b6fe349&_e=GDo5FTLGKA7D0WiRXlbanP1DcNxZ3mlkVL8mcXY0lhJXFuVYSIA_dVfDxHCPFfgeLySDDXTxKZl_I547niNUx-s8ktQMSUVV89a4Y0_ytGJcDRXge-FFMX0fDmdKJ8jKlu1VcMR29Pn4Rb1v8OAvJTbMicz1Z3E1mLraAxLO6tN45XunS2JCEIHeIjfeUzz0q2efACBbzJGyBiJ2EKpxN-5CgkcSwXCuqdrgn21zj38hQZbpW6Va8GxANyqvx1amHD8cb0Tb8nj3Drf9_MFHSJJJ1AN5wJWv63ZGxdXOIpSxjvqjOb1Ujd6Mv5f3SGAnyfTLA8lLEfT2msp4xqqVNTw-th8OWEWPOSP_Vbh3IeyUlQe8tl_tmKjO2u2YCKnL8PcxvEWZXgv2y9wXJ68E_a72IztPKcHi8rZ_iluiRgzDTTNR3o5Q0ZC1GoN_QHFQN3uusJHySpAI5vQC-wzA4Q%3D%3D)**

[**Send $5, $10, $34 or more our way today ->**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66181db55e0f4ef6992d37cb9b6fe349&_e=GDo5FTLGKA7D0WiRXlbanP1DcNxZ3mlkVL8mcXY0lhJXFuVYSIA_dVfDxHCPFfgeLySDDXTxKZl_I547niNUx-s8ktQMSUVV89a4Y0_ytGJcDRXge-FFMX0fDmdKJ8jKlu1VcMR29Pn4Rb1v8OAvJTbMicz1Z3E1mLraAxLO6tN45XunS2JCEIHeIjfeUzz0q2efACBbzJGyBiJ2EKpxN-5CgkcSwXCuqdrgn21zj38hQZbpW6Va8GxANyqvx1amO6hpENUQqeU0R_4RyAiC3OrDEwjVXXWfslHKq2c_CDc6U9XxbXtCQzIoAk73U4GoNpZKhHDQD50Y2QQotBkfpsoIA5K-7VzVtJ4QiMf5HdkXcVWInTlfiGetdpcbVGSZaGlVV2hcmstniaCBwfvG_n-d-6g-E497TmsqHpkeG1F3IjrzK2_3VdkaH4qS462EER9k0liP6hqJqV5QZ9w-VA%3D%3D)
I love America - everything about it. And Georgia is a microcosm of the United States, which is why winning the Senate seat for the Republican Party here is so important.

Democrats know what's at stake.

Republicans know what's at stake.

I'm running for Senate because a victory here for our team could help deescalate tensions, which are pretty high in Washington right now.

The headline at the top of this email is genuine, and it speaks to how much Democrats are going to spend to win - _**and, my friend, this is just the tip of the iceberg.**_

I am not running for myself. I am running for the people of Georgia, and I am running to make America better because I love America.

I hope you'll join us on this journey.

Thanks,

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=66181db55e0f4ef6992d37cb9b6fe349&_e=GDo5FTLGKA7D0WiRXlbanP1DcNxZ3mlkVL8mcXY0lhJXFuVYSIA_dVfDxHCPFfgeLySDDXTxKZl_I547niNUx-s8ktQMSUVV89a4Y0_ytGJcDRXge-FFMX0fDmdKJ8jKlu1VcMR29Pn4Rb1v8OAvJTbMicz1Z3E1mLraAxLO6tN45XunS2JCEIHeIjfeUzz0q2efACBbzJGyBiJ2EKpxN-5CgkcSwXCuqdrgn21zj38hQZbpW6Va8GxANyqvx1am2nUn1j_BBI1lPONsjJK0lSSeJmRJZRnAgfBYUSW5eshC9juVPdh5F7qsQUG9irTIqeXoDiGhLuBknEUeA6cJ4hAohtl1RTO8ejxZAeCcqaI6_C3H9Mr-vGgM-Mx7xmfrBjUpDVQUDZM5Oy78Y_c9tpd1j4sH23w6KW9EpzOkgRwQiyn7xp9n38lelEmbcKkd9vrCeb7pc5ZA9tJrXnNT6g%3D%3D)
Herschel Walker
Republican for US Senate

name: CALLING ALL DEMOCRATS (via DCCC)
subject: requesting your signature, not money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
will you sign on before midnight?

| | [CALLING ALL GRASSROOTS DEMOCRATS: SIGN NOW AND COMMIT TO SUPPORTING OUR HOUSE DEMOCRATS >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
| Republican HQ just unveiled their 32 candidates with the best shot at defeating our House Democrats.

We'll be blunt: Our House Majority is hanging on by a thread, and we can't afford to lose a SINGLE one of these races.

**That 's why we're calling on 10,000 of our best grassroots supporters to commit to doing everything they can to protect our House Majority.**

[**Quickly: Will you sign our Democratic Unity Pledge and commit to supporting our House Democrats? >>******](https://links.e.dccc.)

**NAME:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Petition Signature:** [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.) | [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/rr9Yf72Wy_)
---

We're rushing to you with _gut-wrenching_ news:

**Republican HQ just unveiled their****32 candidates****with the best shot at defeating our House Democrats.**

If we want any hope of protecting our House Majority and our progress, we can't afford to lose a single one of these ultra-competitive races.

That's why we're calling on 10,000 of our best grassroots supporters to commit to doing everything they can to support our House Democrats and protect our House Majority.

All that we've worked for is on the line, so we need to know: [**Will you sign our Democratic Unity Pledge before midnight and commit to supporting our House Democrats? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)

We need you to remember how hard we worked to win our House Majority.

And we need you to imagine how heartbreaking it would be to lose it to Trump's extremist Republicans.

**So please: Can our Democrats count on you to help save our House Majority by signing our Democratic Unity Pledge straight away?**
[SIGN NOW: COMMIT TO SUPPORTING OUR HOUSE DEMOCRATS >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45768125&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTI0NTE4OQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45768125&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjEwMTI0NTE4OQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Gains we make in Virginia this year will set the tone for the 2022 midterms nationwide, and show just how fed up voters are with Dems' radical liberal agenda. Virginians have had enough of one-party, liberal Democrat rule. If we don't stop their extreme policies in Virginia, Democrats will be emboldened to bring them to states where we will be defending razor-thin majorities next year -- like Arizona, Florida, Georgia, Michigan, Minnesota, New Hampshire, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Texas, and more.
**_STEP UP NOW TO SECURE GOP VICTORIES IN VIRGINIA AND BEYOND:_**

This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn’t just another alphabet soup political committee. We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.
